title: Wordpress Developer [Full Stack]
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a highly skilled and experienced Senior WordPress Full Stack Developer to join our growing team. In this role, you will lead end-to-end development of complex WordPress-based web applications, from database architecture and server-side logic to custom themes, plugins, and front-end interfaces.

You will collaborate closely with designers, project managers, and stakeholders to deliver scalable, high-performance digital solutions. The ideal candidate is self-driven, detail-oriented, and passionate about clean, maintainable code.



Key Responsibilities

- Design, develop, and maintain custom WordPress themes and plugins from scratch

- Build and integrate RESTful APIs and third-party services (payment gateways, CRMs, etc.)

- Develop responsive, cross-browser compatible front-end interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript

- Architect and optimize MySQL databases for performance and scalability

- Manage and configure web hosting environments (cPanel, Linux servers, Nginx/Apache)

- Implement security best practices, including WordPress hardening and vulnerability patching

- Conduct code reviews and provide technical mentorship to junior developers

- Collaborate with UI/UX teams to translate wireframes into fully functional pages

- Optimize website performance including Core Web Vitals, page speed, and caching strategies

- Manage version control using Git and participate in CI/CD workflows

- Troubleshoot and resolve bugs, performance issues, and compatibility conflicts

- Document technical specifications, development processes, and API integrations



Required Qualifications

- Minimum 5 years of hands-on WordPress development experience

- Strong proficiency in PHP (OOP), JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, and CSS3/SASS

- Deep understanding of WordPress core, hooks, filters, the WP REST API, and WP-CLI

- Experience with popular page builders (Elementor, Divi, Gutenberg/Block Editor)

- Proficiency with MySQL — query optimization, stored procedures, and schema design

- Solid experience with React.js or Vue.js for modern front-end development

- Familiarity with Node.js and headless/decoupled WordPress architectures

- Strong command of Git, GitHub/GitLab, and collaborative branching workflows

- Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Google Cloud, or DigitalOcean

- Knowledge of SEO best practices and technical SEO implementation

- Proven ability to work independently and deliver projects on schedule



Preferred Qualifications

- Experience with WooCommerce development, customizations, and payment gateway integrations

- Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, or containerized development environments

- Knowledge of GraphQL and headless CMS setups (e.g., WPGraphQL + Next.js)

- Experience with Multisite WordPress installations and management

- Background in Agile/Scrum development methodologies

- Contributions to open-source WordPress themes or plugins

- Experience with testing frameworks (PHPUnit, Jest, Cypress)



How to Apply:

Fill this form:

title: Full Stack Developer & AI Automation Engineer (n8n, Dify, Notion, Teams, GHL)
description:
We are a small Australian outdoor travel company looking for a full stack developer with extensive experience in AI automation. We want to implement a range of automations, AI agents and workflows to improve operational efficiency. 



Key tools include:

- Self-hosted n8n instance

- Self-hosted Dify instance

- Vector database (e.g. Pinecone)

- Notion

- Microsoft Teams (and broader 365 apps)

- GoHighLevel

- Tally

- Self-hosted Zammad instance



This is a developer role, not just connecting nodes in n8n. You must have extensive experience with RAG, vector databases, Docker containers, MCP servers etc. 



This role will start with a fixed cost initial project based on an agreed scope (initial budget of ~$2000AUD). After this project is complete, it will transition to a monthly retainer (plus an hourly rate for extra work). 



Whilst we have an initial build in mind, we are open to be guided by your experience and suggestions for the exacts tools used. 



To apply, please attach your resume and submit a short video introduction about yourself (1-2 minutes) addressing the following points:



1. Start the video by saying 'Hello Maddie' - so we know it's not a generic video :)

2. A brief introduction about yourself.

3. What tools you like to use to build AI agents and automations.

4. A recent example of a tough project you finished.



When submitting an application, please use the subject line “[your name] + [your favourite IDE]” :)



We look forward to working with you!

Full-time

Direct access to senior leadership — no bureaucratic approval layers

Meaningful work: every page you build is for a $19,000+ product. Your conversion improvements have real revenue impact.

13th month bonus · 6-month performance review with salary increase path

?

?

?

?

 • Industry pages (plumbing, electrical, HVAC, etc.)

 • Comparison pages (vs competitors)

 • “Best software” lists

 • Supporting blog content

 • Guest posts for external websites



?



Requirements:

 • Strong English writing (clear, natural, human - not robotic)

 • Experience writing SEO content that ranks

 • Able to write BOTH:

 • Commercial pages (conversion-focused)

 • Informational content (guest posts)

 • Understand:

 • Search intent

 • Content structure

 • Able to adapt tone for different audiences/sites



?



Not a Fit If You:

 • Only write generic blog content

 • Use AI without editing/improving

 • Focus on word count instead of quality

 • Have no experience with SEO structure



?



Success Looks Like:

?



???? To Apply:

?

“software for plumbing businesses”

?

“How small plumbing businesses can manage jobs more efficiently”



?

title: Marketing/Sales/Advertising for a hostel brand
description:
I have never hired someone for marketing, so I am trying something new to see if there is an ROI:



I operate PodShare, a shared housing hospitality concept with multiple California locations. I am looking for someone highly proactive, analytical, and execution-focused who can help increase bookings and partnerships.



This is not a passive content role. I am looking for someone who takes ownership of results and is obsessed with improving occupancy.

 

I am looking for someone to 



1) Create lists of schools, organizations, non profits, wedding planners, event promotoers etc. to cold call and setup tours of our facility, buyout for sports teams, pitch intern housing - with follow ups by
 and social media messages.



2) write engaging content, take our photos and use them with .ai to publish posts daily and newsletters 2x a month



3) have knowledge to setup Pixel on
,, Zappier, Notion, and other tools for recapture/marketing



4) be obsessed with our daily occupancies, and present me with stats daily and how you are moving the needles on bookings



5) using our past guests for re-targeting messages, and organizing folks for area specific or age specific messaging. 



6) engage influencers for "trades" to stay a night for a post - even for 3K followers so long as they have real engagement and not bots then they have a small base. 



7) Optimize OTA listings (Airbnb, 
, Hostelworld) to improve conversion rates and create blog posts on our website for SEO.



8. Improve Google Business Profiles with posts, photos, and responses to reviews.



I am not looking for a novice -- your first task with me will be to setup
 Pixel to our booking engine. This will require knowledge but also trouble shooting w/ our PMS so I am looking for someone with technical marketing knowledge and logic/independence to take a task all the way.



I also would like you to setup Zappier to Notify us when occupancy is low ? trigger promotions



Ideal candidate



Highly resourceful and independent

Comfortable troubleshooting technical setups

Strong written communication

Understands marketing funnels

Experience with hospitality or travel is a plus

Experience with Zapier, Meta Pixel, CRM tools preferred



RATE: $3/hour

HOURS: 30 hours per week

Schedule: Flexible but something like:



Mon–Fri

8am–11am Pacific ? outreach & partnerships

5pm–7pm Pacific ? social posting, engagement, monitoring bookings



Sat: 2–4 hours flexible ? content scheduling, influencer outreach, reports

Total ? 30hrs/week



Example schedule:



weekly output targets: outreach:

40–80 new contacts added

30–50 outreach messages sent

5–10 follow-ups



content:

5–7 posts per week

1–2 reels



influencers:



10 outreach messages per week

1–2 confirmed stays per month



:

2 newsletters per month



automation:

1 new optimization per week

title: Sales Virtual Assistant / Appointment Setter
description:
**Important – Read This Job Post Carefully**

! DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE NOT FLUENT IN ENGLISH ! 



We are a fast-growing home service company based in California looking to hire a reliable and motivated Virtual Assistant to help manage incoming leads, customer communication, outbound calls, and appointment scheduling.



Our industry is extremely competitive. Customers often contact multiple companies at the same time, and the company that responds first and communicates most professionally usually wins the job.



Because of this, speed, persistence, and professionalism are extremely important.



Your role will be to contact new leads, communicate with customers, follow up on previous inquiries, and schedule technician appointments.



You will also assist with basic data entry and updating customer information inside our CRM system.



You do not need previous experience with our software, as we will train you on how to use our CRM, call system, and internal tools.



This position is ideal for someone who is comfortable speaking with customers, organized, and able to work in a fast-paced environment.





Please read this job post in its entirety before applying.



This position requires attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions carefully.



Applications that do not follow the instructions outlined in this post will not be reviewed.



ABSOLUTE REQUIREMENTS (READ BEFORE APPLYING)



DO NOT APPLY if you do not meet these requirements.



We will not review applications that do not meet them.



Applicants must have:



• Strong and reliable internet connection (strong WiFi)

• Backup power in case of power outages

• Excellent English speaking ability with minimal accent

• Quiet and dedicated workspace (no background noise)

• Professional quality headset for customer calls



Strongly recommended:



• Dual monitor setup (two screens) to efficiently manage calls and CRM tasks.



Voice Recording Requirement (MANDATORY)



This role requires speaking with customers on the phone throughout the day.



Because of this, all applicants must submit a voice recording reading the script below.



This recording allows us to evaluate:



• English fluency

• Accent clarity

• Professional tone

• Communication ability



Any application submitted without a voice recording will NOT be reviewed or considered.



Please record yourself reading the script below clearly and naturally, as if you are leaving a voi
 for a real customer.



Record in a quiet environment using your headset.



Voice Recording Script



Please read the following message exactly as written:



Hello, this is (insert your name) calling with Professional Garage Door Services.



Our phone number is
, that’s
.



The reason I’m calling is because you recently submitted an inquiry regarding garage door assistance, and we would like to learn a little more about the issue you are experiencing and how we can help.



Our company specializes in garage door repairs, maintenance, and new garage door installations, and our technicians are equipped to handle most issues the same day.



At the 
nt, we actually have a technician working in your area, and because of that we may be able to provide same-day service depending on availability.



What we normally do is send one of our technicians out to perform a quick inspection of the garage door system, identify the issue, and provide you with a free, no-obligation estimate before any work is done.



During the inspection, the technician may also check torsion springs, track alignment, reinforcement struts, roller assemblies, cable tension, opener limits, and the safety sensor system to determine the exact cause of the problem.



The inspection typically only takes a few minutes and it allows our technician to explain exactly what is going on with the door and what options are available for repair or replacement.



If you would like to schedule a visit from one of our technicians, please give us a call at
, and we will be happy to get that arranged for you.



Once again, that phone number is
.



Thank you very much for your time, and we look forward to assisting you. Have a great day.



Scope of Work



Your responsibilities will include:



• Data entry and updating customer information in our CRM

• Placing outbound calls to new leads

• Following up with previous customers

• Scheduling technician appointments

• Sending text messages and
s to customers

• Updating lead notes and tracking communication history

• Coordinating with our internal team



You will be trained on how to use our CRM, dialing systems, and internal tools.



Work Schedule



This position requires working during U.S. daytime hours, which is night shift in the Philippines.



Shifts are 9 hours in length and will fall between the hours of:



7:00 AM – 9:00 PM PST



Exact shifts will be assigned during the hiring process.



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is someone who:



• Is comfortable speaking with customers on the phone

• Has strong communication skills

• Is organized and detail-oriented

• Can follow instructions carefully

• Works well in a fast-paced environment

• Is reliable and punctual



Compensation



The starting rate for this position is $5 per hour.



That said, we actively reward performance—if you show excellent English, strong communication, and the ability to perform effectively in your role, we can increase your pay to $6 per hour.



We’re also building a long-term team, and there will be opportunities to grow into management positions.



If you demonstrate initiative, leadership qualities, and responsibility, you’ll have the chance to move up and take on a larger role within the company..



Tea
mbers who show strong communication skills, reliability, and the ability to consistently perform in this fast-paced environment will be considered for raises over time.



This position is intended to be a long-term role for the right candidate.



Application Instruction



To confirm that you carefully read the entire job description, please start your application with the word:



Technician



*Applications that do not include this word at the beginning will not be reviewed!*

description:

title: Administrative Assistant with Executive Calendar Management Experience
description:
We are an early-stage venture capital firm seeking a highly organized and execution-driven Administrative Assistant to support our core operations. This role is designed for a tactical professional who possesses exceptional scheduling instincts and intermediate graphic design skills to elevate our firm’s internal and external materials.



The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced environment and will work closely with senior leadership to ensure seamless operational flow, from complex calendar management to the creation of polished digital assets.



Key Responsibilities:

- Executive Calendar Management: Coordinate multiple executive calendars with high precision, managing end-to-end meeting logistics and preparation.

- Design & Brand Assets: Utilize Canva to create professional logos, presentations, and marketing materials, ensuring all outputs meet institutional design standards.

- Digital Presence: Monitor news and updates from portfolio companies and community members via LinkedIn and Sales Navigator to curate and draft engaging social media posts.

- Operational Support: Manage accurate data entry, document preparation, and
 workflows to maintain up-to-date firm records.

- Project Coordination: Prioritize daily tasks and administrative duties to ensure all operational deadlines are consistently met.



Qualifications:

- Experience: Proven background in administrative, operations, or executive support roles.

- Calendar Mastery: Required extensive experience in complex executive calendar management and scheduling.

- Technical Proficiency: Strong command of scheduling tools and project management platforms (e.g., Notion, Airtable).

- Design Skills: Proficiency in Canva with a demonstrated ability to create professional logos and designs.

- Attention to Detail: A high level of precision regarding formatting, design, and written communication.

- Platform Knowledge: Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator and social media engagement strategies is preferred.

- Communication:: Excellent verbal and written communication skills with the ability to maintain a professional brand voice.



Schedule & Location

- Working Hours: This role follows US Pacific Time (9:00 AM – 6:00 PM PST).

- Note: For candidates in the Philippines, this corresponds to 12:00 AM –9:00AM PHT.

title: Content & Creative Specialist
description:
About Us

The Event Engineer helps entrepreneurs scale to 7-figures and beyond. Led by Lisa Barry, we build high-converting event systems and world-class client experiences. Our mission: helping visionary founders grow wealth that fuels meaningful change.



The Role

We are seeking a high-level Creative Marketing Architect to own the visual and written soul of our brand. You are responsible for total brand dominance. This role goes beyond social media management; you will architect our front-end aesthetic and create original, scroll-stopping content that establishes Lisa Barry as the preeminent voice in the industry.



Key Responsibilities



1. Native Social Media & Audience Growth



Original Production: Create high-impact Reels, TikToks, and Shorts from scratch. Research trends, develop unique hooks, and execute flawless transitions.

YouTube Mastery: Own the end-to-end production of the weekly 20-minute "Deep Dive." Manage high-retention editing, SEO, and thumbnails that command clicks.

Viral Exposure: Execute the strategy to reach 50,000 – 100,000 followers through elite content and engagement.

Community Connection: Engage daily to build deep relationships using Lisa’s authentic voice.



2. Full-Spectrum Marketing & Asset Design



Product Design: Create high-converting lead magnets, PDF guides, and workbooks that look like 7-figure products.

Funnel Aesthetics: Ensure landing pages and sales funnels in GHL/Canva are visually stunning and premium.

Marketing Collateral: Design pitch decks, onboarding assets, and event-specific graphics (ads, banners, promos).



3. High-Authority Copywriting & Creative Direction



The Written Voice: Ghostwrite the weekly Substack, the "Wednesday Drop" Newsletter, and all social captions. Capture Lisa’s voice perfectly to inspire action.

Brand Guardianship: Ensure every touchpoint—from
 headers to YouTube descriptions—is visually elite.

Innovation: Stay ahead of marketing trends to keep the brand fun and innovative.



Who You Are



A Storyteller: You build authority through original visuals and marketing psychology.

An Owner: You don't wait for a task list. You see gaps and fill them with brilliance.

Design-Obsessed: If it isn’t world-class, it doesn’t get published.

High-Performance: You thrive in fast-paced environments and take pride in hitting growth targets.



Qualifications & Skills



Proven Results: Documented experience growing personal brands to 50k+ followers (metrics required).

Experience: 2–3+ years as a Creator or Marketing Assistant for high-ticket coaches or agencies.

Exceptional Communication: Flawless near-native English with a talent for voice matching.

Technical Mastery: Expert in Video Editing (CapCut/Premiere) and Visual Design (Canva/Photoshop/Figma).

Marketing Savvy: You understand how design impacts funnel conversion.



Application Requirements



Resume: A professional history of your experience.

Portfolio: Links to original social content, voice-matching copy, and marketing designs.

Growth Case Study: Breakdown of an account you grew and the strategy used.

DISC Profile: Please include your results.



Work Arrangement & Compensation



Remote: 9am – 5pm AEDT

Compensation: $1,000 AUD / month (Full-Time)

Long-term Growth: We are looking for team to grow with the brand; as we scale, your role and compensation will scale with it.

title: Children’s Book Designer & Publishing Production Specialist (KDP + IngramSpark)
description:
We are seeking a talented and detail-oriented Children’s Book Designer & Production Specialist to help bring our fully illustrated children’s book series to life.



This role is focused on execution and consistency, not creating concepts from scratch. We already have existing books, established fonts, and a clear design blueprint that you will follow and apply across the series.



You will be responsible for interior layout, typography (typecasting), and cover design (text only), ensuring each book is professionally formatted for both print and digital publishing.



You will work closely alongside our illustrator and author, collaborating to thoughtfully integrate text with artwork and maintain the creative vision of each story. All illustrations will be provided—this role does not include creating or modifying artwork. Your focus will be on placing and styling text within the existing illustrations to create a cohesive, engaging reading experience.



We have 7 books in the series, with 4 books that need to be updated/redesigned first. These initial projects are more straightforward and structured, as the work will primarily involve replacing and adjusting text using updated manuscripts while following an existing layout and design style.



All layouts must be created in Adobe InDesign, and final deliverables should include editable InDesign files (INDD) and print-ready PDFs that meet specifications for platforms such as Amazon KDP and IngramSpark, as well as print-ready versions for in-person sales.



Compensation Structure:



$100–$125 per book for the initial 3–4 books (text updates + existing layout execution)

Potential for adjusted rates for future books based on scope

title: Video Editor - Fitness and Anime YouTube Channel
description:
About the channel



Gokuflex is one of the longest-running fitness channels on YouTube. The brand blends Dragon Ball Z mythology with real-world training, identity transformation, and fatherhood. We have been doing this for over 11 years and our audience is here to become the best version of themselves.

We are not looking for a basic editor. We need someone who trains, knows anime inside and out, and is obsessed with making videos that stop the scroll.



What you will be editing



YouTube long-form videos including vlogs, training content, transformations, and motivation

YouTube Shorts and Instagram Reels

Client transformation spotlights and social proof content

Motivational Saiyan Dad identity content



Hard requirements - non-negotiable



Deep Dragon Ball Z knowledge. You must know the arcs, characters, power levels, and lore. Not optional.

Broad anime knowledge including One Piece, Naruto, Jujutsu Kaisen and beyond.

Real fitness understanding. You need to know training, body transformation, nutrition, and gym culture. If you have never been in that world, this role is not for you.

Professional-level skill in Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.

Expert at pacing, jump cuts, music sync, and keeping viewers locked in from hook to CTA.

Able to meet deadlines and communicate clearly in English.

Fast, reliable internet and a computer that can handle 4K footage.



Skills that will make you stand out



Motion graphics, anime-style transitions, After Effects or CapCut, color grading, sound design and SFX, DBZ power-up effects, thumbnail creation, YouTube SEO awareness, short-form viral instincts.

Bonus: If you personally train or have your own transformation story, include it. We value people who live the brand.



What makes the best Gokuflex editor



You know the first 3 seconds either win or lose the viewer and you edit accordingly.

You can use DBZ power-up 
nts, transformation sequences, and iconic music as storytelling tools, not just cool effects.

You can take a raw training vlog and turn it into a cinematic Saiyan origin story.

You study what is going viral on YouTube Shorts, Reels, and TikTok every single week.

You obsess over retention and understand the difference between a video that gets clicked and one that gets finished.

You bring ideas, not just execution.



Work structure



100% remote, work from home

Full-time preferred, part-time considered based on experience and output

Consistent weekly video schedule with real deadlines

Direct collaboration with the channel owner via WhatsApp and Google Drive

Paid in USD via Wise or similar. Starting at $800/month scaling to $1,200 based on experience and performance.



How to apply



Send your application with the subject line: SAIYAN EDITOR - [Your Name]

Applications without this subject line will not be reviewed.



Your application must include:



Links to 2 to 3 samples of your video editing work (YouTube, Google Drive, or Vimeo)

A short paragraph on why you are the right editor for this channel. Be specific.

Your software stack including any plugins or tools you use

Your available hours per week and your time zone

Your answer to the question below



REQUIRED - Answer this to prove you read the full ad:



Goku has reached Ultra Instinct. In the world of fitness, what does Ultra Instinct represent in a person's training journey and how would you show that 
nt visually in a YouTube video? Give a specific editing idea, not a general answer.

title: Website developer
description:
Job Title: Web Developer (AI Integration – Dental Smile Visualization)



Location: Remote (Preferred: U.S.-based)  

Company: Dental Concepts & Orthodontics  



About Us:  

We are an elevated, luxury-focused dental practice committed to delivering a high-end patient experience through innovation, aesthetics, and advanced technology. We are currently seeking a skilled Web Developer with AI experience to build a modern, visually stunning website that integrates cutting-edge dental technology.



Project Overview:  

We are looking to develop a custom website that includes an AI-powered smile visualization tool—allowing patients to see realistic before-and-after transformations of their smile (veneers, whitening, orthodontics, etc.). This feature will be a key driver in patient engagement and case acceptance.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design and develop a sleek, high-end, mobile-optimized dental website

- Build or integrate an AI-driven before-and-after smile simulation tool

- Collaborate with our team to ensure branding reflects a luxury experience

- Ensure fast load times, SEO optimization, and strong user experience (UX/UI)

- Implement secure patient interaction features (forms, uploads, consultations)

- Integrate booking functionality and CRM compatibility if needed



Required Skills & Experience:

- Proven experience in web development (front-end & back-end)

- Strong knowledge of AI/ML integration, especially image processing or computer vision

- Experience working with healthcare or dental-related platforms (preferred)

- Familiarity with tools such as TensorFlow, OpenCV, or similar AI frameworks

- Ability to create realistic image simulations (before/after transformations)

- Experience with UI/UX design for premium/luxury brands

- Strong portfolio showcasing relevant work



Bonus Qualifications:

- Experience building smile design or cosmetic simulation tools

- Knowledge of dental workflows (veneers, Invisalign, smile makeovers)

- Experience integrating 3D imaging or facial recognition technology



Project Type:

- Contract-based (with potential for ongoing collaboration)



To Apply:

Please submit:

- Your portfolio (especially AI or visualization projects)

- Examples of similar work (dental or aesthetic industries preferred)

- A brief overview of how you would approach building an AI smile simulation tool

- Estimated timeline and pricing



Our Goal:  

We are not looking for a basic website—we want a standout digital experience that reflects innovation, luxury, and results. If you have the skillset to bring this vision to life, we want to hear from you.





This could be a part-time position or a one time gig

s

s are drafts for review

title: Insurance Account Manager
description:
Offshore Insurance Account Manager (Philippines)



Maverick Insurance Brokers



About Maverick



Maverick is a new-age commercial insurance brokerage built for business owners who expect more than just a policy.



We don’t do passive, once-a-year broking.

We proactively manage risk, move fast, and make sure our clients are properly covered as their businesses evolve.



We’re building a high-performance brokerage from day one with a strong pipeline, sharp systems, and a focus on growth.



The Role



We’re hiring an Offshore Insurance Account Manager based in the Philippines to operate as a core part of our broking team.



This is not a support role.



You’ll be expected to think, act, and operate like an Australian-based broker — managing policies, preparing submissions, reviewing coverage, and driving outcomes for clients.



The only difference: you’ll spend less time on the phone, and more time executing at speed and precision.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Managing a portfolio of commercial insurance clients (behind the scenes)

Preparing high-quality market submissions for insurers

Reviewing policies, endorsements, and wordings for accuracy and coverage gaps

Building renewal strategies and identifying opportunities to improve cover

Comparing quotes and preparing recommendations for clients

Managing policy changes, renewals, and documentation end-to-end

Working closely with onshore brokers to move deals forward quickly

Following up insurers and keeping 
ntum across all placements

Maintaining clean, structured data in CRM (HubSpot)

Identifying risks, issues, or gaps before they become problems

What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



Highly competent technically - you understand commercial insurance inside out

You are very familiar with insurance platforms like Sunrise, Ebix.

Fast and proactive - you don’t wait to be told what to do

Detail-obsessed - you catch what others miss

Commercially minded - you understand client outcomes, not just policies

Structured thinker - you can manage multiple clients, policies, and deadlines without dropping the ball

You take responsibility and get things done



Experience Required

3+ years in commercial insurance (brokerage, account management or underwriting)

Strong knowledge across multiple lines (Property, Liability, Financial Lines, Motor, etc.)

Experience preparing submissions and managing renewals

Comfortable reviewing policy wordings and identifying gaps

Experience working with Australian brokers or insurers



How This Role is Different



Most offshore roles are admin-heavy.



This is not.



You will:



Be treated like a core broker

Be trusted with real responsibility

Work directly with founders and senior brokers

Be expected to move fast and think commercially

What Success Looks Like

Submissions go to market faster and at higher quality

Renewals are proactive, not reactive

Clients are better covered without needing to chase

Onshore brokers can focus on winning and relationships because you’ve handled the engine room



Why Join Maverick

Be part of a high-growth brokerage from the ground up

Work with a team that values speed, quality, and ownership

Clear progression as the business scales

Competitive offshore salary + performance upside



To Apply

title: CX Specialist
description:
WHO WE ARE

We don’t just build dream homes and mansions— we create sanctuaries in nature where artists, athletes, and visionaries come to disconnect from the noise, recharge, and find inspiration to create what’s next.



WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS

- Starting at Php 45K+ (85K when you included our numerous benefits – Free Unemployment Insurance, Bonuses, etc.)

- 100% remote. Work from the beach, the mountains, or another city, you’re free!

- Low stress, no burnout

- Minimum of 24 days off a year. Not to escape life, but to live it on your terms

- Free & Full Healthcare coverage (HMO & Health Insurance)

- Free Mental Health coverage

- HAVE FUN at our team-building events in BGC with our Beverly Hills & Manila teams. We're talking about haunted houses, yoga, muay thai, painting, Korean BBQ, rooftop happy hours, dancing, and karaoke!



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

- Follow-Up with Warm Leads: Talk to guests who already showed interest—like people who canceled a booking or stayed with us before. You’ll reach out by phone or
 to see how we can help, share new spots they might like, and help them plan their next stay. No cold calling, ever!

- AI Assistance: We use AI to identify users who either abandoned their cart during checkout or are no longer actively staying with us. The AI calls these users to see if they need help completing their booking. If they do, we connect them with you to finalize their reservation.

- Subscription: We offer a subscription plan that gives guests access to all of our locations. When someone calls to cancel, your job is to explain the benefits and value of staying subscribed, and help them make the most of their membership.

- Mega Team Retreats: We fly everyone in from our U.S. and Asia team to Bonifacio Global City for Mega Team Retreats. All expenses paid. Flights. Hotels. Vibes. Steak Dinners. Pilates. MMA. Painting. Drinks. Connection.



Apply here: 





See the vibe:

title: Sr. Web Developer-PH
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE: 



THIS IS A PART-TIME TO FULLTIME ROLE (will start as part-time for 60-90 days then transition to fulltime)!



We’re looking for a Senior Web Developer to join our dev team. You thrive building beautiful, high-performing websites and digital experiences for top-tier brands. You can lead multiple projects, mentor other developers, and communicate clearly with clients while still getting deep in the code when needed.



RESPONSIBILITIES: 



In this role, you'll get to...



lead development of WordPress using ACF, custom blocks, Twig templating, custom post types, and block-based themes, with performance, accessibility, SEO, and high-quality execution built in

build projects with headless CMS platforms like Contentful, Storyblok, or WordPress as a headless backend, leveraging REST API or GraphQL, and using frontend frameworks like Next.js or Nuxt.js with headless architectures

create pixel-perfect, fully functioning frontends using Tailwind CSS, GSAP , and other modern frontend technologies, ensuring responsive, interactive, and high-performance experiences

integrate backend systems, APIs, CRMs, marketing automation (Salesforce, Marketo, HubSpot, careers platforms), AI tools, and eCommerce solutions

own CI/CD workflows and deploy sites across Vercel, Netlify, AWS, Kinsta, and WP Engine, including edge/CDN optimizations

serve as a primary technical point of contact for internal teams (PM, design, SEO) and clients, translating complex ideas into clear recommendations

mentor junior developers and provide technical leadership across multiple projects

collaborate using Figma, Slack, Teamwork, and Pastel to bring designs to life efficiently

perform other ad hoc duties related to the role as assigned

REQUIREMENTS: 



On day one, we'll expect you to...



have 7+ years of web development experience, ideally in agency environments

have strong full-stack expertise, comfortable with both frontend and backend

have deep knowledge of modern WordPress, headless CMS, Next.js or Nuxt.js, Tailwind, GSAP, CI/CD, deployments, and integrations

have proven experience leading multiple projects and teams, with excellent client-facing communication

have hands-on experience with API integrations, marketing automation, AI tools, eCommerce, SEO, security, and DevOps

be detail-oriented, proactive, and capable of translating technical decisions into actionable solutions

be open to part-time to fulltime opportunity

have a fully functional and up-to-date computer with which to perform duties

be willing to install next-generation endpoint protection on the computer

be willing to work in US Pacific time zone (8:00am-5:00pm PST) corresponding to 12:00am -9:00am PH time

be a current resident of the Philippines and legally able to perform work from there

What separates the best from the rest:



advanced GSAP/ animations experience

mentorship, client management, and cross-team collaboration experience

experience optimizing performance, accessibility, SEO, security, and DevOps at scale

Edge and CDN strategy experience for modern web projects

NOTES:



Benefits await full-time contractors. 

This is a remote (work from home) position.



TO APPLY: ** DO NOT SEND YOUR APPLICATION HERE IN INDEED** Follow the instructions below:



1. COPY & PASTE this link to your browser: 

2. Fill out the form and submit your resume to our system.



We will reach out to you via
 using our system!

Thank you!

title: Personal Lines Insurance Virtual Assistant
description:
We’re looking for a full-time Insurance Virtual Assistant to support US-based agencies. This role is focused on personal lines servicing, quoting, and client communication.



Requirements:

• MUST have hands-on experience with EZLynx

• MUST have experience in personal lines quoting (remarkets and new business)

• MUST have experience handling both inbound and outbound calls

• MUST have clear, professional English communication skills

• MUST be highly organized with strong attention to detail

• MUST be willing to work full-time with no other commitments

• MUST have own laptop/desktop, reliable internet, headset, and backup setup

• Can work Monday to Friday, US business hours



Qualifications and Skill Sets:

• Strong understanding of personal lines policies (home, auto, etc.)

• Experience quoting, remarketing, and managing new leads

• Comfortable speaking with clients and insurance carriers

• Proactive, organized, and able to manage multiple tasks

• Experience using agency management systems and CRMs

• Ability to follow processes while maintaining accuracy and consistency



Responsibilities:

• Quote personal lines policies for new and existing clients

• Handle remarkets and assist with renewals

• Manage and follow up on new business leads

• Make and receive calls with clients and carriers

• Maintain accurate records and update systems accordingly



Perks and Benefits:

• Competitive and negotiable rate

• Weekends off

• Paid US holidays

• PTO

• HMO

• Year-end bonus



How to Apply:

Send your resume and relevant experience to:

title: Rockstar Cold Caller | Strictly B2B Experience Only
description:
We’re an Australian telemarketing company that partners with high-performing businesses across Australia. Our team specializes in generating qualified B2B appointments and building strong client relationships through professional outreach.



We’re looking for an experienced B2B Cold Caller who can confidently engage decision-makers, handle objections, and book quality appointments. This is a full-time role (no double jobs, please — we value focus and consistency).



Key Responsibilities: Conduct outbound B2B calls to company decision-makers in Australia. Qualify leads and set appointments based on campaign requirements. Maintain accurate records of calls and outcomes in CRM. Follow scripts and objection-handling frameworks effectively. Deliver results aligned with daily and weekly KPIs.



Qualifications: 

At least 1 year of solid B2B cold calling experience (required — we won’t consider applicants without this). 

Excellent English communication skills — clear, confident, and engaging. 

Strong understanding of sales communication and lead qualification. 

Comfortable working independently and meeting targets. 

Stable internet connection and noise-free work environment. 

Willing to work 6AM–3PM Manila Time (Australian shift).



Compensation & Growth: 550+ USD/month base depending on experience. Performance-based scaling and incentives available.



Important: We’re hiring for dedicated full-time tea
mbers only. Holding multiple jobs may affect your performance — if we find this to be the case, we’ll unfortunately have to let you go.



Application Requirements: Please include your DISC profile report (with a clear breakdown of your scores — no Tony Robbins reports, please) along with your resume and a short voice recording introducing yourself.



If you’re a driven cold caller who thrives on results and wants to grow with a supportive, fast-paced team — we’d love to hear from you!

title: Outbound Phone Consultant
description:
We're a fast-growing B2B outbound lead generation team based in Australia that's currently looking for outbound telemarketers to join our team.



All of our clients are Australian based so enjoy working daytime hours while working for a company that cares and has a great culture among our staff.



As a cold caller we expect you to have very high standard of spoken English and some cold calling experience is preferred. You will be an excellent sales person, not just reading from a script but having high level conversations with prospects. If you're good then we'll reward you.



You will be paid a base salary with generous commissions so expect to earn $600-$850+ usd per month minimum. This will be scaled based on performance



As part of your application, we require the following

- voice recording (if you're stuck for things to say tell us why you love sales and want to work as a cold caller)

- DISC profile that shows us the breakdown of your scores (no tony robbins reports please)



If you don't provide the above your application will not be considered.

title: YouTube-to-Reels Content Curator — 60,000 PHP/Month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day



You are not creating content from scratch.

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.



TASKS



- Clip 2–3 short videos per day (15–45 seconds each)

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

- Ensure a smooth audio experience

- Review your work carefully before submitting



Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above)

- Strong understanding of audience psychology and content-market fit

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Strong judgment for identifying valuable, on-brand content

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Fill in the application form and record a Loom introducing yourself:




/to/v0OA9cFs



Important note: Put “VC” + [Your Name & Family Name] in the “Name” field.



ROUND 2: Paid test task. You will receive long-form videos and create short clips in the same style.



MORE ABOUT US



Young Publisher:

title: YouTube AI Content Creator
description:
We are seeking a YouTube AI Content Creator who can leverage AI Agent tools to research, collect data, and transform insights into engaging, high-quality videos. The ideal candidate will have a strong sense of storytelling, visual creativity, and hands-on experience in video editing and channel management.



Key Responsibilities

* Use AI Agent tools to automate workflows, streamline research, and organize data efficiently

* Handle graphic design, scriptwriting, footage collection, AI voiceovers, video editing, and background music integration

title: Acquisition Manager (Paid Media & Digital Growth) Remote
description:
THE OPPORTUNITY





Are you a strategic powerhouse who knows how to buy growth? KaliHome Builders is looking for an Acquisition Manager focused specifically on Online Ad Spend. Unlike traditional real estate sourcing, this role is about mastering the digital landscape to acquire high-intent remodeling leads. You will own the strategy, execution, and optimization of our paid marketing channels to fuel our sales pipeline.



WHAT YOU’LL DO:

? Strategic Ad Spend: Allocate and manage a significant monthly budget across Google Ads, Meta, and Local Services Ads (LSA) to hit aggressive lead-gen targets.

? Master the Funnel: Build, test, and scale paid acquisition funnels that convert cold traffic into qualified residential remodeling appointments.

? Data-Driven Sourcing: Analyze "Cost Per Lead" (CPL) and "Cost Per Acquisition" (CPA) daily to ensure we are buying the highest quality traffic at the best possible price.

? Creative Strategy: Partner with designers to develop high-converting ad copy and visual assets that stop the scroll and drive action.

? Performance Reporting: Provide transparent, high-level reporting on how every dollar spent translates into revenue for the company.



WHAT YOU BRING:

? Proven Performance: 2+ years of experience in Paid Digital Acquisition, specifically managing high-velocity lead generation (Home Improvement or Service Industry experience preferred).

? Platform Expertise: Advanced mastery of Google Ads (Search/LSA), Meta Ads Manager, and emerging paid social channels.

? Analytical Precision: Expert at using GA4, Google Tag Manager, and CRM data to track the full "Click-to-Contract" journey.

? Budget Stewardship: Experience managing and optimizing monthly spends of $5k with a focus on ROI, not just traffic.

? Conversion Obsession: A deep understanding of landing page optimization and A/B testing frameworks.



WHY JOIN US?

? Competitive Compensation: High base salary (DOE) plus performance-based bonuses tied to acquisition efficiency.

? Impact: You are the engine of our growth. Your success directly dictates the company's scaling potential.

title: Experienced Medical Biller
description:
I am a Virtual Assistant posting this position on behalf of our dermatology clinic. We have a dedicated team of VAs, some of whom have been with us for over a year, reflecting our commitment to growth and long-term opportunities. We offer annual raises, paid lunches and breaks, and a collaborative, supportive environment.



We are seeking an organized and detail-oriented Experienced Medical Biller to join our team. You will manage medical billing and coding tasks to ensure accurate and timely reimbursements. Dermatology experience is a plus but not required. Candidates must have at least two years of medical billing experience and be available for 20 hours per week during Pacific Time hours. You can work 40 hours if you’re open to other roles (answering phones).



Key Responsibilities:

Prepare and submit claims to insurance companies, ensuring accuracy and compliance.

Review and resolve claim denials and rejections, working with insurance companies for prompt payment.

Maintain accurate patient billing records and update patient information.

Assist patients with billing inquiries, insurance coverage, and payment options.

Collaborate with the healthcare team to support seamless billing and coding processes.

Handle ad hoc administrative tasks related to billing and revenue cycle management.

Maintain HIPAA compliance and confidentiality at all times.

As you become proficient, opportunities to take on additional responsibilities will arise, with the potential to grow into a full-time role



Requirements

Minimum 2 years of experience as a medical biller; dermatology experience preferred but not mandatory.

Strong knowledge of medical billing and coding, including CPT, ICD-10, and HCPCS codes.

Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills.

Ability to work 20 hours per week during Pacific Time hours.

Proficiency with medical billing software and EMR/EHR systems.

Strong communication skills and a customer-focused attitude.

Ability to handle ad hoc tasks and multitask in a fast-paced environment.

Willingness to be cross-trained in additional tasks such as patient scheduling and answering phone calls.



Trial Period

Candidates will undergo a one-week paid trial period to evaluate performance, workflow compatibility, and overall fit for the role

This trial also allows candidates to assess if the position aligns with their expectations and availability

Continued engagement or employment will be determined based on mutual fit and performance during the trial period



Technical Requirements:

Laptop or desktop with 8GB RAM, Core i5 or above.

USB headset with noise-cancellation feature.

Willingness to use video and conduct screen shares during shifts.

Hubstaff (time tracking).

Main internet speed: at least 75 Mbps (wired connection preferred)



Application Instructions

To apply, please submit the following in a single Google Drive folder (PDFs only) with view access enabled:

1) Updated resume

2) Screenshot of typing speed test (60–80 WPM minimum)

3) Screenshot of internet speed test (minimum 75 Mbps)

4) Screenshot or list of your full work setup and specifications



Important: To ensure you’ve read the full job description, please include “MEDICAL BILLING DERM” in the subject line of your application.

title: CREATIVE BRAND BUILDER — Motion, Characters & AI Video Remote | Full-Time | Above Market Rate
description:
CREATIVE BRAND BUILDER — Motion, Characters & AI Video

Remote | Full-Time | Above Market Rate



This is not a typical design job.



We are building a brand from the ground up, characters, motion, story, and a website that makes people feel something. If you are a creative who gets excited by brand building, character design, and the new world of AI-assisted video, keep reading.

The work



You will be taking a cast of original characters and building them into a fully realised brand presence across every format, static design, motion, and AI video. The centrepiece of this work is producing video content where human characters and animated brand characters interact naturally and convincingly. Think brand film, not corporate demo.

Alongside the character and video work you will manage social media channels, build website visuals, and create promotional content that blends real human imagery with character assets seamlessly. You will also take ownership of the website, ensuring every element, layout, imagery, typography, and character placement is polished, cohesive, and visually perfect across all devices.



You are the right person if you can:



Take one character and recreate them consistently across 50 different scenarios without losing who they are. Produce motion content and AI-assisted video using whatever tools get the best result, After Effects, HeyGen, Runway, CapCut, anything. Create AI video content featuring human and character interaction sequences that feel real and emotionally engaging. Build brand assets, guidelines, and a visual library from scratch. Blend human photography with illustrated characters cohesively across a website and social media. Have a sharp eye for website design and the ability to take a site from functional to visually outstanding, ensuring every element fits the brand and feels intentional.

We do not care how you execute. AI tools, traditional software, hybrid workflows, results are all that matter.

What we need from you



A portfolio showing character work across multiple executions, same character, different scenarios, different formats. Examples of motion work or AI video content you have produced. A short note telling us what excites you about this role.

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a live video interview.



What you get



Above market rate full time salary. Fully remote, work your own hours. Creative freedom to use any tools and methods you choose. Work on a brand with genuine commercial ambition and a principal who values great creative work. Long term role with growing scope as the brand scales.



To apply



Send a link to your portfolio and a short message directly to the hiring manager at

title: Senior Video Editor & Content Strategist
description:
The Role

We are looking for an elite Senior Video Editor with 5+ years of professional experience to join our high-growth marketing team. This is not just a "cutter" role; we are looking for a creative partner—someone who understands why people watch, how to keep them engaged, and how to turn raw footage into high-performing assets for YouTube and social media. You should bring experience with ideas and growth in the content space to elevate our work beyond base expectations.



The Standard

Self-checking your work is a critical pillar of this role. We produce a high volume of content within the Marketing Department; time wasted by management Quality Checking (QC’ing) sloppy work or simple mistakes is time wasted from other important tasks. You are expected to be your own toughest critic and deliver "ready-to-post" files every time.



Core Responsibilities

*   Performance Optimization: You must have the ability to surgically "cut out" bad performance 
nts from on-screen talent. You are responsible for manufacturing the best possible version of the speaker to ensure the clearest communication of ideas.

*     High-Volume Management: Ability to keep up with our high-volume weekly workload (3 long-form videos and 2–6 shorts per week).

               - Phase 1: Ownership of one main weekly podcast + shorts (~7–20 min runtime).

               - Phase 2: Transitioning to take over a second weekly series (~17–23 min runtime).

*     Custom Animation: Build high-quality animations from scratch (not just utilizing templates). You will build animated graphics and bullet point lists to help our audience follow along and significantly improve their ability to understand complex material.

*     Advanced Post-Production: Professional-grade Color Grading using DaVinci Resolve and surgical Audio Mixing skills to ensure broadcast-quality clarity.

*     AI Asset Creation: Proficiently create visual elements using AI tools (GPT, Gemini, Nano Banana, etc.) to enhance storytelling and supplement B-roll.



Qualifications & Skills

*     Professional Experience: 5+ years working with clients on commercial, narrative, documentary, or social-media projects. Prior experience with financial planning content is a plus.

*     Technical Mastery: Expert proficiency in Adobe Premiere, Adobe After Effects, and DaVinci Resolve.

*     Strategic Thinking: A deep understanding of YouTube retention metrics and a track record of work that has earned viral results.

*     Communication: Exceptional English communication skills and high-level organizational habits are crucial for this role.

*     Reliability: Comfort working fixed US office hours (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST) with a stable, high-speed internet connection and backup power when needed.



Why You?

*     You have a portfolio that shows "viral" or high-retention results.

*     You can take a "bad" on-camera performance and turn it into a seamless, authoritative presentation through clever cutting and pacing.

*     You are looking for a long-term home where you can influence the creative direction of a growing brand.



Interested candidates should submit a resume, an intro video, and a brief cover note describing their experience managing administrative and coordination tasks in a remote environment.



About Falcon Wealth Planning

Falcon Wealth Planning is a fiduciary, fee-only wealth advisory firm on a mission to redefine how Americans experience financial planning. We translate complex tax and investment strategies into clear, human stories that build trust, because wealth decisions are emotional before they’re logical.

This role is ideal for someone who understands retail marketing, paid advertising, and how to convert conversations into paying customers. You will be responsible for managing ad campaigns across multiple platforms while also handling client communication, sales calls, and onboarding.



This is a hybrid role combining marketing execution with direct sales responsibility.



Key Responsibilities



Sales & Client Acquisition



Conduct outbound and inbound sales calls to convert leads into clients

Clearly explain services, pricing, and value propositions to potential customers

Identify client pain points and position solutions effectively

Close deals and ensure smooth transition into onboarding

Maintain a consistent sales pipeline and meet monthly targets



Client Onboarding & Communication



Lead onboarding calls with new clients and set expectations

Build strong relationships through clear and confident communication

Provide ongoing updates, performance insights, and recommendations

Handle objections, questions, and client concerns professionally



Digital Marketing Execution



Plan, launch, and manage paid ad campaigns on:

Google Ads

Meta Ads

TikTok

Optimize campaigns for conversions, ROAS, and lead generation

Conduct audience targeting, A/B testing, and creative optimization

Monitor daily performance and adjust budgets and strategies accordingly



Retail-Focused Strategy



Develop marketing strategies tailored to e-commerce and retail brands

Understand product positioning, pricing psychology, and customer behavior

Align campaigns with promotions, product launches, and seasonal trends



Additional Responsibilities



Support additional marketing, sales, or operational tasks as assigned by management

Stay up to date with platform changes, new features, and advertising policies across all supported channels

Adapt to evolving business needs, including testing new platforms, tools, or campaign strategies

Qualifications

Proven experience in digital marketing and sales (agency or retail experience preferred)

Strong knowledge of paid advertising platforms (Google, Meta, TikTok)

Comfortable speaking on the phone and closing deals confidently

Experience with CRM tools and lead tracking systems

Ability to manage multiple clients and campaigns simultaneously

Results-driven mindset with a focus on revenue and growth

Key Skills

Sales closing and objection handling

Strong verbal communication and presentation skills

Campaign optimization and performance analysis

Time management and organization

Strategic thinking with a focus on ROI

Performance Expectations

Meet or exceed monthly sales targets

Maintain strong client retention and satisfaction

Deliver measurable improvements in campaign performance

Consistently generate and convert qualified leads

title: Full-Time Video Editor (Short-Form Ads)
description:
Full-Time | Remote (Philippines)



Working Hours:

Monday to Friday, 8:00am–4:00pm Philippines time

(Consistent availability during these hours is essential)



About the Role

We’re looking for a skilled and detail-oriented Video Editor to join our team full-time.



This role is primarily focused on editing short-form video content for digital advertising (social ads, reels, and online campaigns), with some additional support for ad uploads and admin tasks.



You’ll need to be fast, precise, and have a strong eye for clean, engaging content—along with excellent English communication skills to follow instructions and collaborate effectively.



Key Responsibilities



Editing high-quality short-form videos for ads (reels, social, paid campaigns)

Adding captions, formatting, and polishing content for performance

Uploading and managing ads across digital platforms

Following SOPs and creative briefs with accuracy

Communicating clearly in written and spoken English

Identifying and flagging issues early

Maintaining task documentation where required



About You



Excellent spoken and written English (essential)

Strong video editing skills (short-form, fast-paced, ad-style content)

A sharp eye for detail, timing, and clean execution

Able to follow instructions and replicate styles consistently

Reliable and consistently online during 8:00am–4:00pm PH time

Comfortable working independently while staying responsive

Open to feedback and continuous improvement

Stable internet connection and professional home setup

Figma experience is a bonus, but not required



What We Offer



Full-time, ongoing remote role

Stable, set working hours (no night or split shifts)

Clear processes and structured workflows

Fair and reliable payment

Long-term opportunity with a growing brand



Selection Task (Required)

The task will include:



Editing a short-form video ad (trimming, captions, formatting)

Uploading a sample advertisement following instructions

Providing a brief written explanation of steps taken

This task is designed to assess:



Video editing skill and attention to detail

Ability to follow processes

Strength of written and spoken English

title: Appointment Setter SDR
description:
Cold Caller – SDR | Imperon | Remote |

Full Commission  Only Role 

Performance Base



Imperon is a startup AI business. We help service-based businesses automate their calls and bookings using AI. The person we hire works directly with the founder, gets real feedback, We're not a big company. We're building something from the ground up and looking for someone who's okay with that.



Cold Call service businesses, introduce what we do, and book demo appointments. That's it. Demos booked is your #1 metric. You'll hit 100 calls per day on your working days and keep simple notes on who you called and what happened. 



What Makes This Role Easy

You're just asking if they want to see something we already made for their business. People say yes out of curiosity alone.



Who This Is For

This role is for someone who is hungry. Someone who does not need a manager breathing down their neck to show up and perform. Someone who sees no base pay and thinks — good, that means no ceiling either. If you have ever bet on yourself and won, this is your role.

	•	You are self-motivated and do not need hand-holding

	•	You are okay with hearing no 90 times a day and still dialing

	•	You want your income to reflect your results — not a fixed salary

	•	You are coachable

	•	You are hungry to grow into a closer role



Who Is Not a Good Fit

	•	You need a fixed salary

	•	Rejection slows you down or kills your 
ntum

	•	You need someone to check on you to stay consistent

	•	You want stability over opportunity

If that is you — this is not your role and that is completely okay.



What we need from you



Preferred 2 years experience in sales ( not required, if hungry)

Clear spoken English and solid written English — non-negotiable

Coachable — we'll give you a script and feedback, and we need you to actually use it

Comfortable making a lot of calls — rejection is part of the job and you're okay with that

Reliable — show up on your days and do the work

has some experience  with google calendar ,crm ,etc

Cold calling experience is a plus, but we'll train the right person

100 calls per day

Target 30 booked appointments per month

Internet seed 40mbps

backup power supply







Pay & schedule

Commission Only 

$10 Per Booked Appointment 

5% of profit on every deal that closes from your appointments (Standard Deal $1,000)

On Target Earnings 625/month

Pay is on the 1st & 15th every month.

Profit share commission (same-day payout option available)

6 hour shifts

Monday-Thursday,  Saturday 

100% remote  quiet space and good internet required



How to apply

Send a 60-second voice memo introducing yourself, just talk naturally and tell us why you want the role. Include a short note or resume with any relevant experience. YOU WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED UNLESS YOU SEND VIDEO.

title: Sales & Tech Representative
description:
We’re Hiring!



Are you a skilled salesperson with a background in gas plumbing and/or electrical work? Do you enjoy helping customers find the right solution while using your technical knowledge? Join our growing team and work with a US online home goods retailer that values expertise, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.





Position:

Sales & Tech Representative – Technical Products (Gas & Electrical Focus)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday-Friday, 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST (40 hours/week)

Salary: Competitive + Performance Bonuses





About the Role:

As a Salesperson, you will assist customers with product selection, provide technical support during the sales process, and close sales with confidence. You’ll work with gas fireplaces, heaters, stoves, and other appliances, so previous hands-on experience or technical knowledge of gas or electrical systems is a MUST.





Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Help customers choose the right gas or electric heating appliance for their needs

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

Explain technical specifications and installation requirements in simple terms

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them





Requirements:

Sales Experience – 2+ years, preferably with B2C or B2B technical products

Gas Plumbing or Electrical Experience – Formal training or work experience (installer, technician, or similar roles preferred)

Excellent English – Both written and spoken

Confident Communicator – Can explain complex concepts to non-technical customers

Tech-Savvy – Comfortable using CRMs,
 platforms, order tools, etc.

Reliable and Proactive – Takes initiative and works independently

Home Office Setup – Stable internet, noise-free environment, backup power is a plus





Preferred but Not Required:

Knowledge of venting, HVAC, or hearth appliances

US product or code familiarity

Experience in the construction or home improvement industry





Why Join Us?

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping cost. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position





How to Apply:

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph with the subject line: "Sales Pro - [Your Name]"

title: Amazon Listing & AI Integration Specialist
description:
***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***



We are seeking a meticulous, data-driven Amazon Listing Specialist who leverages cutting-edge technology to scale brand performance. The ideal candidate is an expert in the Amazon ecosystem and an early adopter of AI-driven workflows. You will navigate complex technical workflows, manage account health, and use AI to optimize asset management and PDF editing.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Technical Platform & AI Integration

• Create new product listings (ASINs) from scratch in Seller Central while ensuring full data and compliance accuracy.

• Manage bulk data uploads and complex template transformations using flat files.

• Use AI tools to streamline the creation and editing of product documentation and PDF assets, ensuring professional-grade formatting.

• Troubleshoot and resolve complex Parent/Child variation issues to ensure a seamless customer experience.

2. Account Health (AHR) & Crisis Management

• Monitor and maintain the Account Health Rating (AHR) by independently resolving "High Severity" policy violations, such as restricted claims or image issues.

• Diagnose and fix sudden drops in organic ranking or sales using a structured, data-driven approach.

• Swiftly resolve suppressed ASINs to minimize revenue loss.

• Develop an immediate action plan for compliance warnings to protect the store's standing without outside help.

3. Content Optimization & SEO

• Develop sophisticated keyword strategies across Titles, Bullet Points, and Backend Search Terms to maximize visibility.

• Write high-converting copy that balances aggressive SEO with human readability.

• Design and implement A+ Content (Enhanced Brand Content) to drive significant sales lifts.

• Analyze low Conversion Rates (CR) and implement critical content changes to improve performance.

4. Quality Control & Prioritization

• Maintain a meticulous personal checklist to ensure 100?curacy in product data before publishing.

• Manage a high-volume queue, prioritizing tasks such as fixing suppressed ASINs over new listing creation when necessary to protect the bottom line.



Required Qualifications & Skills

• Amazon Expertise: Expert-level proficiency in Amazon Seller Central, inventory flat files, and variation logic.

• AI & Technical Skill: Proven experience using AI tools for content generation and PDF editing/manipulation.

• Policy Knowledge: Deep understanding of Amazon compliance to maintain a strong Account Health Rating.

• Strategic SEO: Advanced knowledge of Amazon’s search algorithm and keyword placement.

• Meticulous Execution: A highly reliable work ethic with a focus on precision to avoid costly data mistakes.



***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***

title: YouTube Thumbnail Designer - FGC Discussion
description:
BROAD SCOPE

 

We are hiring a Thumbnail Designer for a single gig. You will receive a brief with the video topic, title, and thumbnail concept, plus any specific requirements for what should appear in the image. You will design 3 YouTube thumbnails for each video. If a rough cut of the video is available, you will also receive that for additional context. If the work is strong, there may be future gigs.

 

 

OVERVIEW & DETAILS

 

The project is a YouTube channel focused on fighting game content. Videos cover gameplay, character guides, match breakdowns, and community 
nts from fighting games such as Tekken, Street Fighter, Guilty Gear, and similar titles. Thumbnails must grab attention in a crowded YouTube feed and clearly communicate what the video is about.

 

What you will receive:

- A brief with the video topic, title, and thumbnail concept.

- Any specific requirements for what should be included in the thumbnail (if applicable).

- A folder of style references showing the thumbnail look we are targeting.

- Game screenshots, character renders, or other visual assets when available.

- A rough cut of the video when it is ready in time. If the video is not ready, the brief alone is enough to start.

 

You will receive a Google Drive link with the brief, reference folder, and any available assets. All communication will be in written English.

 

 

CORE OBJECTIVES

 

- You are designing YouTube thumbnails for fighting game videos.

- You are delivering 3 finished thumbnails per video.

 

 

EXPANDED OBJECTIVES

 

- Design

    - Match the thumbnail style shown in the reference folder.

    - DO NOT USE AI

    - Follow any specific requirements listed in the brief.

    - Source clean, high-resolution game assets if additional visuals are needed.

    - Measured by: the thumbnail matches the reference style, follows the brief, and clearly communicates the video topic.

 

- Delivery

    - Export each thumbnail as a PNG at 1280 x 720 pixels.

    - Upload finished thumbnails to a shared Google Drive folder.

    - Name each file clearly (for example: video-title_v1.png).

    - Measured by: correct format and size, all thumbnails delivered, files named clearly.

 

 

REQUIREMENTS

 

- Required: You can design thumbnails using any graphic design software (Photoshop, Photopea, Figma, GIMP, Canva, Affinity, or similar).

- Required: You have reliable internet and can upload/download files through Google Drive.

- Ideal: Prior knowledge of fighting games (Tekken, Street Fighter, Guilty Gear, etc.) is not required, but will make this job much easier.

- Ideal: Experience designing thumbnails for YouTube gaming content.

- Ideal: Comfortable cutting out characters cleanly and compositing them with backgrounds and text.

 

 

HOW TO APPLY

 

Here is a Google Drive folder with the sample brief and the reference folder: 

 

Your application:

- Read the sample brief.

- Design one YouTube thumbnail based on the brief.

- Match the style shown in the reference folder.

- Send the finished thumbnail (1280 x 720 pixels, PNG) as an attachment or Google Drive link.

 

 your application to 
 with the subject line: [Thumbnail Designer Gig] Your Name

 

Applications that do not follow every instruction above will not be considered.

 

If your application passes, you will be offered a paid gig to design a full batch of thumbnails for upcoming videos.
