title: Remote Takeoff Estimator/Quality Control Rep-Work From Home (STRUCTURAL)
description:
We are currently looking to add to our growing team. We are a USA-based takeoff & estimating service company. This position is for remote in-house estimators/Quality Control Reps. Please read the job details and respond accordingly to our questions to be considered. Thank you!



We are looking for Immediate Hire:



Position 1: Structural Estimators like wood/Lumber package, steel framing, and metal framing





Job Details-You will be performing takeoffs and some quality control tasks



1. Full-time work available and even over time based on Performance & Quality Of Work-We can offer stable consistent work to the right person (Full Time Preferred)

2. Some training is provided but must have prior experience

3. Must have 5+ Years of experience

4. Must have an engineering or architectural degree or equal estimator experience

5. Must Speak English

6. Must have Planswift Software (No Exception, please don't apply if you don't have this software)

7. Must have good math skills

8. Must be able to work independently in a fast-paced environment

9. Must know how to use Microsoft excel

10. USA takeoff experiences a PLUS but not necessary

11. Must be a team player

12. Must be able to work daytime EST

13. Must be able to work some weekends, depending on workload

14. Must be very responsive

15. Must be reliable and available during your shift.



We have a base starting pay rate per this job post, if you prove your skills we do offer pay raises and bonuses. We also have many management positions to which you can be promoted to.



****To be considered please send the following answered questions****



1. Have you read the job description above thoroughly and can you comply with most requirements?

2. Do you have experience in Lumber Framing and Drywall? This area is particularly busy for us, so any experience would be PLUS. Please elaborate.

3. Tell us about your related experience

4. What is your area of expertise?

5. Why should we hire you?

6. Do you have a home office?

7. How is your internet Speed?

8. How many years of actual takeoff and estimating experience do you have? with US experience?

9. What is your availability and how soon can you start?

Marketing & Design

title: Senior Video Editor with Motion Graphics – Full-Time (Remote) - $1200/mo USD
description:
Senior Video Editor with Motion Graphics - NEED SOMEONE WHO IS FAST – Full-Time (Remote)

$1,200 USD/month | Full-Time | Remote (Philippines Only)



Video editors who are fast and produce high quality edits using shortcuts with Claude Code and other AI applications will be prioritized. Must be capable of editing 4K videos - meaning you must have a powerful computer with high processing power.



Are you a world-class video editor with a sharp eye for detail, a love for storytelling, and serious motion graphics skills?



We’re a fast-growing U.S.-based digital marketing agency looking for a Senior-Level Video Editor to create scroll-stopping, high-converting video ads for YouTube,
, Instagram, and TikTok.



If you live and breathe editing—and your timelines are packed with kinetic typography, fast-paced transitions, and punchy cuts that keep people watching—you might be who we’re looking for.



What You’ll Be Doing

Editing direct-response ad creatives that drive conversions, not just views



Adding motion graphics, kinetic text, transitions, and sound design to hook attention



Storyboarding or interpreting creative briefs into ad sequences



Repurposing long-form videos into engaging short-form edits



Collaborating with creative strategists and project managers



Continuously improving your edits based on performance data



Must-Have Skills

Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects



Proven experience with motion graphics, animated text, product highlights, and story-driven edits



Familiar with editing styles for ads, influencers, and DTC brands



Strong understanding of pacing, storytelling, and emotional triggers



Attention to detail and ability to work fast without sacrificing quality



Excellent spoken and written English



Bonus Points If You Have

Experience editing for high-ticket offers or service-based businesses



Knowledge of ad platforms 
, TikTok, YouTube) and what makes videos convert



Skills in color grading, audio mixing, and sound effects



What’s In It for You?

$1,200 USD/month paid on time, every month



Flexible schedule – we care about output, not hours



Huge room for growth in a high-performance creative team



Direct feedback and collaboration with performance marketers



Stable, long-term role (we’re not looking for freelancers—we want a partner)



How to Apply

If this sounds like your dream role, send us the following:



Your best 3–5 video ad samples (not YouTube vlogs, but ads with hooks and motion graphics)



A short note explaining why you're a good fit



Your CV or a link to your portfolio



Apply now and show us what you’ve got. We're excited to see how you bring stories to life through powerful edits.

title: Custom Cabinet Designer
description:
We ae looking Rockstar Virtual Cabinet Designer to join our Custom Cabinet Company.



We welcome any questions you may have about the position or our team.



Candidate should have a strong background in cabinet deign, interior design or architecture. Experience with custom cabinet design software preferred. Our company uses Mozaik design software. While experience with Mozaik is preferred, we are willing to train the right candidate.  Please list any previous design software experience.

Candidate should also have a strong knowledge of Microsoft Office, Excel, and Adobe.  



Position Overview



Your role will be to help the sales and design staff create cabinet drawings for kitchen and bath cabinetry along with desks, wall units, media centers and other cabinetry projects. Candidate may also have
 interaction with customers when revising drawings per customer request.





Qualities needed



There are three qualities that we are looking for:



Integrity, Commitment and Desire to Learn.





+Integrity: You are a good fit if you can be honest with your tea
mbers. Open communication and honesty are paramount to the team and to me. If you can’t hit a deadline or made a mistake, be upfront about it, we are all human after all.



+Commitment: We are looking for someone who is looking for a long-term relationship with the expectations that this will be a long term, full-time position. If you were just looking for a few months of work, then this job is not for you.





+Desire to Learn: We are a small team but growing fast. We want people who are open to learning new skills and taking on new projects. If you’re not excited about improving your skills and trying other things and this is not for you.





If this sounds like you, please apply below and I will personally read your application and answer any questions you may have (seriously the more questions the better!) Thank you for your time!



Dave

title: In house Video Editor
description:
JOB OVERVIEW



Hello! I run a real estate media business in Southwest Florida and I’m looking to bring our video editing in-house. There are plenty of “big box” editors out there, but since they all have giant teams you never know what you’re going to get back each time. I want to bring on someone who can be a true part of our team and work with us to create a consistent, premium look across all of our videos.



We specialize in high-end real estate media and aim to produce some of the highest quality content in our market. I’d love to find someone who can come in confidently, offer suggestions, stay on top of current trends, and even give input on where we can improve on our side of filming as well. We are a team here and want someone who feels like an equal part of the crew. Strong English communication and attention to detail are very important in this role.



Proficiency in Final Cut Pro is preferred, but not required. We’re also open to DaVinci Resolve or Adobe Premiere Pro if that’s what you use. We also create agent on-camera videos and talking head style content, so experience with that type of editing is a plus.



Looking for someone who is familiar with:

    •    Current real estate video editing trends

    •    Cinematic color grading

    •    Creative transitions / masking transitions

    •    Higgsfield AI or similar tools for effects such as day-to-night, virtual staging, or other tasteful enhancements

    •    Understanding sound design

    •    Premium captions / text animations

    •    Editing both property tour videos and agent-led videos



We are looking to onboard someone fairly soon in preparation for the busier season coming up.



A test edit will be required with your application. We will provide RAW files from a recent shoot so you can show us your style and ability. There will be opportunities for day-to-night transitions, door openings, and other creative edits. You do not need to put together a full-length video. Something around 30–45 seconds is totally fine, as long as it gives us a strong feel for your color grading, music selection, sound design, and most importantly your creativity.



Instructions for the test video:

    •    Cinematic look and feel

    •    Color grading is a priority

    •    Okay to have deeper shadows for a more moody feel if it works

    •    At least one day-to-sunset transition

    •    At least one door opening

    •    Use as many or as few clips as needed to create something strong



Please also add 3D text for at least one key point of speaking, only 1x agent on camera necessary for test and please zoom in and out and track the agents face.



We strive to stay on top of current trends and keep innovating so we can put out the best possible product for our clients. Video is a big part of what drives new business for us, so this role matters.



Looking for someone with full-time availability. I look forward to speaking with you.



RAW Video Files





Please do not apply unless capable of sending this text edit. Thanks very much :D

title: Virtual Assistant – Property Management (Full-Time)
description:
Job Title: Virtual Assistant – Property Management (Full-Time)



Job Overview

Temecula Valley Property Management is a growing property management company based in Southern California. We help local landlords and investors take the stress out of managing their rental properties. We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to join our team full-time and support our day-to-day operations as we scale.

This is a long-term role with room to grow. If you're organized, a strong communicator, and take pride in your work — we want to hear from you.



What You'll Be Doing



Communicating with tenants and property owners via
 and phone (written communication primarily)

Following up on leads and reaching out to prospective property owner clients

Researching and identifying potential landlord leads using tools like PropStream, Zillow, and public records

Managing and organizing data in spreadsheets and CRM tools

Drafting
s, templates, and basic documents

Handling scheduling, reminders, and general admin support

Assisting with social media posting and online presence tasks as needed





What We're Looking For



Excellent written English — clear, professional, and friendly

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Experience as a VA, preferably in real estate or property management

Comfortable with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Gmail, Calendar)

Self-starter who can follow systems and work independently

Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace

Available to work during US Pacific Time business hours (or significant overlap)



Nice to Have



Familiarity with property management software (AppFolio, Buildium, etc.)

Experience with CRM tools or lead tracking

Background in real estate, rental, or leasing industries





Compensation & Details



Full-time: 40 hours/week

Salary: $5/hr

Long-term position — we're not looking for a temp

US-based holidays observed

Opportunity to grow with the company





How to Apply

To be considered, please do the following in your application:



Start your message with the phrase "I'm your next VA"

Tell us about any experience you have in real estate, rentals, or property management

Include your resume or a link to your OnlineJobs profile



Applications that do not follow the instructions above will not be reviewed.

title: Instagram/Youtube Video Editor
description:
I am a nutrition/fitness/food content creator looking for another 1-2 skilled and reliable video editors to join my team. If you have graphic design experience/abilities as well, that’s great. My Instagram accounts 
 
 (Check them out so you have an idea of my videos).



Key roles

- Edit multiple Instagram reels weekly w/ thumbnails. These usually range from 5-60 seconds. I will pay you $4 per reel w/ thumbnail. You can edit as many or as few as you prefer.

- You will need experience editing YouTube videos for the future. I pay more for these, but have not assigned them yet. Right now, I am primarily focused on short form content for the next few months.



Requirements

- Reliable internet w/ computer access.

- Reliable, hard working person w/ good communication: responding to
s/messages within 24 hours during the week.

- Experienced w/ common editing softwares/apps/AI.

- Understanding of engaging, viral, and storytelling content. (Look at these IG 
 

- Speaks English well. I send instructions via Loom videos.



I expect my editors to edit with any advanced technique necessary. Some of my videos are simpler and some are more complex, but be prepared for anything.



Benefits

- Clear systems: If you get hired, there are clear instructions for expectations and work flow while allowing for creative freedom.

- Growth opportunities: I have experience working with plenty of other editors for many years. If you do good work on time, are constantly improving, and your videos go viral often, I will increase your pay in the future. However, the pay is non-negotiable at first because that would be unfair to my current editors.

- Education: I periodically send out creators to study to all my editors so they can get better.

- Reliable and flexible work: You will have work every single week and you can take on as many or as few videos as you prefer every week (minimum: 2 videos per week).

- Reliable pay and job security: I always pay my editors on time once the final draft of videos are completed. I pay through Wise and you will never lose your job so long as you continue to meet expectations.

- Easy boss: I am easy to work with and communicate with. If you need a vacation or need to communicate anything, just let me know ahead of time.



Only apply if you are highly skilled and reliable. You should be reliable enough to meet reasonable deadlines. Vacations and emergencies are ok, but I will not allow them constantly especially at first.



If I think you might be a good match, I will
 you back with a test project after you apply. I expect the first draft to be completed within 24-72 hours. After that, we will go over a few sets of revisions. You’re welcome to ask as many questions throughout as needed.



After your revisions, I will determine if your test project meets publishing standards. If it does, I will pay you for the test project and likely hire you onto my team.



There will be a lot of people applying, so be patient yet ready for a potential response. It might take me a few weeks or more to look through all applications.



To apply, send me an
 
 that includes the word “FitFoodie” in the subject line so I know you read everything. In the
, include any portfolio of your work editing Instagram reels and YouTube videos. You can optionally attach a resume as well. Feel free to type me a short message of anything else you’d like me to know about you.

title: Assistant Accountant (Hybrid, Full-Time)
description:
Assistant Accountant

Offshore X | Supporting Australian Client | Full-time

Offshore X is an Australian-backed business providing high-quality offshore professional services to Australian companies. We are currently seeking a Senior Bookkeeper to support a WA-based client, working directly with an experienced Partner.



Responsibilities

- Support half-year and full-year reporting in compliance with ASX and Corporations Act requirements

- Reconcile bank accounts, general ledger accounts, and supplier/customer balances

- Maintain and update the fixed asset register and depreciation schedules

- Assist with statutory reporting, including BAS, GST, and tax compliance

- Support the external audit process by preparing audit schedules and documentation

- Assist in cash flow reporting and forecasting

- Ensure compliance with AASB (Australian Accounting Standards Board) standards

- Assist in preparing board and management reports

- Assist in the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports

- Support continuous improvement of financial processes and internal controls

 



Qualifications and skills

- Bachelor’s degree in accounting, Finance, or a related discipline.

- CA/CPA qualification is desired.

- 3+ years of professional experience in accounting, preferably with exposure to international entities and exploration companies.

- Strong technical knowledge of IFRS, AASB, and financial reporting requirements.

- Proficiency in accounting software, particularly Xero and MYOB.

- Familiarity with exploration company compliance, including ASX-listed reporting obligations.

- Excellent communication skills and the ability to manage stakeholders across multiple time zones.

- Proficiency with Microsoft software suite

 



Personal Attributes

- Detail-oriented with exceptional analytical skills.

- Proactive and adaptable with a solution-focused mindset.

- Strong organizational abilities to manage competing deadlines effectively.

- Collaborative team player with the ability to work independently in a remote and international setting.



Why Join Offshore X?

- Work directly with Australian clients and experienced legal professionals

- Exposure to high-quality corporate and transactional work

- Supportive team environment with strong systems and processes

- Long-term role with an established business

- Clear opportunity for development and progression



Note: Hybrid to Bocaue, Bulacan.

Budget: 45,000 PHP - 65,000 PHP

title: Cold Caller and Account Manager (Hourly + Bonus)
description:
Job Overview:



Archie’s Hot Dog Island is hiring a cold caller to make outbound calls to local businesses, have brief conversations with decision makers about our beverage services, and acquire new accounts. This is a long term, part time position, expected to maintain relationships with acquired accounts to encourage repeat orders.





Responsibilities:



- Call leads provided and follow the provided script toward securing orders

- Follow up with leads via phone and
 to increase conversion rates

- Keep track of the status of leads in software provided

- Learn the business quickly so you can confidently speak to prospects and perform at a high level

- Maintain relationships with company contacts to keep service orders coming in



Requirements:



- Strong communication and sales skills

- 2+ years of experience in cold calling, lead generation, sales, or marketing

- Proven track record of success setting appointments

- Ability to understand and articulate value proposition for the businesses

- Stable, reliable internet connection is required

- Advanced fluency in English is required

- Experience in the food and beverage industry is a plus

- Availability to work Mon through Fri between 9 am and 5 pm Central Time (CST)



Compensation:



- $4 per hour + $25 per new account that places an initial order

- Additional bonuses may be offered for recurring orders



How to Apply:



- Submit an updated resume for review. 

- Type “CALLER” at the top of your application



Note: Applications without a resume will not be considered. Applicants who do not follow instructions will not be considered.



References:

We conduct reference checks with past employers, so strong, verifiable references are required for this position.

title: Social Media Manager - Virtual Assistant
description:
Social Media Growth Manager (Fashion & E-Commerce) – Virtual



Company: ICAN Clothes

Location: Remote / Virtual Assistant

Employment Type: Contract / Remote

Compensation: $820.00 – $1,000 per month depending on experience



About ICAN Clothes



ICAN Clothes is a purpose-driven fashion brand that promotes confidence, identity, and empowerment through fashion. Our brand combines meaningful storytelling with modern fashion design to inspire youth and communities.



We are seeking a high-level Social Media Growth Manager who understands fashion marketing, Instagram growth, and e-commerce conversion strategies.



We want someone to do Social Media, posting on  IG/FB/TIKTOK.  We need someone to post for Personal stuff as well.  We need someone to post for ican kids network, on FB/IG/TIKTOK.  We need someone to monetize ican kids youtube for the ican kids network and post videos  for the youtube page.  



This position is ideal for someone who has previously managed fashion/brands or retail social media accounts and understands how to turn engagement into product sales.



This is not an entry-level position.



Position Overview



The Social Media Growth Manager will be responsible for managing and growing our social media presence across Instagram and
, with a focus on driving engagement, building organic followers, and increasing traffic to our Shopify store.



This role includes daily posting, content editing, audience engagement, and campaign-based marketing.



Key Responsibilities



Social Media Management

Manage and maintain Instagram and
 social media accounts

Publish daily posts including photos, reels, and promotional content

Schedule content using a structured content calendar

Write engaging captions and optimize hashtags

Content Editing

Edit Instagram Reels and short-form video content

Resize and format graphics for Instagram and

Repurpose existing brand content into engaging social posts

Maintain brand consistency across all social platforms

Engagement & Organic Growth

Engage with fashion and lifestyle community accounts daily

Respond to comments and messages

Like and comment on relevant content to increase brand visibility

Implement organic audience growth strategies

Campaign Marketing

Support campaign-based marketing tied to product launches

Create engaging posts that connect directly to Shopify product pages

Promote brand storytelling through creative content

SEO & Performance Monitoring

Research trending hashtags and social media keywords

Monitor engagement analytics and post performance

Provide weekly performance updates and growth insights

Required Experience



Applicants must have previous experience managing social media accounts for fashion, clothing, or retail brands.



Required skills include:

Instagram and
 growth strategies

Social media campaign planning

Reel editing and short-form video creation

Canva, Adobe, or equivalent design tools

Understanding of e-commerce marketing and Shopify traffic generation

Analytics tracking and engagement monitoring

Portfolio Requirement (Mandatory)



To be considered for this position, applicants must provide:

Links to at least three fashion or retail social media accounts you have managed

Screenshots showing engagement growth or analytics results

Three reels or short-form videos you have edited

Applications submitted without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



Desired Qualities



We are looking for someone who is:

Creative and fashion-aware

Organized and detail-oriented

Proactive about engagement strategies

Experienced in growing organic audiences

Comfortable working independently in a remote environment

Work Schedule



Remote / Virtual Assistant position.

Daily engagement and posting are required.



Compensation



8$ per hour.



How to Apply



To confirm you read this entire job description, start your application with the word "ICAN."



Please include:

Your portfolio

Links to accounts you have managed

A short explanation of your strategy for growing a fashion brand on Instagram

Important Note



We are specifically looking for applicants with experience in fashion or retail social media marketing.

Applicants without relevant experience may not be considered.

title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
We are a *UK based company* expanding our sales team and hiring *100 Filipino cold callers this week* to call the US market.



*Compensation:* 100% commission-based independent contractor role. No base salary or hourly rate.

*Target Earnings We Train You To Hit:*

- *Week 1-4: $500+ USD per week*

- *Week 5-8: $1,000+ USD per week*

- *Week 9+: $1,500+ USD per week*



_Earnings are uncapped and based purely on performance. Individual results vary based on effort, skill, and hours on dialer. These are targets, not guarantees. You must work hard and follow the coaching guidelines to achieve these targets 



*Payment Schedule:* Weekly payouts via Wise. Commissions earned Mon-Sun are paid every Friday.



*What You’ll Be Doing:*

Cold calling US business owners to invite them first to a FREE event in their area to join the local Start Over Movement business chapter - which will bring them referral leads, sales and marketing strategies from the world leaders in creating marketing and sales strategies



*Shift Available - Mississippi Time (US Central Time):*

*9:00 AM – 7:00 PM Mississippi Time*, Monday to Friday

Fixed weekends off.



_Note: Mississippi Time = US Central Time. This is 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM US Eastern. Day shift only._



*We Provide Everything You Need to Succeed:*

1. *Leads + Auto-Dialer* - No lead buying, no costs to you

2. *Proven Script + 2-Hour Training* - Start dialing day 1

3. *Weekly Payouts via Wise* - Track your commissions daily, paid weekly

4. *Live Sales Manager Support* on every shift

5. *Independent Contractor Agreement* - Clear terms, no hidden fees



*Requirements to Apply:*

1. Fluent spoken English with clear/neutral accent

2. Sales/BPO/cold calling experience preferred but NOT required if you’re coachable

3. Your own PC or laptop + noise-cancelling headset + stable 10mbps+ internet

4. Quiet work-from-home setup and able to work 9AM-7PM Mississippi Time

5. Available to start training THIS WEEK



*This Role Is NOT For You If:*

- You require a guaranteed base salary or hourly pay

- You are not comfortable with rejection or a sales environment

- You cannot commit to full-time US day hours



*How to Apply - Book Your Spot Now:*

*Do NOT send your resume.*



*Step 1:* Click here to join our group orientation Zoom:  







Next session: Today at,, Manila Time[ 19:00]



*Step 2:* Show up on time with camera on. We hire directly from the Zoom call. Pass the mock call = start tomorrow.





We are filling 100 seats and will close applications once filled. Hiring decisions made same day.





*Important Disclosure:* This is an independent contractor position with a UK company, not employment. You are responsible for your own taxes, internet, and equipment. No benefits, 13th month, or government contributions are provided. No fees will ever be charged to apply or work. By applying you confirm you understand this is 100% performance-based pay.

title: Accounting Assistant (AR/AP & Operations Support)
description:
About the Role



We’re looking for a detail-driven Remote Accounting Assistant to support a growing accounting function within a fast-paced interior design and construction firm.



In this role, you’ll work closely with the Accounting Lead, helping manage essential day-to-day financial tasks—freeing them up to focus on higher-level strategy, systems, and process improvements.



This is a part-time, fully remote position with strong potential to grow as the business evolves.



What You’ll Be Doing



Accounts Receivable (AR)



- Assist with billing, proposals, and invoice generation (House Pro, QuickBooks)

- Track incoming payments and follow up on outstanding invoices

- Maintain accurate AR records and assist with reconciliations



Accounts Payable (AP)



- Process and code vendor invoices

- Support AP tracking, documentation, and reconciliations

- Monitor payment timelines and status updates



Accounting & Operations Support



- Assist in full-cycle accounting tasks under supervision

- Maintain and update spreadsheets, trackers, and financial records

-Organize documents across systems (House Pro, QuickBooks, internal tools)



Process Documentation



- Create and maintain SOPs for recurring workflows

- Turn training sessions into clear, step-by-step documentation



Communication & Coordination



- Provide updates via Slack,
, and Zoom

- Flag issues, track progress, and collaborate on priorities

- Participate in regular check-ins to ensure accuracy and alignment



What We’re Looking For (Must-Haves)



- Solid experience in Accounts Receivable, Accounts Payable, or bookkeeping

- Strong attention to detail and accuracy

- Experience with QuickBooks (or similar accounting software)

- Excellent written English communication skills

- Ability to multitask and handle shifting priorities

- Highly organized and comfortable managing multiple trackers and systems

- Reliable, proactive, and responsive in a remote work environment



Nice to Have (Bonus Points)



- Experience with House Pro or similar tools

- Background in construction, interior design, or project-based businesses

- Experience creating SOPs or process documentation

- Strong client-facing communication skills

- Comfortable learning new tools and navigating system transitions

title: Claude AI App Builder / AI Specialist
description:

This role is for someone who knows how to use AI tools efficiently to turn ideas into real results. You should be comfortable helping create apps, improving AI-generated work, refining code and prompts, solving problems, and making projects cleaner, smarter, and more useful.



We want someone who is not just familiar with AI, but someone who knows how to work fast, think clearly, and improve output until it is high quality.

Use Claude AI to help build, improve, and polish apps

Refine prompts and instructions to get better AI results

Improve AI-generated code, content, and workflows

Help turn rough ideas into working tools, systems, or products

Review outputs for quality, logic, structure, and usability

Assist with a variety of AI-related tasks across projects

Find faster, smarter ways to complete work using AI tools

Help improve overall efficiency in app building and AI workflows

Requirements:



Strong experience using Claude AI

Ability to build or improve apps and software with AI assistance

Strong problem-solving skills

Good understanding of prompts, workflows, and AI output quality

Detail-oriented, efficient, and dependable

Good written English and communication

Nice to Have:

Experience with app development, coding, automation, or product building

Strong general understanding of AI tools and practical business use cases

What We’re Looking For:



Someone efficient

Someone resourceful

Someone who can build, fix, improve, and polish

Someone who can help make ideas actually work

To Apply:

title: Fashion Editor (Luxury & Korean Trends) | 13th Month | Paid Vacation Days
description:
A leading U.S.-based lifestyle and shopping platform for Korean-American women is seeking a Fashion Editor with exceptional taste and a refined understanding of luxury and trend-forward fashion.



Our platform showcases curated fashion, beauty, and lifestyle selections that inspire a sophisticated, global audience.

You will be responsible for selecting, curating, and writing about products that resonate with our readers — from trending K-style pieces to iconic luxury brands.





Responsibilities

• Curate and select fashion products from luxury and trending brands

• Write short, engaging posts that highlight what’s stylish and relevant

• Research and analyze current fashion and beauty trends

• Collaborate with the content and design team to create visually appealing posts

• Help define the brand’s fashion and lifestyle editorial voice for our growing audience





Qualifications

• Strong sense of fashion, trends, and aesthetics

• Familiarity with top global and Korean-favorite brands (Chanel, Dior, Loewe, Prada, etc.)

• Experience in fashion writing, editing, styling, or merchandising preferred

• Fashion or Design degree a plus (not required if you have strong experience or taste)

• Excellent written English and ability to write concise, engaging copy

• Basic understanding of online publishing or CMS platforms

• Photoshop, Canva, or image editing skills a plus





Hours of Work, Pay, and Employee Benefits

• Competitive pay based on experience and performance

• Bi-weekly pay via bank transfer

• Performance-based bonuses

• 13th Month Pay

• 12 Paid Vacation Days per year starting Month 7

• 5 Paid Sick Days per year

• Company-paid SSS Contribution starting Month 7





How to Apply



Please send an
 to 
 with the subject line: “[Your Full Name] – Fashion Editor Applicant”



Include your resume and answers to the questions below. Applications without completed questions will not be considered.



Application Questions

 1. Have you worked as a Fashion Editor, Writer, or Stylist before?

 2. How many hours per week can you work from Monday to Friday? (minimum and maximum)

 3. Can you work during U.S. business hours (EST)?

 4. Please describe your computer setup, internet speed, and headset (if applicable).

 5. Please provide a copy of your resume.

 6. Describe your personal fashion taste — what brands or styles do you love most and why?

 7. What are your short- and long-term career goals?

 8. What is your expected monthly salary?



Thank you for your time and interest. We look forward to reviewing your application and connecting with talented editors who share our passion for fashion, luxury, and lifestyle excellence.

title: Online Deal Researcher & Content Uploader Full-Time | Remote | 13th Month | Paid Vacation | Long-Term Role
description:
We are a leading U.S.-based lifestyle and shopping platform serving a large Asian-American audience. Our company is rapidly expanding, and we are building a top-tier team of E-Commerce Deal Researchers who will help millions of shoppers discover the best deals every day.



We are looking for smart, detail-oriented people who love online shopping, researching products, and finding great prices. If you’ve worked with Amazon sellers, online arbitrage, product sourcing, or e-commerce research, this role will feel natural to you.



This is a long-term, stable role with growth, bonuses, and an amazing team culture.





What You Will Do

• Search major online retailers (Amazon, Walmart, Target, Best Buy, Costco, etc.)

• Identify the best deals, trending items, and lowest-priced products

• Compare prices using simple tools (Keepa, Amazon price history, etc. — training provided)

• Upload deals into our custom CMS (simple workflow, not WordPress)

• Write short, clear English descriptions for each deal

• Track fast-moving deals and limited-time offers

• Follow daily content schedules and coordinate with our editorial team

• Help our audience save money by selecting only high-value deals





Ideal Candidate

• Experience with Amazon product research, online arbitrage, VA product sourcing, or e-commerce research

• Fast and accurate researcher

• Excellent English reading and writing skills

• Can spot good prices, high-demand items, and “hidden gem” deals

• Strong attention to detail

• Reliable, disciplined, and able to follow SOPs

• Stable internet and working computer

• Comfortable working at a fast pace during sales seasons (Prime Day, Black Friday)





Hours, Pay & Benefits

• Full-time — 40 hours/week, Monday–Friday

• Must be available during US Eastern Standard Time (EST)

• Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

• 13th month pay

• Paid vacation days

• Performance bonuses

• Long-term, stable employment with opportunities to advance

• Supportive, positive, fast-growing team





How to Apply



 your application to: 
 : Subject line: “[Your Full Name] – E-Commerce Deal Researcher Applicant”



Please include:

• Your resume

• Your answers to the questions below



Application Questions (Required)

 1. Do you have experience in Amazon product research, online arbitrage, or deal finding?

 2. How many hours per week can you work (minimum & maximum)?

 3. Can you work full U.S. EST hours?

 4. Describe your computer, internet speed, and headset.

 5. Please provide a sample of your past work.

 6. Why do you think you would succeed in this role?

 7. What is your expected monthly salary (PHP)?

title: Hiring Talent: SEO Content Writer | Remote | 13th Month | Paid Vacation | Long-Term Role
description:
We are a fast-growing U.S.-based lifestyle platform serving a large Korean-American audience. Our mission is to provide high-quality guides, helpful resources, and smart recommendations for families living in the United States. As our company expands, we are looking for a skilled SEO Content Writer who can write clear, engaging, well-researched articles that inform, inspire, and rank well on Google.



You must understand how SEO works, how to structure articles for readability, and how to produce content that feels helpful and natural - never robotic. This is a stable, long-term role with opportunities for growth, bonuses, and a collaborative, supportive team.





What You Will Do

• Write high-quality lifestyle, shopping, and evergreen guide articles

• Apply SEO best practices (headings, formatting, keywords, search intent)

• Research topics using Google, Reddit, YouTube, and competitor sites

• Create clean, well-structured content using our template & SOPs

• Follow brand tone, formatting rules, and mobile-friendly writing style

• Collaborate with our U.S. and Korean editorial teams

• Ensure articles are clear, factual, and genuinely useful for readers



Ideal Candidate

• Strong writing and editing skills in English

• Experience with SEO writing, blogging, editorial work, or content creation

• Understands keyword intent, H1/H2 structure, and clean formatting

• Knows how to write articles that feel natural (not AI-sounding)

• Excellent researcher — can verify facts and compare sources

• Detail-oriented with strong grammar and organization

• Follows instructions and can work under deadlines

• Stable internet and a reliable computer

• Willing to learn our SOPs and improve continuously

• Bonus points if you: Have Wordpress experience



Hours, Compensation & Benefits

• Full-time — 40 hours/week

• Must be available during U.S. Eastern Standard Time (EST)

• Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

• 13th month pay

• Paid vacation days

• Performance-based bonuses

• Long-term, stable employment

• Supportive, positive team with clear processes



How to Apply

 your application and resume to: 
 with subject line: “[Your Full Name] – SEO Content Writer Applicant”



Required Application Questions. Please answer all of the following:

title: Quality Assurance Technician (Bug Fixer)
description:
Quality Assurance Technician (The Bug Smasher)

About Cynergists: We provide high-performance AI Agents designed to empower businesses to automate workflows, maximize productivity, and unlock limitless growth. We don’t just fill seats; we deploy operations. Having recently moved beyond traditional software limitations to a custom Node.js, Railway, and Vercel infrastructure, Cynergists is defining the future of intelligent automation.

The Role: We are looking for a hungry, tech-curious, and relentless Full-Stack Developer to join our team as a "Bug Smasher." Your primary goal is simple: find the cracks in our code and reinforce them. With our full Cynergists AI platform we need an individual who finds genuine satisfaction in system stability, edge-case hunting, and technical hardening. You aren't here to build from scratch; you are here to ensure the Cynergists AI platform is unbreakable.

Key Responsibilities:

Search and Destroy: Proactively identify, reproduce, and crush bugs within the CRM core and Agent-to-Agent communication layers.

System Hardening: * Audit and refine Node.js logic across the ecosystem.

Optimize Supabase RLS policies and database architecture.

Deploy and manage Supabase Edge Functions to ensure serverless logic is executed with zero lag.

API Mastery: Deep-dive into API Integrations and Endpoints. You will be responsible for ensuring the handshakes between our agents and third-party tools (Twilio, Resend, LiveKit) are seamless and error-free.

Infrastructure Optimization: Work within Railway and Vercel to monitor system health. If an agent hits a bottleneck, you dive into the code forensics to clear the path.

Market Feedback: Identify recurring technical friction points and relay them to the lead developers (Chris, Jonas, and Jin) to help us harden the next generation of agents.

What We Are Looking For:

The "Hardener" Mindset: You value stability over novelty. You take pride in a clean, error-free console and a 99.9% uptime report.

Technical Proficiency: Deep knowledge of Node.js and Supabase is essential. You must be comfortable working with API Endpoints and writing/debugging Edge Functions.

Problem-Solving Skills: You need to be able to look at a complex workflow and immediately identify where the data-flow might break.

Coachability: We value the ability to learn and adapt quickly. You must be willing to align with our specific architectural standards.

Communication: Clear, direct communication is non-negotiable. We are in a high-velocity launch window; we need clarity, not fluff.

Why Join Cynergists?

Elite Tech Stack: Work on a custom-built, high-velocity infrastructure—no low-code ceilings here.

High Impact: You are the final line of defense for the Cynergists AI ecosystem launching to a global market.

Sell the Future: You aren't maintaining outdated services; you are hardening the most in-demand technology in the world.

Remote Freedom: Work from anywhere with a supportive, innovative team.

To Apply: If you are ready to pivot your career into the world of high-performance Artificial Intelligence, submit your resume to 
 your cover letter, tell us about the most complex API integration or bug you’ve ever mastered.

title: Video Editor for E-Commerce Product Ads (AI-Generated Content)
description:
We're a growing e-commerce brand looking for a skilled video editor to assemble short-form video ads (1-3 minutes, maybe sometimes 3-5 min) for
/Instagram.



What makes this role unique: You won't need to shoot anything. All raw material — AI-generated video clips, B-roll footage and product shots — will be provided to you in an organized Google Drive folder. Scripts and voiceover text will also be provided.



Your job:

• Assemble provided video clips into polished, scroll-stopping ads

• Add clean subtitles/captions (word-by-word style, bold, readable)

• Sync clips to voiceover/narration timing

• Basic transitions between clips

• etc...



What we're looking for:

• Experience editing short-form video ads 
, Instagram)

• Proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar

• Clean subtitle/caption styling (not generic auto-captions)

• Fast turnaround — we'll be testing many ad variations

• Good eye for pacing, cuts, and keeping viewer attention

• Reliable communication!



Nice to have (not required):

• Experience with e-commerce/DTC brand ads

• Understanding of direct response ad structure (hook ? story ? CTA)

• Basic motion graphics (simple overlays, zoom effects)



This starts as a part-time role at 10-15 hours/week while we test fit and workflow. But here's the thing — once everything clicks, we're ready to scale hard. We have the systems to produce a high volume of ad variations, and we need an editor who can grow with us. If you're fast, reliable, and deliver clean work, this can quickly become 30-40+ hours/week. The more you can handle, the more we'll send your way.

title: High Performance Direct Response Video Editor
description:
We’re an employee-owned, vertically-integrated company operating in the pet space.

mbers across Europe and worldwide, we specialize in direct-response marketing, creating high-converting ads and VSLs that generate 7+ figures annually.



We prioritize quality, responsiveness, and velocity—delivering creative that doesn’t just look good but drives conversions.

We need an extra-talented video editor who understands both direct response marketing and high-impact storytelling. 



You will be responsible for editing short and long-form video content, crafting compelling motion graphics, and structuring edits that maximize engagement, retention, and conversion rates.

- Deep understanding of platform-specific ad formats (FB, IG, YouTube).

- Works fast, meets deadlines, and thrives in a high-performance team.

Why Join Us?



- Work on high-budget ad campaigns that generate real results.

- Remote-first—work from anywhere, collaborate with top-tier talent worldwide.

description:
Harlem Brands, Inc.  the parent company of Harlem Candle Co. and Harlem Perfume Co. — is looking for a driven, detail-oriented Executive Assistant who can also help as a Sales Professional to help grow our retail footprint across the US. This role is at the heart of getting our luxury fragrance and candle collections into the hands of boutique owners, specialty retailers, and lifestyle stores nationwide.



EXECUTIVE SUPPORT:

* Draft and send outreach
s, follow-ups, and pitch communications

WHO YOU ARE:

title: Deal Analyst — Private Equity Acquisition Firm
description:
Veyron Equity Partners is a U.S.-based private equity firm specializing in the acquisition and operation of small to lower middle market businesses generating $40K–$2M in annual seller’s discretionary earnings. We move fast, operate lean, and build long-term enterprise value through disciplined ownership.



We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Deal Analyst to support our acquisition pipeline. This is a full-time remote role. You will be our eyes and ears in the market — sourcing, filtering, and presenting qualified business acquisition targets to our Sr. Managing Partner daily.



Responsibilities

 • Search and monitor BizBuySell, Quiet Light, Empire Flippers, Bizquest, and Flippa daily

 • Flag time-sensitive opportunities immediately

title: H&P Documentation Specialist
description:
About the company:



Comprehensive Rehab Consultants focuses on partnering with skilled nursing facilities to meet their individual needs. We are passionate about healthcare technology, innovation, and delivery. CRC is widely considered as visionaries in the post-acute space, designing new care models to improve efficiency, decrease hospitalizations, and improve clinical outcomes.



About the role:



We’re looking for a detail-oriented Registered Nurse to join our growing H&P Documentation Prep Team. As an H&P Documentation Specialist, you’ll work closely with our Project Manager and partner clinicians/providers to successfully create summarized H&P notes for our clinicians/providers.   You will have a critical role in optimizing the clinician’s workflow, allowing the provider/clinician to spend less time synthesizing patient charts and more time on patient care. 



Responsibilities:



•Transfer and summarize medical reports, and documents of newly admitted residents into our standardized H&P format.

•Provide online copies of summarized H&P notes to clinicians/providers for review, making corrections or changes as noted.

•Maintain high standards for proper grammar, spelling, and sentence structure as well as medical terminology and abbreviations.

•Collaborate with the Project Manager and partner clinicians to identify and implement workflow improvements for the H&P Prep notes process.

•Maintain strict adherence to patient confidentiality and HIPAA in accordance with   clinical standards and government regulations.

•Take ownership  for updating Internal Wiki, H&P FAQs and standardized team workflow

• Regular attendance at H&P progra
etings

• Assist with note assignment to RN team

• Review incoming
s to the H&P listserve and respond timely to all queries. Prioritize and bump
s requiring manager follow up.  



Qualifications and Necessary Skills:



•Current state/country license as a Registered Nurse.

•At least 2-3 years of experience in hospital or other health care settings.

Prior experience in clinical documentation, scribing, or utilization review is a plus.

•Familiarity and proficiency with EHRs and use of Google Suite.

•Strong critical thinking skills

•Excellent written and verbal communication skills

•Ability to work quickly/efficiently in a remote and fast-paced environment where new protocols are being improved and implemented.

•Openness to feedback as a tool for growth and proactive troubleshooting. 

•Able to type 40 WPM

•Attention to detail recognizing the impact on patient safety and provider trust.



Salary and Schedule:



•Salary: USD 1,200.00 per month

•Night shift Philippines Time, Monday - Friday for 50 hours/week

Night shift

Monday to Friday

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Specialist & Automation Assistant
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a hands-on GoHighLevel expert to fully own and manage all tasks within our GHL environment. This is not a support role — you'll be the go-to person responsible for building, maintaining, troubleshooting, and optimizing everything inside our GHL account and its connected systems.



What You'll Be Doing

Managing and maintaining our entire GoHighLevel (LeadConnector) setup — workflows, pipelines, funnels, calendars, contacts, and CRM configuration

Building and troubleshooting automations using GHL's native workflow builder as well as external tools like n8n

Configuring, managing, and troubleshooting Twilio integrations (SMS, voice, number provisioning, A2P registration, call routing, etc.)

Setting up and maintaining
 infrastructure — domain authentication (SPF, DKIM, DMARC), warmup, deliverability monitoring, and inbox management

Creating and managing
 campaigns including drip sequences, broadcasts, and automated follow-ups

Handling basic web development tasks — editing landing pages, funnels, forms, and custom code snippets within GHL or connected platforms

Identifying issues proactively and troubleshooting problems across the full stack (GHL, Twilio,
, automations, webhooks, APIs)



Requirements

Must-Have:

Deep, hands-on experience with GoHighLevel / LeadConnector — you should know the platform inside and out

Strong understanding of automation logic and workflow design in both GHL and tools like n8n

Experience configuring and troubleshooting Twilio (SMS/voice setup, compliance, error resolution)

Solid grasp of
 systems — sending infrastructure, authentication, deliverability best practices

Basic web development skills — comfortable with HTML/CSS, embedding scripts, editing funnels/landing pages, and working with APIs/webhooks

Ability to work independently, take full ownership of the GHL environment, and communicate clearly when issues arise

Nice-to-Have:

Experience building and optimizing
 marketing campaigns (copywriting, segmentation, A/B testing)

Familiarity with other automation platforms (Zapier, Make/Integromat)

Experience with custom API integrations and webhook configurations

Knowledge of GHL's white-label/SaaS mode

Background in digital marketing or lead generation



Ideal Candidate Profile

You're someone who thrives on solving problems and doesn't need hand-holding. You've set up GHL accounts from scratch, dealt with Twilio headaches, debugged broken automations at odd hours, and understand why an
 landed in spam. You think in systems and workflows, and you take pride in making everything run smoothly behind the scenes.



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

A brief overview of your GHL experience (how long, what types of setups)

Examples of automations you've built (GHL workflows, n8n flows, or similar)

Your experience with Twilio — what you've configured and troubleshot

Any relevant
 campaign or deliverability work you've done

Your availability and preferred working arrangement

title: Transportation Tracker
description:
AJG Transport is expanding its route operations division and seeking a reliable, detail-oriented professional to help support and streamline our daily duties. We are looking for a Transportation Tracker to support real time fleet movement, manage load data accuracy, and ensure smooth coordination between drivers, customers, and internal teams. This role is ideal for someone highly organized, proactive, and comfortable operating in a fast paced logistics environment where precision matters



Role Overview

As an Transportation Tracker, you will serve as a real time control point within route operations. Your responsibility is to ensure loads are properly assigned, tracked, updated, and documented while maintaining consistent communication across drivers, brokers, and customers. You will operate within structured SOPs while making fast, sound operational decisions when challenges arise.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Assign and dispatch loads based on driver availability, Hours of Service, and customer requirements

• Monitor live fleet movement using GPS and TMS

• Track and update ETAs, check calls, timestamps, and delivery milestones in real time

• Enter, audit, and maintain accurate load data in Google Sheets and TMS

• Communicate continuously with drivers, brokers, and customers regarding status updates

• Identify delays, route conflicts, detention risks, or service issues and take proactive action

• Escalate operational risks to leadership when necessary

• Generate shift based operational reports summarizing load activity and exceptions

• Follow dispatch, communication, and escalation SOPs consistently

• Maintain clean shift handoffs and organized documentation



What Success Looks Like

• TMS, Google Sheets, and tracking platforms reflect complete and error free data at all times

• Scheduled updates are sent on time

• Critical loads are monitored closely and handled with urgency from start to finish

• Communication is clear, concise, and actionable, both in written updates and verbal escalations

• Operational risks and issues are flagged early with solutions, not just problems

• Shift handoffs are smooth, complete, and well documented

• You become someone the team can depend on during high pressure situations



Who We’re Looking For

• Has experience in logistics, freight brokerage, dispatch, or transportation tracking

• Understanding of fleet coordination, load planning, and HOS awareness

• Familiar with US geography and US logistics trucking operations (a plus)

• Ability to monitor multiple loads and drivers simultaneously

• Understands urgency and prioritization in a live dispatch environment

• Communicates clearly and professionally via zoom, chat, and

• Minimum 45 WPM typing speed

• Can monitor multiple loads at once without losing accuracy

• Pays strong attention to detail and uses sound judgment when issues arise

• Comfortable operating in high volume communication environments

• Follows instructions consistently and values clean execution

• Works well with a team and is open to feedback and coaching. Collaborates without resistance or ego



Why Join AJG Transport?

• Permanent remote opportunity

• Structured systems and clear expectations

• Hands on leadership and direct feedback

• Defined KPIs and measurable growth

• Opportunity to grow within a scaling freight brokerage

• Performance recognition and advancement potential



Schedule & Work Setup

• Full Time Remote Role| Direct Hire to US Company

• Current Shift Need: 7 AM - 5 PM CDT & 3 PM - 1 AM CDT

• Other shifts (only if assigned): 11 PM - 9 AM CDT

• Zoom presence (with camera open and unmuted audio) required

• Time tracking software used for accountability and performance support

• Shifts may adjust based on operational demand



If you thrive in fast moving transportation operations, understand the importance of real time coordination, and can execute with precision under pressure, we want to hear from you.

title: Track & Trace Assistant – Quality Assurance
description:
GH Logistics is a growing freight brokerage and asset based logistics company specializing in dry van and reefer freight. Our team is built on strong systems, clear communication, and reliable execution. As we continue to scale nationally, we are looking for a Track & Trace Assistant – Quality Assurance to help ensure that every load is verified, compliant, and properly tracked before it moves. If you’re someone who notices the small details, enjoys organized processes, and takes pride in preventing problems before they happen this role may be a great fit.



Role Overview

Your work directly prevents missed pickups, tracking gaps, compliance issues, and communication breakdowns while collaborating closely with Operations, Sales, and Management to ensure loads move smoothly and safely with clear SOPs, structured workflows, and strong team support to help you succeed.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Review next day loads before execution

• Confirm CDL validity and compliance

• Assign and confirm active tracking (FourKites and/or Samsara)

• Call drivers to confirm pickup and delivery details, appointment times, and equipment requirements

• Download and upload customer tenders when applicable

• Ensure load information is accurate in the TMS and QA trackers

• Document findings clearly and consistently

• Escalate issues when something does not meet standards

• Maintain organized records and support process improvements



What Success Looks Like

• All next day loads are reviewed before execution

• Tracking is active and confirmed

• Potential issues are caught early

• Documentation is clear and organized

• Escalations are timely and professional



Who We’re Looking For

• Have experience in US. logistics, freight, tracking, quality assurance, or operational audit

• Are comfortable auditing details and verifying information

• Understand that small details prevent big operational problems

• Follow SOPs consistently

• Communicate clearly with drivers and internal teams

• Stay organized while handling multiple tasks

• Work well independently in a structured remote environment

• Are open to feedback and continuous improvement

• Have strong written and verbal English skills

• Type at least 50 WPM



Work Setup & Schedule

• Full Time | 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST or 3 PM - 1 AM CST (San Antonio time)

• Must work U.S. business hours

• Collaborative Zoom based work environment (open camera & unmute mic)

• Time tracking tools used to support accountability



Why Join GH Logistics?

• Clear processes and defined expectations

• Structured systems and documented SOPs

• Supportive team collaboration

• Performance based growth opportunities

• Critical role that directly impacts operational success



If you take pride in doing things right and preventing issues before they happen, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Position: Construction & Plumbing Estimator
description:
**Position: Senior Construction & Plumbing Estimator (Remote)**

We are hiring an experienced **Estimator** with a strong background in **residential construction and plumbing**.

 **Important:** This is NOT a general VA position.

We are only looking for candidates with **real, hands-on experience in estimating and blueprint takeoffs**.



Responsibilities

* Read and interpret construction blueprints (architectural + plumbing)

* Perform detailed quantity takeoffs:

  * Fixtures (toilets, lavatories, showers, etc.)

  * Pipe runs and materials

  * Equipment (water heaters, pumps, etc.)

* Break down projects into phases:

  * Underslab

  * Rough-in

  * Finish

* Prepare accurate cost estimates (labor + materials)

* Support bidding process for residential construction projects

 Requirements (Strict)

* Proven experience as a **Construction Estimator or Plumbing Estimator**

* Strong ability to read and understand US blueprints

* Experience with **residential construction projects**

* Solid understanding of **plumbing systems**

* Experience with estimating/takeoff software:

  * Bluebeam, PlanSwift, or similar

* High attention to detail

* Ability to work independently

 DO NOT APPLY IF:

* You have no real estimating experience

* You cannot read blueprints confidently

* You worked only as a general VA

* You cannot perform takeoffs and calculations

 Compensation

* $6 – $10/hour (based on experience)

* Performance-based bonuses (accuracy & winning bids)

* Long-term opportunity with growth

 REQUIRED TEST (MANDATORY)

To be considered, complete the task below:

1. Estimate a small residential bathroom project:

   * 1 toilet

   * 1 sink

   * 1 shower

2. Provide:

   * List of fixtures

   * Estimated pipe length (rough estimate is acceptable)

   * Basic material list

   * Labor estimate

3. Answer the following:

   * What is included in **rough-in plumbing**?

   * What is included in **finish plumbing**?

### ???? How to Apply

Send:

* Your resume

* Examples of previous estimates (if available)

* Your test answers

Applications without the test will NOT be considered.

We are looking for a serious professional who can help us grow and win more construction projects.

title: Executive Assistant | With B2B and Ops Management Experience
description:
The Role

We are looking for a high-level Executive Assistant who thrives at the intersection of B2B Sales and Operations Management. This isn't a typical "scheduling and
s" role; you will be the engine behind our business development and the primary liaison for our collision center partnerships.



You will manage the front-end sales pipeline through cold calling and warm handoffs, while simultaneously ensuring our internal operations—from CRM tracking to partner onboarding—run with surgical precision.



Key Responsibilities

B2B Outreach & Sales: Conduct high-volume cold calling to collision centers and body shops. You must be comfortable navigating gatekeepers to reach decision-makers and executing "Warm Handoffs."

Pipeline Management: Own the CRM. You will track every lead from "Entity Designation" through the "Current Lifecycle Stage," ensuring no referral partner or claim falls through the cracks.

Operations Oversight: Manage and optimize the Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for partner acquisitions. This includes coordinating marketing stipends and referral payouts.

Communication Management: Handle "First Outreach" sequences, "No Show" follow-ups, and referral requests using established
 and messaging templates.

Performance Metrics: Meet daily targets for dials, connects, and qualified appointments.



Qualifications & Skills

The Voice: You must have a neutral or American accent with a professional, persuasive tone of voice.

B2B Experience: Proven track record in B2B sales, cold calling, or business development.

Ops Mastery: Experience managing complex workflows or sales operations. If you don't love organization and tracking metrics, this is not the role for you.

Technical Proficiency: Advanced experience with CRM systems and pipeline management.

title: Growth & Outreach Specialist (Email, LinkedIn & Content)
description:
Role Overview:



We are looking for a technical and creative Virtual Assistant to manage our in-house outreach engine and social media presence for The Print Company. You will be responsible for managing a 30-domain cold
 system, running LinkedIn automation, and creating high-quality static brand assets for our e-commerce launch and corporate services.



Key Responsibilities:



1.
 Infrastructure (30 Domains):

- Connect 30 domains (Porkbun) to Mailpool/Mailforge and ensure 100% valid SPF, DKIM, and DMARC.

- Manage 60-90 inboxes in Instantly.ai, maintaining automated warm-ups and daily sending limits (25-30/day).

- Monitor Google Postmaster Tools daily to ensure high domain reputation.



2. Omnichannel Outreach (LinkedIn +
):

- Manage LinkedIn automation via HeyReach, ensuring account safety using Dedicated Residential Proxies.

- Build sequences that pivot from LinkedIn to
 if requests are ignored.

- Scrape and clean lead lists from 
 and Sales Navigator, verifying all data via NeverBounce.



3. Content & Graphic Creation:

- Design high-quality static images in Canva for Instagram (e-commerce/lifestyle) and LinkedIn (B2B/Corporate).

- Use AI tools (like Pebblely/Photoroom) to create professional product staging for our print products.

- Maintain a consistent brand aesthetic (fonts/colors) across all platforms.



4. Operations & Reporting:

- Manage the Master Inbox in Instantly/HeyReach to triage leads.

- Push "Interested" leads to our CRM and provide weekly reports on campaign health.



Technical Requirements:



- Tools: Instantly.ai, HeyReach, Apollo, Canva, Porkbun/DNS Management.

- Skills: Deep understanding of
 deliverability, LinkedIn safety limits, and basic graphic design.

- Experience: Must have managed at least 15+ domains simultaneously in the past.



How to Apply:



1. Please start your application with the word "PRINT."

2. Briefly describe your experience setting up multi-domain
 infrastructure.

3. Send a link to a portfolio or 2-3 samples of social media graphics you’ve created in Canva.

4. Confirm you understand the difference between a VPN and a Residential Proxy for LinkedIn safety.

title: Maintenance Coordinator - Remote
description:

mbers

?

?

?

?



Compensation

?



What Success Looks Like

?

Fully Remote 



Are you a QuickBooks Online superstar with a passion for numbers? We’re on the lookout for a Bookkeeper to join our dynamic, remote team! Enjoy the flexibility of working from home while collaborating with fellow bookkeeping experts to deliver top-notch service to our clients.



What You’ll Do:

*Manage bookkeeping for a variety of clients (and yes, we promise they can be fun to work with!)

*Collaborate with a team of bookkeeping pros to elevate our service and support each other in tackling challenges.

*Stay organized and keep deadlines in check while enjoying the perks of remote work.

* Performing bank account and credit card reconciliation.

* Conducting bookkeeping reviews.

* Paying and tracking bills/loans.

* Collecting and tracking invoices.

* Filing 1099(s).

* Calculating and collecting sales tax.

* Payroll filing and reporting.

* Maintaining spreadsheets of financial transactions.

* Submitting a detailed daily report to your direct supervisor.

* Keeping detailed time tracking per client.

* Using internal software to record client work completed.

* Performing other related duties as needed or agreed upon





What’s in it for You:

*Competitive pay: $7-$10/hour based on your experience, plus bonuses after your first 90 days!

*Part Time hours: 20 hours a week, then after 90 days transition to full-time hours: 40 hours a week, with the freedom to 

  work in your time zone.

*A supportive, fun work environment where you can learn and grow alongside industry experts!



What We’re Looking For:

*You must have a strong command of the English language ( Read, Write & Speak) 

*Computer-savvy with a reliable working computer.

*Super organized and able to juggle multiple clients with ease.

*Proficiency in QuickBooks Online is a MUST (1-3 years experience) 



If you’re ready to take your bookkeeping skills to new heights while enjoying the flexibility of remote work and teamwork, we want to hear from you!
