title: Executive Assistant Marketing Director
description:
Personal Executive Assistant / Marketing director 

to Real Estate Broker, Entrepreneur & Personal Brand Builder

Transaction Coordination (Sky Slope) · GoHighLevel · Paid Ads · AI-Powered Content · Brand Growth

Who You’ll Work For:  Kreg McCoy — Broker-Owner, Real Estate Entrepreneur, Coach & Personal Brand Builder

Position Type:  Full-Time or Part-Time — open to both, tell me what you prefer

Schedule:  Must overlap Pacific Time (PST/PDT) by at least 4 hours per day

Pay:  Competitive — negotiated based on your experience and skillset

Reports To:  Directly to Kreg

Works Alongside:  Kim, my Executive Assistant & Transaction Coordinator





A NOTE FROM KREG



I’ll be direct with you because I believe that’s the best way to start any working relationship.

I’m a real estate broker with 27+ years of experience, a business I’ve built across 7 states, and a vision that’s bigger than anything I’ve done so far. I’m building a national personal brand in the real estate coaching space — think Sharran Srivatsaa’s model: weekly content, a loyal audience, a coaching platform, and a voice that leads the industry. What I need is the right person to help me get there faster.

Kim handles my transactions and executive operations. She’s excellent. What I need from you is different: I need someone who lives in the world of digital marketing, GoHighLevel, AI tools, and paid advertising — and who also understands real estate well enough to support Kim and step in when needed.

If you’re the kind of person who gets genuinely excited when a new AI tool drops, who has actually built GHL automations from scratch, who has run
 and Google ad campaigns with real budgets and can tell me what worked and why — I want to hear from you.



WHAT THIS ROLE ACTUALLY IS



You will split your time across four areas. Here’s how I think about it:



1.  GoHighLevel — This Is the Engine Room

GHL is the central nervous system of my business. Every lead, every funnel, every automation, every campaign runs through it. I need someone who doesn’t just know how to use GHL — I need someone who can build in it. Workflows, automations, pipelines,
 and SMS sequences, landing pages, funnels, and eventually API integrations. If you’ve never logged into GHL, this role is not for you.

2.  Paid Advertising — Meta, Google & More

I’m running ads to grow my personal brand, attract real estate agents to my brokerage, and generate leads for my coaching platform. I need someone who can build campaigns, write compelling ad copy, set up audiences and retargeting, and tell me every week what the numbers mean. If you’ve never managed a real ad budget with real accountability, that’s a problem.

3.  Real Estate & Transaction Support

You’ll support Kim with transaction coordination — managing files, tracking deadlines, communicating with agents, and keeping deals moving. You don’t need to be a licensed agent. You do need to understand real estate vocabulary and the rhythm of a transaction. If escrow, contingencies, and commission disbursements are foreign concepts, you’ll need to learn them fast.

4.  Personal Brand & AI-Powered Content

My content engine produces a weekly training video, a Substack newsletter (‘The Covenant Letter’), social posts, Reels, and podcast content. I need help executing and distributing all of it — and I want someone who uses AI tools every day to make that content faster, sharper, and more effective. Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Manus — I use them all. You should too.



YOUR DAY-TO-DAY



• Build and manage GHL workflows, sequences, funnels, and pipelines

• Launch, monitor, and optimize
/Instagram and Google ad campaigns

• Manage my Google Business Profile and local SEO presence

• Support Kim on transaction files: SkySlope updates, deadline tracking, agent communications

• Help manage my inbox, calendar, and daily task list

• Repurpose content across platforms: YouTube clips ? Reels, training sessions ? newsletter, interviews ? social posts

• Draft
 campaigns, ad copy, captions, and newsletter content using AI tools

• Track and report on ad performance, funnel conversion, and content metrics weekly

• Assist with GHL API integrations as the tech stack grows

• Flag problems before they become fires — I need someone proactive, not reactive



WHAT YOU MUST ALREADY KNOW



These are not negotiable. Do not apply if you cannot honestly check every box:

? GoHighLevel (GHL) — Advanced. You’ve built workflows, sequences, funnels, and pipelines. Not just poked around the dashboard.

?
 & Meta Ads — You have managed campaigns in Ads Manager with a real budget. You know audiences, pixel, retargeting, and A/B testing.

? Google Ads — You’ve set up and managed search or display campaigns. You understand bidding, keywords, and conversion tracking.

? Google Business Profile — You know how to manage, optimize, and post to a GBP listing.

? Real estate basics — You understand what a TC does and know the vocabulary: MLS, escrow, contingency, closing, commission, listing agreement.

? Strong written English — You will be writing on behalf of my brand. It has to be good.

? AI tools — You use at least one of the following regularly and can show me how: Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Manus, or similar.

? Pacific Time overlap of 6+ hours daily.

? Reliable computer and fast, stable internet.



BONUS SKILLS THAT WILL SET YOU APART



? Luxury Presence — experience managing or running ads through their platform

? SkySlope transaction management

? n8n, 
, or Zapier for workflow automation

? GHL API — experience with webhooks, custom integrations, or third-party connections

? Advanced AI — prompt engineering, building AI workflows, using Claude Projects or GPT custom instructions

? Short-form video editing — Reels, TikTok-style clips using CapCut or similar

? YouTube channel management and SEO

? Substack, Beehiiv, or Kajabi experience

? Experience supporting a personal brand, coach, speaker, or public figure



THE KIND OF PERSON I’M LOOKING FOR



Skills matter. But so does character. Here’s what I’m actually looking for:

• You’re proactive. You don’t wait for instructions on things that are obvious. You see the gap and you close it.

• You take ownership. If something is late or wrong, you own it immediately — no excuses, no hiding.

• You’re curious about AI. You’re not intimidated by new tools — you want to figure them out.

• You communicate clearly. Short, direct, and honest. I don’t have time for vague updates.

• You care about quality. A broken link in a campaign or a typo in a newsletter matters to you. It should.

• You want to grow. This role will expand. The right person will have more responsibility and more opportunity within 90 days than most VAs see in two years.

• You respect my values. This is a faith-integrated business. I’m not asking you to share my beliefs. I am asking you to respect them.



THE BIG PICTURE



I’m building toward something specific: becoming the most recognized real estate entrepreneur and coaching voice in the country. The content. The brand. The community. The coaching platform. This is a real plan with real infrastructure behind it — not a dream.

The person I hire for this role will be part of building that from the ground up. You’ll be close to the work, close to the strategy, and close to the growth. If you want a job where you process tasks and disappear, this isn’t it. If you want a front-row seat to building something significant — this is exactly it.



HOW TO APPLY



Generic applications will not be read. I’m serious about this role and I need to know you are too.

In your message to me, answer every one of these questions. 3–5 sentences each. Be specific:

• 1.  Walk me through your GoHighLevel experience. What did you build? For what kind of business? What results did it produce?

• 2.  Tell me about a paid ad campaign you’
 managed on
 or Google. What was the goal, what was the budget, and what happened?

• 3.  What AI tools do you use, and how do you actually use them in your daily work? Give me a real example.

• 4.  What’s your real estate or transaction coordination experience? Be honest about how much you know.

• 5.  Why do you want to work specifically for a personal brand and coaching business — not just any VA job?

title: Marketing Lead
description:
We are looking for a proactive and reliable Marketing Lead to oversee our marketing team and help drive consistent execution of marketing initiatives. This role requires someone with strong leadership capability, sound judgment in marketing and design decisions, and the ability to manage people effectively.



The ideal candidate has prior experience leading a team, understands marketing materials and brand presentation, and can guide the team in producing high-quality content and visuals. We are also looking for someone who demonstrates professionalism, accountability, and the ability to work under pressure while maintaining team alignment.



Responsibilities



1. Lead and manage the marketing team to ensure tasks and campaigns are delivered on time

2. Provide direction on marketing strategies, campaigns, and content development

3. Review and guide the creation of marketing materials such as brochures, flyers, digital signage, and website content

4. Work closely with designers and content writers to maintain brand consistency and quality

5. Assess team performance, provide feedback, and ensure accountability across the team

6. Coordinate marketing initiatives and ensure collaboration among tea
mbers

7. Ensure marketing deliverables align with company goals and brand standards

8. Support continuous improvement of marketing processes and team productivity

. 

Qualifications



1. Proven experience leading or managing a team

2. Strong leadership, decision-making, and people management skills

3. Familiarity with marketing materials and strong judgment in graphic and brand presentation is a plus

4. Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple priorities

5. Strong communication and collaboration skills

6. Open to feedback and able to adapt quickly

7. Reliable, proactive, and highly accountable

8. Must not have other active clients to ensure full focus on the role



Work Schedule



Pacific Time: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM

Time Tracker will be used during work hours



To Apply: Send your updated resume to

title: Easy Money: Record Road Videos from Your Car or Bike
description:
I’m looking for someone to record short driving videos (3–5 minutes) from a car or motorbike, filming forward on the road.



You will record and send the videos yourself (no downloaded content). The more videos you send, the more you earn. I pay $0.25 per video ($5 per 20 videos). There is no limit — send as many as you want. I’m looking for someone who can send many videos daily.



To apply, send me:



A Google Drive link (set to public access)

2 sample videos (3–5 minutes each) that you recorded yourself (car or motorbike)



If the quality is good, we can start working immediately.

If you don’t send samples, I won’t respond.

title: Growth & Outreach Specialist (Email, LinkedIn & Content)
description:
Role Overview:



We are looking for a technical and creative Virtual Assistant to manage our in-house outreach engine and social media presence for The Print Company. You will be responsible for managing a 30-domain cold
 system, running LinkedIn automation, and creating high-quality static brand assets for our e-commerce launch and corporate services.



Key Responsibilities:



1.
 Infrastructure (30 Domains):

- Connect 30 domains (Porkbun) to Mailpool/Mailforge and ensure 100% valid SPF, DKIM, and DMARC.

- Manage 60-90 inboxes in Instantly.ai, maintaining automated warm-ups and daily sending limits (25-30/day).

- Monitor Google Postmaster Tools daily to ensure high domain reputation.

 

2. Omnichannel Outreach (LinkedIn +
):

- Manage LinkedIn automation via HeyReach, ensuring account safety using Dedicated Residential Proxies.

- Build sequences that pivot from LinkedIn to
 if requests are ignored.

- Scrape and clean lead lists from 
 and Sales Navigator, verifying all data via NeverBounce.



3. Content & Graphic Creation:

- Design high-quality static images in Canva for Instagram (e-commerce/lifestyle) and LinkedIn (B2B/Corporate).

- Use AI tools (like Pebblely/Photoroom) to create professional product staging for our print products.

- Maintain a consistent brand aesthetic (fonts/colors) across all platforms.



4. Operations & Reporting:

- Manage the Master Inbox in Instantly/HeyReach to triage leads.

- Push "Interested" leads to our CRM and provide weekly reports on campaign health.



Technical Requirements:



- Tools: Instantly.ai, HeyReach, Apollo, Canva, Porkbun/DNS Management.

- Skills: Deep understanding of
 deliverability, LinkedIn safety limits, and basic graphic design.

- Experience: Must have managed at least 15+ domains simultaneously in the past.



How to Apply:



1. Please start your application with the word "PRINT."

2. Briefly describe your experience setting up multi-domain
 infrastructure.

3. Send a link to a portfolio or 2-3 samples of social media graphics you’ve created in Canva.

4. Confirm you understand the difference between a VPN and a Residential Proxy for LinkedIn safety.

title: Operations Manager
description:
About Us

Let’s See Italy is a fast-growing tour operator specializing in unforgettable experiences across Rome. We are a dynamic, detail-driven team focused on delivering exceptional guest experiences while scaling our operations efficiently.



We are looking for an experienced Operations Manager with a background in the Rome tour industry to join our remote team. This role is critical to ensuring smooth daily operations, improving tour performance, and driving revenue growth.



Key ResponsibilitiesDaily Ticketing Operations



Prepare and manage daily ticket purchasing lists

Verify guest names and booking details for accuracy

Coordinate with internal ticket-buying team

Purchase tickets through official websites and B2B platforms

Operations Management



Coordinate with meeting point (MP) coordinators regarding guest lists

Distribute tickets to tour guides for upcoming tours

Maintain daily communication with guides to resolve operational issues

Update tour schedules and manage changes in Rezdy

Coordinate with Customer Service to communicate schedule updates

Ensure Rezdy calendar is accurate and availability is up to date

Escalate operational issues to leadership when necessary

Guide & Review Management



Create and maintain guide performance review reports

Improve overall review collection rates

Identify, document, and escalate negative reviews to guides and management

Tour Performance & Growth



Analyze and improve occupancy rates across key tours:

Food Tours

Cooking Classes

Night Tours

Vatican Private Tours

Develop and execute strategies to increase bookings and fill rates

Cross-Selling & Upselling



Increase conversion of existing customers into additional tours

Develop systems to help guides effectively cross-sell

Create tools and materials (maps, QR codes, etc.) to support upselling efforts

Requirements



Previous experience in the tourism industry in Rome (required)

Strong operational and organizational skills

Experience with booking systems (Rezdy preferred)

Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment

Excellent communication skills (especially with remote teams)

Analytical mindset with a focus on improving performance metrics

What We’re Looking For



Detail-oriented and highly reliable

Proactive problem-solver

Comfortable working remotely and independently

Results-driven with a focus on growth and efficiency

title: **Experienced ONLY** Disposition Manager - Real Estate Investment Company (USA)
description:
We are REI Equity, a leading real estate investment company that helps homeowners sell their properties quickly and efficiently. We are looking for a skilled and proactive Disposition Manager to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for taking signed deals from the acquisition team and ensuring they are brought to the finish line smoothly.



Key Responsibilities:

Manage the full lifecycle of real estate deals, from contract signing to closing.

Coordinate with title companies, buyers, and sellers to facilitate smooth transactions.

Oversee documentation, ensure contracts are properly executed, and manage any required follow-up.

Handle any complications or roadblocks in the closing process, including managing tenant situations or repair negotiations.

Provide consistent communication and updates to all parties involved to ensure timely and successful closings.

Work closely with the acquisition team to ensure a seamless handoff of deals.



Qualifications:

Experience in real estate, particularly in disposition or transaction coordination.

Strong organizational and multitasking skills.

Excellent communication abilities with both clients and tea
mbers.

Knowledge of real estate contracts, closing processes, and documentation.

Ability to problem-solve and handle last-minute issues that may arise during a transaction.



What We Offer:

Competitive compensation based on experience.

Flexible work schedule (remote).

Opportunity to grow within a fast-paced and dynamic company.

If you're an experienced disposition or transaction manager looking to work with a leading real estate investment firm, we encourage you to apply!

title: Experienced Real Estate Acquisitions (Full-Time)
description:

We specialize in:



Real estate wholesaling



Novations



Wholetailing

Excellent spoken English — neutral or very minimal accent



Experience in real estate acquisitions or sales is REQUIRED



Full-time availability (40 hours/week)



Confident, ethical, and goal-driven



CRM experience and strong follow-up discipline

After that: we expect results — and we pay for them



???? To Apply (Read Carefully):

Send us a voice or video recording introducing yourself and sharing your real estate or sales experience.

?? Applications without a recording will NOT be considered.



We hire based on:



Communication skills



Attitude & work ethic



Ability to follow clear instructions



This job only works if YOU do. If you’re hungry, skilled, and ready to build something great, we want to hear from you.



Thanks for your time

title: Senior YouTube Video Editor (Long-Form, 4K)
description:
Remote | Per-Video Contract

JenniferMaker LLC is seeking an experienced independent video editing contractor to support our YouTube production on a per-video contract basis.

-  We create long-form educational content for a large crafting audience on YouTube, and we need an experienced video editor who is highly organized, deadline-driven, and technically strong in Adobe Premiere Pro.

- This is not a beginner role. We are looking for someone who can manage large project files, deliver clean exports, and maintain professional project organization standards.

- This role is best suited for editors who prefer structured long-form educational content rather than cinematic storytelling edits.



What You’ll Be Editing

- One (1) long-form compilation video

- Videos are typically 120+ minutes total runtime

- Content is assembled from previously edited segments and introduction segments inserted between each video

- Footage, graphics, and direction are provided

- Source footage, graphics, and instructions are typically delivered via secure cloud storage (Google Drive or Dropbox).







Responsibilities

For this video, you will:

- Edit and assemble a long-form compilation video from provided assets

- Ensure seamless transitions between segments

- Perform basic audio leveling and color consistency

- Export final 4K YouTube-ready file

- Deliver a fully organized Adobe Premiere Pro project package

- Meet strict turnaround deadlines





You must:

- Use properly licensed software

- Use licensed music only, preferably from our existing Epidemic Sound account when music is required

- Maintain secure handling of all company files

- Retain project backups for 30 days



Required Deliverables Per Video

Final exported file:

- 3840x2160 (4K)

- 30fps

- H.264 (.mp4)

- Audio: AAC, 320kbps stereo, -6dB max

- Color Space: Rec. 709

Complete Premiere Pro Project Package:

- Compatible with Premiere Pro 2023+

- No missing or offline files

- All media properly organized

- Clean folder structure



Compensation

Paid per completed long-form video

Rate: $60.00 per 120+ minute compilation video

- Includes up to two revision rounds

- Payment issued within fifteen (15) days of final acceptance

- Payment is made in US Dollars via ACH bank transfer to a USD-capable account

- Contractor may use services such as Wise or other providers that support receiving USD ACH payments from the United States



Turnaround Time

- Final delivery deadline will be agreed upon in advance.

- Time is critical. Repeated missed deadlines will result in contract termination.



Important Notes

- This is an independent contractor role (not employment)

- You must handle your own taxes and government contributions

- You must disclose any AI-generated content used

- No subcontracting without written approval

- No portfolio use without written permission from JenniferMaker LLC

- You will not have publishing access to our YouTube channel







Who We’re Looking For

You are:

- Extremely comfortable in Premiere

- Comfortable managing very large project files

- Detail-oriented with exports

- Reliable with deadlines

- Comfortable working independently

- Professional and discreet with confidential content





Communication Requirements

- Strong written English required for clear communication

- Comfortable reviewing and working with English-language scripts

- Ability to understand tone, pacing, and instructional content



Growth Opportunity

While there is no guaranteed minimum volume, we produce weekly YouTube content year-round.

For the right editor — someone who consistently delivers clean, organized work on time — this role can expand into additional projects and ongoing collaboration. We value long-term working relationships with reliable professionals.



Application Instructions (Important)

- Applications generated by AI without carefully reviewing this job description will not be considered. 



To apply, please include:

- A letter describing your relevant experience and qualifications

- Links to 3 long-form YouTube videos you personally edited (a minimum of 15 minutes in length is preferred)

- Your Premiere Pro version

- Your internet speed (upload/download)

- Your typical turnaround time for a 120-minute compilation edit

- If you comfortable with $60 per video?



In the first line of your application, write:

 “4K Ready Editor”

title: Virtual Executive Assistant (Consulting & CRM Management)
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented, proactive Virtual Assistant to support a high-level consultant in managing day-to-day operations, CRM hygiene, and lead generation activities. The primary focus of this role is to bridge the gap between client meetings and administrative follow-up, ensuring that no "promise" made during a consultation is missed.

The ideal candidate is someone who can listen to meeting recordings, extract vital information, and maintain a highly organized digital workspace.



Key Responsibilities

1. CRM Management & Meeting Synthesis

Review meeting recordings (via Fathom) to identify key discussion points, client needs, and commitments made.



Accurately input meeting notes, contact details, and action items into the CRM.

Process a backlog of recordings to ensure the CRM is fully up-to-date with historical data.

Ensure all client profiles are enriched with necessary data points as requested.

2.
 & Calendar Coordination

Manage the consultant’s inbox, filtering inquiries and responding to routine correspondence.



Schedule and coordinate 3–4 meetings per day, ensuring the consultant's calendar is optimized and free of conflicts.

3. Lead Generation & Research

Conduct research on LinkedIn to gather prospect data and professional insights.



Utilize ZoomInfo to identify and verify leads for upcoming outreach campaigns.

4. Marketing & Campaign Support



Assist in the coordination of a specialized "Gimmick"
/mail campaign (e.g., the "Aspirin for Process Headaches" campaign).

Coordinate logistics and messaging to ensure high engagement from prospects.

5. Future Growth (Optional/Potential)



Potential to expand into outbound cold calling and sales development as the business grows.





Required Skills & Qualifications

• Experience: Proven experience as a Virtual Assistant, Executive Assistant, or in a CRM-heavy administrative role.

• Technical Proficiency: * Comfortable using Fathom (or similar AI note-takers).

Experience with CRM software (data entry and workflow management).

Proficiency in LinkedIn for data mining and ZoomInfo for lead sourcing.

• Attention to Detail: Ability to listen to nuances in recordings and translate them into actionable CRM tasks.

• Communication: Excellent written and verbal English skills, specifically for professional
 management.

• Efficiency: Ability to manage a steady volume of work (transitioning from backlog to daily maintenance).



Work Details



Initial Capacity: 10–15 hours per week.

Scaling: Potential to increase hours (up to full
 hours per week) based on business growth and ROI.



Location: Remote.





The Ideal Candidate...



...is someone who understands that in a consulting business, relationship management is everything. You aren't just filing data; you are ensuring that the consultant looks professional and reliable by helping them keep every promise they make to a client.



How to Apply



Send the following to 

:



Updated CV/Resume

Short video introduction

Portfolio



Applications without these three items will not be considered.

title: Jr Amazon PPC Manager
description:
Jr. PPC Growth Manager (Amazon + Operations) – Remote (Global Applicants Welcome)

Cartkaboom | Boutique Amazon Brand Growth Firm

Are you eager to build your career in Amazon growth and learn how high-performing brands scale? Cartkaboom is a boutique Amazon brand growth firm that partners with premium CPG and pet wellness brands to grow their presence and profitability on Amazon.



We’re looking for a detail-oriented and driven Jr. PPC Growth Manager who is excited to get hands-on experience across both Amazon PPC and day-to-day operations. This is a full-time role where you’ll work closely with our senior team to execute, optimize, and learn how winning Amazon brands are built.



What You’ll Do

- Amazon PPC (Primary Focus)

- Support the management and optimization of Amazon PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products, Brands, Display)

- Monitor bids, budgets, and search terms with a focus on improving performance

- Conduct keyword and competitor research to identify growth opportunities

- Analyze key metrics (ACOS, TACOS, CTR, CVR) and identify trends

- Assist in campaign builds, restructures, and scaling initiatives

- Collaborate on creative testing (images, video, copy) to improve performance



Amazon Operations (Secondary Focus)

- Support listing updates, uploads, and optimization

- Assist with inventory tracking, basic forecasting inputs, and coordination with the team to prevent stockouts or overstock

- Conduct product and market research (pricing, positioning, competitors)

- Maintain organized tracking sheets and performance dashboards

- Assist with account health monitoring and issue resolution

- Support product launches and new listing setup 

- Reporting & Collaboration

- Prepare weekly performance updates and summaries

- Work closely with PPC managers, creatives, and account managers

- Follow SOPs while proactively identifying areas for improvement



What We’re Looking For

- 2–4 years of experience in Amazon, PPC, eCommerce, or digital marketing

- Strong foundational understanding of Amazon PPC

- Familiarity with Amazon Seller Central

- Experience with tools like Helium 10, Sellerboard, or DataDive

- Strong analytical skills and comfort with Google Sheets

- High attention to detail and ability to follow structured processes

- Strong written and spoken English communication

- Organized, reliable, and able to manage a full-time workload

- Must have at least 6-7 hours of overlap with the U.S. Central Time

- Basic understanding of how inventory levels impact PPC performance (stockouts, ranking, velocity)





Bonus Skills (Not Required)

- Basic Canva or creative editing skills

- Experience with data entry, research, or virtual assistant work

- Exposure to Shopify or DTC brands



Who You Are

- You value ownership over task completion

- You have proactive thinking, not just execution

- You move fast and prioritize results

- You think beyond PPC and consider the full business impact, including inventory, conversion, and profitability

- You communicate clearly and take accountability

- You want a long-term role where you can grow into a senior position



Compensation & Details

Pay: $3-4/hour(based on experience)

Hours: Full-time (40 hours/week)

Location: Fully remote (global applicants welcome)

Schedule: Must work U.S. Central Time Zone, or at least have several hours of overlap



Why Join Cartkaboom

At Cartkaboom, you’ll get hands-on experience working with real brands and real growth strategies. We’re a small, fast-moving team where your work directly impacts results—and where you’ll have the opportunity to quickly level up your skills.

title: HOA Manager
description:
The HOA Property Manager is responsible for the day?to?day operations, governance support, vendor oversight, and owner/resident experience across an assigned portfolio of homeowner associations. This role requires strong analytical ability, impeccable attention to detail, and exceptional written and verbal communication skills. The manager serves as the primary liaison among the Board of Directors, unit owners, residents, vendors, and internal teams (Maintenance and Finance), ensuring that association operations comply with governing documents, applicable laws, and company standards while meeting service-level and financial targets.



Key Outcomes (What Success Looks Like):



Accurate, timely Board packets and meeting facilitation with clear minutes and action logs

Portfolio-level adherence to budgets, assessments, and reserve funding plans in partnership with Finance HOA

Proactive maintenance planning and on-time completion of preventive and corrective work with Maintenance HOA

High owner/resident satisfaction, timely resolution of requests, and transparent communications

Clean annual audits, renewed insurance policies, and documented compliance with statutes and governing documents

Up-to-date task/project management in Asana and on-time delivery of recurring HOA cycles and filings



Key Responsibilities:

1) Board & Governance Management

Serve as the primary point of contact for Board members; prepare agendas, Board packets, and management reports for regular and special meetings.

Interpret and apply governing documents (CC&Rs, bylaws, rules) and relevant state statutes in daily operations; coordinate with counsel when required.

Facilitate annual meetings, elections, and owner notices in accordance with legal and governing document requirements.

2) Owner & Resident Relations

Maintain responsive, professional communication with trustees/Board, unit owners, and residents via
, phone, and portal.

Issue timely association-wide notices (policy changes, maintenance schedules, community events, compliance reminders).

Manage and resolve escalations, complaints, architectural review requests (ARC), violations, and hearings within established SLAs.

3) Financial Coordination & Reporting 

Support budget development, reserve study implementation, and monthly variance commentary; review financials for accuracy.

Monitor assessment billing, collections, payment plans, and delinquency follow-up in alignment with collection policies.

Review and approve invoices, code expenses to budgets, and validate vendor work completion prior to payment.

4) Maintenance, Projects & Vendor Management (with Maintenance HOA)

Translate Board priorities into annual maintenance calendars; schedule and track preventive maintenance and inspections.

Open, monitor, and close work orders; ensure scope, SLA, and quality standards are met; maintain accurate asset records.

Bid, negotiate, and manage vendor contracts (landscaping, janitorial, security, pools, roofing, elevators, etc.); perform periodic vendor reviews.

Coordinate capital improvement projects (RFPs, proposals, schedules, owner notifications, punch lists, closeout documents).

5) Information Management & Systems

Keep all HOA Asana projects/boards current with daily updates, dependencies, and follow-ups; maintain recurring tasks and automations.

Process resale and lender questionnaire packages accurately and within service timelines; maintain fee schedules.

Maintain organized digital records (governing docs, minutes, contracts, insurance, warranties, architectural files) in the association’s repository.

6) Team Leadership & Development

Train and onboard new APMs/PMs on processes, systems (Asana, accounting/portal), compliance, and customer service standards.

Promote a collaborative, service-oriented culture aligned with company values; escalate staffing/resource needs to the Unit Head.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):

On-time completion rate for recurring HOA tasks and compliance filings

Work-order first-response and average time-to-close (by priority)

Delinquency rate and collections effectiveness; percent of assessments collected

Budget adherence (OPEX/CapEx) and variance accuracy; invoice cycle time

Owner/resident satisfaction score; complaint resolution time

Board satisfaction score (post-meeting surveys) and action-item closure rate

Qualifications:

3+ years of HOA/condo association management or related property management experience

Demonstrated proficiency with task/project management tools (Asana) and owner portals; strong Excel/Google Sheets skills

Exceptional communication (written and verbal), meeting facilitation, and stakeholder management

Strong analytical, organizational, and time-management skills; high attention to detail

Working knowledge of governing documents, meeting procedures, collections, elections, and common HOA statutes

title: Amazon Setup, Vendor Research & Outreach Specialist
description:
Amazon E-Commerce & Vendor Research Specialist

Remote | Part-Time | Philippines



We are a U.S.-based company launching a new e-commerce business focused on tea, spices, and related products, and we are looking for someone in the Philippines who has strong Amazon knowledge and can help us build this the right way from the ground up.



This is not just a basic assistant role. We need someone who understands the setup and ongoing workflow involved in selling on Amazon, including product research, competitor review, listing support, Seller Central, backend setup, category requirements, inventory coordination, and general e-commerce support.



A major part of this role will be understanding how Amazon vendors work, how to research and find useful company and contact information, and how to help us market to and approach them effectively. We are looking for someone who can identify vendors, suppliers, brands, and decision-makers, organize outreach efforts, and support the research and marketing side of building product opportunities.



The right person will be detail-oriented, proactive, organized, and able to work independently. Strong English communication is important. Experience with Amazon, vendor research, contact research, product sourcing, and e-commerce operations is strongly preferred. Experience in tea, spices, grocery, food, or beverage products is a plus.



To apply, please send:



Your resume

A short summary of your Amazon experience

Any experience with vendor or contact research

title: Client Outreach and Appointment Coordinator
description:
Client Outreach and Appointment Coordinator



Remote, Philippines

Full Time, Long Term

Supporting Ottawa, Canada Automotive Operations



About the Role



We are hiring a results driven Client Outreach and Appointment Coordinator to support a busy automotive service operation based in Ottawa, Canada.



This is a performance focused role within the automotive industry. The primary objective is to generate and secure appointment volume through proactive outbound communication and disciplined CRM management.



You will play a key role in maintaining a steady flow of booked vehicles, supporting seasonal campaigns, protecting scheduling integrity, and ensuring strong customer follow up.



This is a long term, full time opportunity aligned with Eastern Standard Time business hours.



Work Schedule



• Full time, 40 hours per week

• Eastern Standard Time schedule

• Typical hours are 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST

• May start as early as 8:00 AM EST or extend to 6:00 PM EST depending on operational needs

• Fully remote role based in the Philippines

• Reports directly to the Canadian management team



Performance Expectations



This is an activity based and target driven role.



• Minimum average of 12 vehicles booked per day

• High daily outbound call volume

• Strong sense of urgency in all communication

• Accurate and complete CRM documentation

• Professional and confident English communication



Key Responsibilities

1. Appointment Booking and Confirmation



• Book a minimum average of 12 vehicles per day

• Promote preferred booking structure, 8:00 AM drop off and end of day pickup

• Confirm all next day appointments

• Reduce no shows through proactive confirmation calls

• Protect scheduling structure and revenue flow



2. Seasonal and Campaign Based Outbound Calling



• Execute winter and summer tire change campaigns

• Conduct air conditioning inspection campaigns

• Follow up on deferred repair recommendations

• Offer no charge multipoint inspections when appropriate

• Reactivate inactive customers



3. Tire Storage Customer Management



• Contact customers with stored tires to schedule seasonal changeovers

• Prioritize off peak booking to protect peak season capacity

• Align scheduling with revenue and capacity strategy



4. Database Clean Up and Lead Mining



• Verify and update customer contact information

• Clean incomplete or outdated CRM records

• Identify and mine new booking opportunities from the database

• Maintain organized and detailed CRM notes



5. Post Appointment Follow Up



• Call customers after completed appointments

• Collect structured and objective feedback

• Document feedback in Excel

• Categorize trends and identify recurring themes

• Report insights to management to improve service quality



Required Qualifications



• Fluent in English, spoken and written

• Experience in outbound calling, appointment setting, telesales, or customer outreach

• Comfortable working with daily targets and measurable performance metrics

• Strong organization and time management skills

• Proficient in Excel and CRM systems

• Reliable high speed internet connection

• Professional home workspace

• Available to work Eastern Standard Time hours



Ideal Candidate Profile



• Confident and persuasive communicator

• Highly disciplined and activity focused

• Comfortable making a high volume of outbound calls daily

• Detail oriented with strong documentation habits

• Results driven and accountable

• Able to work independently with minimal supervision

title: B2B Sales Development Representative (US Market) – Offshore Staffing Company
description:
We are a fast-growing offshore staffing company serving US-based businesses. We build structured offshore teams across recruiting, HR, accounting, and administrative functions for distributed organizations.



We are hiring an experienced Sales Development Representative (SDR) based in the Philippines to drive outbound prospecting and generate qualified meetings with US decision-makers.



This is a performance-driven role with strong commission upside.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Researching and identifying qualified US-based companies

Building targeted prospect lists

Executing cold
 and LinkedIn outreach campaigns

Personalizing messaging for decision-makers (COO, VP Operations, HR, Founders)

Booking qualified meetings for the founder

Managing outreach sequences using modern sales tools

Tracking pipeline activity in CRM

Continuously improving messaging and conversion rates

You will NOT be responsible for closing deals — your focus is qualified meeting generation.



Required Experience (Must Have)

3+ years B2B sales experience

Experience selling to US-based companies

Experience with cold
 and LinkedIn outbound

Experience using tools like Apollo, Instantly, Lemlist, Smartlead, Clay, or similar

Strong written English (professional, executive tone)

Experience booking meetings for founders or executives

Ability to research companies and personalize outreach



Bonus if you have:

Experience selling staffing, BPO, outsourcing, or recruitment services

Experience using AI tools to enhance outbound (ChatGPT, Clay AI enrichment, AI personalization tools)

Experience targeting mid-market companies



What We’re Looking For

Highly proactive and self-directed

Process-driven and organized

Comfortable testing messaging and iterating

Able to think strategically about target markets

Strong research skills

Performance-oriented



This is not an entry-level role. We are looking for someone who understands outbound strategy and knows how to get responses from US executives.



Tools & Technology

You should be comfortable working with:

Sales Navigator

Apollo / similar data tools

Cold
 platforms

CRM systems

AI writing tools for personalization

Google Workspace

If you have built or optimized outbound systems before, that is a strong advantage.



Compensation

Base: $600–$800 USD per month depending on experience PLUS commission!

Commission: Competitive performance-based commission per qualified meeting and per deal closed

Opportunity to grow into a larger sales role over time

High performers can significantly increase earnings through commission.



To Apply Please include:



A brief summary of your B2B outbound experience

Tools you’ve used for cold
 and prospecting

Example of a cold
 you’ve written to a US executive

Only applicants who follow instructions will be considered.

title: IT Technician
description:
Job Description

Join Intelligent Technical Solutions, a dynamic and growing company, as our Technician II. We're looking for a collaborative problem-solver with excellent customer service skills and a detail-oriented mindset. In this role, you'll be pivotal in providing remote IT support, ensuring our clients receive top-notch technical assistance. You'll handle a range of tasks, from system updates to hands-on troubleshooting, playing a critical role in maintaining our high standards of IT service.



Job Responsibilities

This role is expected to be able to resolve the following technical issues with little or no assistance:

Workstation operating system issues of any kind.

Printer issues of any kind.

Standard business application (Office, etc.) issues of any kind.

Line-of-business application issues for common applications (SAGE ERP, QuickBooks), and for more niche applications with vendor assistance.

Basic server issues.

Basic networking issues.

Answer incoming Quick Fix calls from clients.

Participate in an on-call rotation to provide after-hours and weekend support for onsite and remote operations.



Job Characteristics

Experience with Windows and Mac OS troubleshooting.

Minimum two years in Helpdesk support or a similar role.

Skilled in application troubleshooting, PC deployments/imaging, and user profile management.

Basic knowledge of Firewalls, Switches, Network architecture, and troubleshooting.

Proficient in supporting Office 365, MS Office, Adobe, Active Directory, backup software, endpoint cybersecurity, mobile devices, and various business applications.

Experience with Managed Service Providers (MSPs) is highly desirable.

Active IT Certifications are preferred.



Job KPI's

Utilization: The percentage of time that you are on the clock and billing time to client tickets

CSAT: Scores filled out by clients using the rating system in tickets

Quality Score: Assessments performed by the training and quality team.

First-touch closed: Each ticket that is completed with only one time entry contributes to this number



Job Requirements

A home office set up that meets the following:

Computer: A working computer with a minimum of 8GB RAM and one of the following:

Windows 11 with an Intel i5 or i7 (8th generation or newer), or

AMD Ryzen 5 or 7 (2000 series or newer), or

macOS 12 or newer.

Internet: Stable internet connection with at least 5 Mbps download and upload speeds.

Audio Equipment: A quality headset with a noise-cancellation feature for meetings.

Mobile Device: A smartphone capable of installing the Microsoft Authenticator app.

Webcam: An HD webcam for video calls.

2nd Monitor 

UPS (Uninterruptible Power Supply) if using a desktop (Not needed if using a laptop)

A very strong cultural fit the ITS way (Our core values will be discussed during the interview) 

Excellent command of the English language both spoken and written 

Able to work full time 40 hrs. a week:  8:00 AM to 5:00 PM PST (Monday to Friday)

Able to pass our online behavior and cognitive assessments. 

Preferably, at least two of the following certifications: CompTIA A+, CompTIA Network+, CompTIA Security+, 3cx Basic Certified Engineer.

Able to provide NBI Clearance (for PH applicants).



Compensation

Pay rate starts at Php65,550.00 and may vary by experience and location.

Life Insurance

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Job Description

The M&A Sales Development Representative is a strategic growth role at Intelligent Technical Solutions (ITS), focused on identifying and engaging potential acquisition targets. Unlike traditional sales, this role centers on building high-level relationships with IT business owners and industry brokers to discuss the future of their organizations. Your primary goal is to act as a professional ambassador for ITS, initiating conversations that lead to successful mergers or acquisitions. The ideal candidate is a disciplined, remote-first professional who values meaningful engagement over scripted outreach and can communicate with executive-level presence. 



Job Responsibilities

Strategic Conversation Management

Initiate and maintain high-volume outreach to achieve a minimum of 40 quality conversations per day with business owners and decision-makers. 

Broker & Intermediary Networking

Proactively identify and engage with business brokers to build a long-term deal flow of "off-market" acquisition opportunities. 

Growth-Focused Outreach

Communicate the ITS value proposition as a strategic partner, focusing on how companies can join or merge with us to enhance their cybersecurity and operational scale.

Target Qualification

Vet potential acquisition targets based on core criteria, including headcount, existing IT infrastructure, and their openness to strategic transition. 

Smart Outreach for High Conversion

Execute personalized "Smart Outreach" strategies (deep research and tailored follow-ups) specifically for 2nd First Time Appointments (FTAs) to ensure high-quality deal flow. 

Resilient Objection Handling

Navigate common industry pushback by shifting the focus from "selling a service" to "exploring a strategic partnership or exit strategy." 

Pipeline Stewardship

Manage the hand-off of qualified leads to the M&A Director, ensuring the relationship remains warm until the discovery meeting actually takes place. 

CRM Accuracy

Maintain meticulous records in HubSpot, capturing business intelligence and conversation history to support the long-term M&A pipeline. 



Job Qualifications

Professional Presence: Comfortable engaging directly with business owners, CEOs, and seasoned business brokers. 

Outbound Experience: 2+ years in a high-volume outbound role. Business development, recruitment, or similar where building relationships from scratch was part of the job.

Resilience & Discipline: Consistent and self-directed. Able to hit targets in a remote environment, manage a pipeline with minimal supervision, and treat setbacks as part of the process.

Strong Communication: Exceptional verbal and written English, with the ability to explain complex concepts (like M&A or Cybersecurity) in a clear, relatable way.

Technical Adaptability: A fast learner who can quickly become comfortable with MSP terminology and basic financial concepts (e.g., EBITDA, recurring revenue).

Tool Proficiency: Hands-on experience using HubSpot for CRM and ZoomInfo for lead intelligence, or similar tools, is a must.

Collaborative Spirit: A team player who aligns with ITS Core Values. 



Preferred Qualifications

Experience in the Managed Service Provider (MSP) or Cybersecurity industry. 

Previous experience in "Buy-Side" M&A lead generation or business brokerage. 

Background in professional services recruitment. 



Job Requirements

A home office set up that meets the following:

Computer: A working computer with a minimum of 8GB RAM and one of the following:

Windows 11 with an Intel i5 or i7 (8th generation or newer), or

AMD Ryzen 5 or 7 (2000 series or newer), or

title: Client Account Manager (WFH | Remote)
description:
Job Description

The Client Account Manager is responsible for managing and nurturing relationships with clients to ensure their satisfaction and loyalty. This role involves understanding client needs, developing and implementing strategies to meet those needs, and ensuring the delivery of high-quality services. The Client Account Manager serves as the primary point of contact for clients, handling inquiries, resolving issues, and facilitating communication between clients and internal teams. 



Job Responsibilities

Client Relationship Management 

Develop and maintain strong relationships with clients. 

Act as the main point of contact for clients, addressing client queries and communications promptly and effectively. 

Coordinate meetings, appointments or other “touch points” for client engagement. 

Schedule regular check-ins and meetings with clients to review progress and gather feedback. 



Client Support 

Provide prompt and effective support to clients, resolving any issues or concerns they may have. 

Facilitate communication between clients and technical support teams when necessary. 

Ensure clients are fully trained and knowledgeable about the company’s products and services. 



Account Management 

Monitor client accounts to ensure that all services are delivered on time and meet client expectations. 

Identify opportunities for upselling and cross-selling additional services or products. 

Prepare and present regular reports to clients on performance metrics, project status, and other relevant data. 



Invoice Reviews

Review and approve client invoices to ensure accuracy and compliance with contract terms. 

Address and resolve any discrepancies or issues related to billing. 

Communicate with clients regarding invoice inquiries and payment statuses. 



Internal Liaison 

Coordinate with internal teams (e.g., procurement, projects, service team) to ensure seamless delivery of services and address any issues. 

Manage timelines, budgets, and resources for client projects. 

Address and resolve any issues or conflicts that arise during project execution. 



Strategic Planning 

Work with VCIO to develop and present solutions based on customer's business requirements. 

Ability to understand various ways a solution may be delivered and anticipate what will work best for client.  

Analyze client needs and create supporting documentation to outline these needs. 

Prepare and manage quotes for technical projects. 

Organize and present Strategic Business Reviews 



Performance Tracking and Reporting 

Prepare and deliver performance reports to clients and senior management through SBR Presentations 

Use company CRM and knowledge management tools in order to provide various levels of sales reporting.  



Job Qualifications

Proven experience as an Account Manager, Client Manager, or in a similar role. 

Strong understanding of account management and customer service principles. 

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills. 

Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously. 

Proficiency in CRM software and Microsoft Office Suite. 

Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail. 

Ability to work independently and as part of a team. 



Job KPIs

SBRs Completed 

Measure the number of SBRs the CAM has successfully delivered, ensuring clients are regularly engaged and their needs are being met. 



Proposals Sent (Count) | (Value) 

The number of and total dollar value of all proposals sent out, indicating proactive client engagement and potential for sale. 



Opportunities Active (Count) | (Value) 

Track the number of the total dollar value of all active opportunities (stages 4 and 5) currently awaiting client decisions, indicating engagement and potential future revenue. 



Opportunities Won (Count) | (Value) 

Measure the number of and total dollar value of proposals and quotes that have been successfully converted into sales, reflecting the effectiveness in making recommendations to clients and revenue impact of efforts. 



Net New MRR Won 

Track the increase in monthly recurring revenue resulting from upselling or cross-selling to the existing client base. 



Job Requirements

A home office set up that meets the following:

Computer: A working computer with a minimum of 8GB RAM and one of the following:

AMD Ryzen 5 or 7 (2000 series or newer), or

Excellent command of the English language both spoken and written

title: Service Coordinator
description:
Job Description

The Service Coordinator’s purpose is to provide a positive, warm and welcoming response to all communications received from clients by phone and
. They help organize and facilitate the flow of work through the Service Department, including the managing of tickets, scheduling of on-site technical resources, monitoring of all work on each Service team, holding teams accountable for work not being completed in a timely fashion, and entering new work into the ticketing system for completion by Service. 



Job Responsibilities

Answer incoming calls during shift hours and coordinate support tickets while ensuring coverage and client satisfaction.

Triage tickets properly by ensuring contacts, types, subtypes, priority, resource, and detailed ticket summary, etc. are accurate.

Adherence to Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) relating to ticket creation.

Coordinate dispatch of onsite resources as needed.

Follow procurement process with incoming equipment for service tickets.

Auditing and closure of completed tickets.

Perform follow-up when a client requests an update.

Use ConnectWise to create, review and manage service tickets for the entire Service Department. This includes editing tickets, handling workflows, changing ticket statuses, and coordinating with internal staff to identify specific issues or problems preventing work from being completed.

Regular review of all current Service Department tickets, to include responding to
-originated tickets to let the customer know it has been received, to identify high-priority tickets and notify the appropriate Service staff, and to identify tickets which are not being handled promptly.

Use internal and external knowledge bases and resources to research and resolve issues independently, as well as to assist in documenting coordinator procedures and policies.

Help the team identify trends, follow up on patterns, and address gaps in ticket handling.

Complete any other tasks as assigned by ITS management.



Job KPI's

SLA response time / Time to Triage

Tickets audited per week

Answered calls per week

Live answer all calls



Job Qualifications

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Exceptional interpersonal skills, with a focus on rapport-building, listening and questioning skills.

At least 6 months of Customer Service Experience.

Culturally Fit.

Experience with Managed Service Providers (MSPs) is highly desirable.

Flexible to work during daytime or after hours - Pacific Standard Time.

A home office set up that meets the following:

Computer: A working computer with a minimum of 8GB RAM and one of the following:

title: HR Sourcing Associate (Project Based - WFH)
description:
Job Description

The Sourcing Associate is responsible for proactively identifying, attracting, and engaging top talent to build a strong candidate pipeline for current and future hiring needs. They collaborate closely with recruiters and hiring managers to support the company’s talent acquisition strategy.



Job Responsibilities

Candidate Sourcing:

Proactively source candidates using job boards, LinkedIn, social media, and other platforms.

Conduct targeted searches for hard-to-fill and specialized roles.

Utilize Boolean search strategies and other creative sourcing techniques.



Talent Pool Management:

Build and maintain a database of potential candidates for current and future hiring needs.

Organize talent pools by role type (Support, Mid-level, Specialized).

Track sourcing activity and candidate statuses in internal tools.



Initial Outreach:

Draft and send engaging outreach messages to potential candidates.

Conduct preliminary screening to verify candidate interest and availability.

Forward qualified profiles to recruiters for next steps.



Collaboration and Reporting:

Work closely with recruiters and the team lead to align sourcing efforts with hiring priorities.

Provide daily or weekly reports on sourcing activities, including candidate pipelines and outreach response rates.

Identify sourcing challenges and suggest solutions



Job Qualifications

At least 1 year of recruitment or sourcing experience, ideally in a fast-paced environment and offshore accounts.

Familiarity with Boolean searches, job boards, and ATS platforms.

Strong written communication skills for candidate outreach.

Organized, proactive, and detail-oriented.

Able to follow structured sourcing procedures and meet deadlines.

Proactive, adaptable, and goal-oriented — comfortable working independently but aligned with team goals.



Job Requirements

A home office set up that meets the following:

A working computer (minimum 8gb RAM), i5 Windows10 or BigSur for Mac

Stable internet connection (at least 5mbps download and upload)

HD webcam/camera

A quality headset with noise cancellation feature for meetings

A mobile phone that has the capacity to install the Microsoft Authentication app

Able to provide NBI Clearance (for PH applicants).



Compensation

Pay rate starts at Php 49,950.00 and may vary by experience and location.



Employment Terms

Project-based for 6 months — renewable depending on hiring needs and performance.

Work hours: Flexible but aligned with core team hours (1pm - 5pm Pacific time) to ensure collaboration. Not exceeding 40 hours per week.

Semi-monthly, with clear deliverables tied to their output (e.g., number of qualified candidates sourced weekly).

No regular employee benefits.

title: System Administrator I
description:

Join Intelligent Technical Solutions, a dynamic and growing company, as our System Administrator. We're looking for a collaborative problem-solver with excellent customer service skills and a detail-oriented mindset. title: Sales & Branding Associate for a Fast-Growing Internet Company
description:
We are not hiring a typical customer support rep/sales & branding associate.



We are hiring someone who can sell, think, and move deals forward.



We are a fast-growing tech company in the branding and domain space, helping startups and businesses find and secure premium domain names. This role sits at the intersection of sales, branding, and customer interaction. You will directly influence revenue and help customers make high-impact decisions.



We work on Central Standard Time (US). This role will primarily cover standard office hours (9am CST to 5pm CST) and possible weekend shifts. The final schedule will be determined.



***What You Will Be Doing (Read Carefully)***

This is a sales and client-facing role, not a passive support position.



You will:

-->Guide prospects in choosing and purchasing domain names

-->Move conversations toward closed deals

-->Support negotiations between buyers and sellers

-->Work with domain owners to optimize and manage portfolios

-->Participate in branding-related initiatives tied to sales

-->Identify opportunities to increase conversion and revenue

-->Think critically in real time without relying on scripts



***What We Are Looking For (Non-Negotiable)***

-->Sales mindset with a focus on closing and progressing deals

-->Strong written and verbal communication skills

-->Ability to build trust quickly with prospects and clients

-->Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment

-->Ability to multitask and prioritize independently

-->Resourceful problem solver who takes ownership

-->High level of urgency and accountability



Bonus (Not Required, But Valuable)

-->Experience in sales, branding, or domain names

-->Experience in client-facing roles

-->Comfortable handling calls and real-time customer interaction



What Matters Most

We hire for attitude and thinking ability.



If you:

-->Wait to be told what to do, this is not for you

-->Avoid responsibility, this is not for you

-->Just want a simple task-based role, this is not for you



If you:

-->Like solving problems

-->Enjoy helping people make decisions

-->Want to grow into sales and business roles



Then we will train you and invest in your growth.





***How to Apply***



Reply with:

(1) Your cover letter. Include the word “POSITIVE” in the first sentence

(2) In the last sentence:

-->Why are you uniquely qualified for this role

-->And your favorite hobby or activity

If any part is missing, your application will not be considered.



***Final Note***

We are growing fast and hiring immediately.



This role is for people who want to learn sales, build real skills, and grow quickly.



Fortune favors the bold.

title: Technical Sales Support Specialist
description:
HOW TO APPLY:



Fill out the Application form below:





Company: FSW Group (Welsford and ValveMan)

Hours: Full-time, aligned with 8:00am - 5:00pm Eastern Time

Reports to: Sales / Technical Leadership

Compensation: $4 - $8 per hour (based on experience)



ABOUT US



The FSW Group that is inclusive of Welsford and Valveman, is a family-owned, solution-focused distributor of valves and instrumentation with over 60 years of experience in the industrial, sanitary, and high-purity markets. We pride ourselves on expert service, high responsiveness, and a collaborative, supportive team culture.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



We’re looking for someone who loves solving technical puzzles, keeps things organized, and gets satisfaction from helping a sales team win. This is a behind-the-scenes role with real impact: you’ll be the person who makes sure the right product gets specified, the right documents get filed, and nothing falls through the cracks.



The ideal candidate is one of two people:



- An engineer (Mechanical, Chemical, Aeronautical, or Industrial) who’s technically sharp, detail-oriented,and eager to learn the valve and instrumentation world.

- An experienced valve or instrumentation professional who knows the products, speaks the language, and can hit the ground running on product selection and application support — degree or no degree.



If you’re strong on process and hustle, we can teach the rest.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Product Selection & Technical Support



- Receive application details from our sales team (fluid type, pressure/temperature, flow, materials, connections, actuation, cleanliness requirements, and more) and translate them into the right product recommendation.

- Select and specify across our line card: control valves, regulators, actuated valves, ball/butterfly/diaphragm valves, sanitary and high-purity components, steam specialties, safety relief, and basic instrumentation.

- Perform or support valve sizing and document assumptions clearly.

- Become the internal expert on key manufacturer lines (such as Jordan Valves and Steriflow).

- Coordinate with vendors for technical confirmation, lead times, and quote support.

- Produce short, confident
-ready summaries the sales team can send directly to customers.



Documentation Management



This is a core part of the role — not an afterthought. You’ll be responsible for making sure every order is fully

documented and nothing gets missed.



- Review and process incoming technical documents: Material Test Reports (MTRs), Certificates of Conformance (COCs), test certifications, and other quality documents.

- Map received documents to specific valve tags and line items on each order.

- Track which documents have been received vs. outstanding and follow up with vendors to close gaps.

- Serve as the central point of contact for documentation requirements across the Welsford organization.

- Maintain clean, organized records in our systems so that anyone can pick up an order and know exactly where things stand.



Order Tracking & Expediting



- Confirm that purchase orders have been received and acknowledged by vendors.

- Proactively monitor open orders for delivery delays or issues.

- Raise delays to the appropriate internal tea
mbers and help coordinate solutions.

- Generate quotes in our Prophet21 ERP system for the outside sales team.

- Serve as a central point of contact for order status across the company.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



- Strong product knowledge and selection skills across the FSW Group offering - especially control valves and regulators, with the ability to size, specify, and select the correct solution for the application.

- Quick turnaround from inquiry to recommended solution, with clear documentation of what was selected and why.

- High accuracy (fewer re-quotes/returns/technical corrections) driven by clear, complete application data captured up front.

- A fully documented order file: every MTR, COC, and certification mapped to the right tag, every time.

- No surprises on open orders — proactive communication and follow-through on expediting.

- Write-ups and quote docs the sales team can forward directly to customers without editing.

- A team-first reputation: reliable, collaborative, and easy to work with.



QUALIFICATIONS



You’ll be a great fit if you have:



- A degree in Mechanical, Chemical, Aeronautical, or Industrial Engineering — or equivalent hands-on technical experience.

- 3+ years working with valves, instrumentation, or process equipment (or strong aptitude and a fast learning curve).

- The ability to read and interpret P&IDs, datasheets, technical specs, and IOM documents.

- Strong written English — clean, professional, and customer-ready.

- A natural inclination toward organization: you follow a process, document your work, and close the loop.



Bonus points for:



- Control valve/regulator sizing familiarity (or eagerness to learn quickly)

- Experience supporting pharma, food & beverage, OEM skids, utilities, or power

- CRM/ERP experience (Pipedrive, QuickBooks, BigCommerce, or similar)

- Familiarity with sanitary/high-purity standards and materials



HOW WE WORK

Fully remote, with collaboration via
, chat, and video with our U.S.-based team.

Structured and process-driven — we use templates and SOPs so nothing gets missed.

Security-minded: follows strong password/device hygiene and company data practices

title: Controller
description:
Quantum Accounting Associates is a complete outsourced accounting firm providing bookkeeping, controller, and fractional CFO services to growth-minded businesses. We partner with multiple clients across industries to provide financial clarity, improve processes, and support better decision-making.

We are looking for a Controller who is highly organized, analytical, client-focused, and experienced in managing accounting operations for multiple clients in a fast-paced environment.

Position Overview

The Controller will oversee accounting functions for a portfolio of clients, manage financial reporting, support month-end close, improve processes, and deliver financial analysis that helps clients understand their numbers and make informed decisions.

Responsibilities

mbers, and leadership

Qualifications

• 5+ years of progressive accounting experience

• 2+ years in a Controller, Assistant Controller, or senior accounting role preferred

• Strong understanding of GAAP and financial reporting

• Experience managing multiple clients or entities preferred

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Advanced Excel skills required

• Experience with QuickBooks Online and other cloud-based systems preferred

• Strong communication and client service skills

Why Join Us

At Quantum Accounting Associates, we help clients turn financial data into clarity and 
ntum. This is a great opportunity for a skilled accounting professional who enjoys working across multiple businesses, solving problems, and providing meaningful insight.

title: Video Editor (Long-Form YouTube)
description:
Video Editor for Real Estate Marketing Content (Long-Form YouTube)

Type: Remote, Contractor (with potential for ongoing work)

Rate: Competitive, based on experience and skill



The Role:



We’re looking for a skilled, reliable, and creative video editor to join our content team. Your primary responsibility will be editing 10-30 minute long-form YouTube videos for real estate professionals. The videos are educational, engaging, and strategically designed for lead generation — so quality and storytelling are key.



This is NOT a chop-up-and-export gig. We're looking for someone who understands pacing, structure, branding, and how to create a video that actually performs.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Editing 10-30 minute YouTube videos with a strong sense of story, pacing, and visual engagement.

Incorporating branded intros, outros, and transitions.

Enhancing content with b-roll, graphics, subtitles, music, sound effects, etc.

Applying best practices for audience retention and organic growth.

Communicating with our internal team (and occasionally with clients) through our project management platform.

Following (and sometimes helping refine) video frameworks that align with our client strategy.

Working within deadlines, offering suggestions for improvements, and taking feedback like a pro.

Required Skills:



Proven experience editing YouTube content — ideally in the education, coaching, or real estate niche.

Strong command of tools like Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or equivalent.

Understanding of YouTube content trends, hooks, retention strategies, and visual storytelling.

High attention to detail (especially with audio, pacing, and cuts).

Ability to work independently and within a collaborative feedback loop.

Great communicator — written and verbal (English proficiency is a must).

Bonus: Experience working with real estate or vlog style content.

What Makes This Project Unique:



We aren’t guessing — we’re actively building our own real estate businesses using the same content strategies we teach and implement for our clients.

We coach agents nationwide on how to grow organically — no fluff, no filler.

We care deeply about video quality, brand consistency, and impact.

You’ll be working with a team that values creativity, clear communication, and long-term partnerships.

Ideal Fit: You’re a detail-oriented storyteller who knows how to turn raw footage into binge-worthy content. You get YouTube and what makes viewers stick around. You enjoy working with coaching-based or real estate content, and you're not afraid to speak up if something feels off. You take pride in your craft and want to be part of a growing movement that’s helping agents build a business — and life — they love.



Pay: Must be flexible with rate by the hour or per project.

title: Creative Designer (Graphic Design + Video Editing)
description:
Job Title: Creative Designer (Graphic Design + Video Editing)

We’re looking to grow our creative team with a versatile and highly skilled Creative Designer who excels in graphic design and video editing. If you’re passionate about creating engaging visual content and have an eye for detail, this is an exciting opportunity to work on high-impact projects for some of the biggest automotive brands in the world.

You’ll collaborate with our in-house U.S. creative team to bring concepts to life across digital channels from ad creatives and motion videos to social media content and beyond. If you also have experience with motion graphics, that’s a huge plus.

Nice to Have

Apply now and let’s build something amazing together.

.

title: Marketing Performance Creative Specialist
description:
We are a personalized party supply and gift business based in Canada. We create custom products - face cutouts, cupcake toppers, party banners, and more - that help people celebrate the people they love. We're a growing brand with a loyal customer base, and we're now ready to scale our reach through paid social advertising.



The Role

We're looking for a creative, driven Performance Creative Specialist who can produce high-quality marketing stills and video content that drives real traffic and conversions through
 and Instagram ads. This isn't just a design role - we need someone who thinks like a marketer, creates like a storyteller, and uses AI tools to work smarter and faster.

This role is a full-time position, but we are willing to consider part-time for the right candidate.



What You'll Do



Ad Creative Production

- Design scroll-stopping static ad creatives for
 and Instagram (product-focused, lifestyle, promotional)

- Produce short-form video ads — reels, slideshow ads, UGC-style clips, and product showcases

- Create multiple creative variants per campaign for A/B testing

- Edit and format content across all required ad dimensions and placements



AI-Powered Workflows

- Use AI tools to scale creative output efficiently

- Leverage AI to produce lifestyle mockups, background variations, and motion content without full photoshoot budgets

- Stay current on emerging AI creative tools and bring new efficiencies to the workflow



Performance Collaboration

- Interpret ad performance data and translate it into creative decisions (e.g., low hook rate = rethink opening 3 seconds)

- Work closely with the business owner to align creative with campaign goals

- Maintain consistent brand voice: warm, celebratory, personal, across all content



What We're Looking For



- Proven experience creating content specifically for
/Instagram paid ads (not just organic)

- Strong portfolio showing both design and video work - ideally with performance context (engagement, results)

- Proficiency in at least two of: Canva, Adobe Premiere, CapCut, After Effects

- Active user of AI creative tools or genuinely eager to build that skill

- Self-directed - able to take a brief and deliver without heavy hand-holding

- Strong eye for design, color, and composition with attention to brand consistency

- Experience in product-based businesses, eCommerce, or lifestyle brands is a big plus

- Excellent written communication skills in English



Nice to Have



- Experience with Meta Ads Manager or understanding of how ad creatives are structured and tested

- Knowledge of copywriting hooks and CTA placement for ad formats

- Experience with celebration, party, gift, or lifestyle niches



How to Apply



Please submit the following with your application:

- Your portfolio or links to ad creative work (static and video)

- A brief note (3–5 sentences) about why this role is a fit for you

- A list of AI tools you currently use in your creative workflow



Further details will be shared after initial review. Looking forward to meeting the right candidate!
