title: Bookkeeper — Real Estate Brokerage, Mortgage & Escrow | QuickBooks + SkySlope Books
description:
Bookkeeper — Real Estate Brokerage,

Mortgage & Escrow | QuickBooks + SkySlope Books



Budget: depending on experience and location

Hours: Approx. 23-30 hrs/week, ongoing contract

Contract Type: Part
-Term

Timezone: Must overlap Pacific Time (PST/PDT) by 4+ hours





OVERVIEW



We are a vertically integrated real estate company headquartered in Southern California, operating three entities: Link Brokerages, Inc. (real estate brokerage, ?200 agents, licensed in 7 states), First Link Mortgage (NMLS #
, multi-state mortgage brokerage), and Link Escrow (California DFPI-licensed escrow company). We need an experienced bookkeeper to own financial records across all three companies on an ongoing part-time basis.

All three entities use QuickBooks Online. The brokerage uses SkySlope Books, which has a live API integration with QuickBooks.



SCOPE OF WORK



• Full-cycle bookkeeping across three entities in QuickBooks Online

• Monthly bank and credit card reconciliations for all three companies

• Accounts payable and receivable management

• SkySlope Books reconciliation and QuickBooks API sync (Link Brokerages)

• Mortgage compliance bookkeeping: state licensing fees, RESPA-aligned cost categorization, origination expense tracking (First Link Mortgage)

• Escrow trust account support and California DFPI-compliant recordkeeping (Link Escrow)

• Monthly financial reports: P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow per entity

• Year-end close support and CPA package preparation

• Light administrative/office management support as needed



REQUIRED SKILLS



• QuickBooks Online — proficient (ProAdvisor certification a strong plus)

• 3+ years bookkeeping experience

• Multi-entity bookkeeping experience

• Real estate brokerage, mortgage, or escrow bookkeeping experience preferred

• Strong English communication — written and verbal

• Reliable high-speed internet and dedicated workspace

• Available for weekly video check-in with Pacific Time zone overlap



NICE TO HAVE



• SkySlope Books experience

• U.S. GAAP familiarity

• Experience supporting U.S.-based real estate, mortgage, or financial services companies

• Multi-state or multi-jurisdiction bookkeeping experience



HOW TO APPLY



Please include the following in your proposal:

• Your QuickBooks experience level and ProAdvisor status (if applicable)

• Any prior experience with real estate brokerages, mortgage companies, or escrow

• Your current timezone and available hours of Pacific Time overlap

• Your preferred hourly rate and expected weekly availability



Proposals that do not address real estate, mortgage, or escrow bookkeeping experience will be deprioritized.

title: Shopify Store Manager
description:
Greatgoodie LLC is a fast-growing fashion dropshipping company. We are looking for an experienced and driven Shopify Store Manager. In 2025, we generated $12M+ in revenue across multiple Shopify stores, serving customers in the US, UK, Germany, France, Australia, and Canada. Our fully remote team works across marketing, creative production, customer service, and operations.



About the Role:

You will be responsible for leading a team of 10 people, including product listers, media buyers, video editors, ads launchers, and photo editors. You will oversee the full frontend operation from store performance and conversion rate optimization to ad creatives and new store builds.



MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH:



- Shopify (store management, store builds, CRO)

- Fashion dropshipping (managing stores in this niche specifically)

- Frontend operations (ads, creatives, funnels, product pages)

- Leading and coordinating a marketing/creative team





Responsibilities:



1) Managing and leading a team of 10 across multiple frontend departments.

2) Overseeing product listing, ad creative production, and media buying.

3) Optimizing conversion rates across all active stores.

4) Building and launching new Shopify stores from the ground up.

5) Tracking KPIs across departments and improving processes continuously.

6) Coordinating between media buyers, editors, and product listers to ensure aligned output.

7) Identifying bottlenecks and implementing systems to improve team efficiency.



Applicants must:



- Have proven experience managing Shopify stores in a fashion or dropshipping context.

- Have experience leading a team of at least 5+ people.

- Be available full-time and during weekends

- Be organized, process-driven, and results-oriented.

- Be available to start immediately or within short notice.



Application Instructions:



If you believe you are a good fit, please apply with a short introduction (Loom) video of yourself (be original, do not read from a script).



Answer the following questions in your application (not in your video, answer the questions in writing):



1) How many years of experience do you have with Shopify?

2) What was your most recent role, and what were your day-to-day responsibilities?

3) What type of e-commerce or dropshipping stores did you manage (markets, niches, number of stores)?

4) Do you have experience with Klaviyo? If yes, describe how you have used it.

5) Have you managed or built Shopify stores in the fashion niche specifically?

6) Can you describe your experience with frontend operations (ads, creatives, funnels, product pages)?

7) What are your experiences with Meta and Google ads?

8) Are you available full-time?

9) Are you available on weekends if needed?

10) Do you currently have other jobs or clients?

11) When can you start?



We are looking for someone who takes full ownership, leads with clarity, and consistently drives results. Looking forward to to your proposal!

title: Amazon Wholesale / Distributor Finder (FBA)

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 3b
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter
description:
We help local service businesses (cleaners, groomers, contractors) get found online and grow. We are building a small, high-performance outreach team and are looking for a strong caller to grow with us.



Please read carefully before applying.



This role starts with a 1-hour paid test. Hours will increase quickly based on performance.



------------------------------------------------------------

WHAT YOU WILL DO

------------------------------------------------------------

- Make outbound calls to local business owners

- Follow a conversational script (natural tone, not robotic)

- Qualify interest and set appointments for follow-up

- Log call outcomes in our CRM



------------------------------------------------------------

REQUIREMENTS

------------------------------------------------------------

- Clear, confident English (very important)

- Must sound natural on the phone, NOT robotic

- Cold calling or appointment-setting experience

- Comfortable handling rejection and staying composed

- Available during U.S. daytime hours

- Reliable, coachable, and ready to grow



------------------------------------------------------------

WORK SCHEDULE

------------------------------------------------------------

- Starts at 2 hours/day, 3 days/week

- Calls must be made between 9 AM and 2 PM Eastern Time or an agreed-upon time

- Hours will increase based on performance



If you are looking for full-time or guaranteed hours immediately, this role is NOT a fit.



------------------------------------------------------------

PAY

------------------------------------------------------------

- Starting rate: $3 to $5/hour depending on experience

- Opportunity to increase hours quickly based on results



------------------------------------------------------------

HOW TO APPLY

------------------------------------------------------------

Please complete ALL of the following. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



1. Send a voice recording reading this script:



"Hi there! I was hoping you could help me out.

I am working on a local business report for [Business Name] regarding your Google listing, and I just need to know who the best person is to send the PDF to?

We noticed that while your business is listed on Google, it is missing a dedicated website link.

Catherine, our founder, ran a quick audit to show you how much traffic and how many calls you are likely missing out on because of that gap."



2. Briefly describe your cold calling experience (2 to 4 sentences, be specific), via voice recording.



3. Confirm you understand the schedule:

   - 2 hours/day, 3 days/week

   - Starts with a 1-hour paid test

   - Hours grow based on performance



------------------------------------------------------------

We are looking for someone confident on the phone, reliable, and ready to grow with us. Please perform well; this will become long-term, higher-hour work.

------------------------------------------------------------

title: INSTAGRAM CONTENT RESEARCH & EDITOR
description:
ABOUT THIS ROLE

I am building a  Instagram page in the Christian men's niche focused on exposing evil in the world, spiritual warfare, and helping men find their God-given purpose. I am building this from the ground up.

 

I am looking for a semi-full time VA (approximately 30 hours per week) to take over content research and video editing for the Instagram. Your job is to make sure we never run out of content.

 

WHAT YOU WILL DO

 

1. Content Research (Primary Job)

• Scroll Instagram, YouTube, and podcast platforms daily to find viral clips that match our brand

• Categories: child safety, spiritual warfare, Hollywood occult, masculinity crisis, faith-based 
nts

• Submit 5+ clip ideas per day for approval using our content tracker

• Write a short note on why each clip fits our brand and suggest a hook angle

• Search specific podcasts we assign (Shawn Ryan Show, Jack Neel, etc.)

 

2. Video Editing

• Edit reels in CapCut or desktop editor to match our exact format (full training provided) - very simple editing



• Deliver 2-3 finished reels per day

 

3. Copywriting (with AI assistance)

• Use our AI system to generate hooks, headlines, and captions for each video

• Submit copy alongside each video for approval before posting

 

WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

• Fluent in English, reading and writing

• Understands Western culture, American news, and current events

• Active Instagram user who understands what makes content go viral

• Comfortable with CapCut or video editing software

• Organized, self-motivated, and able to work independently

• Comfortable working with faith-based, conservative Christian content

• Bonus: experience with content research or social media management

 

REQUIREMENTS

• Reliable internet and a computer or laptop

• Available 6 hours per day, Monday through Friday

• Able to communicate on WhatsApp daily

• Submit a short end-of-day update every working day

 

PAY & HOURS

• $4.20 USD per hour

• Approximately 30 hours per week (~$500/month)

• Paid weekly via PayPal

• Performance bonuses available for viral videos and page growth. (The more video ideas the more we can post & Grow)

• Opportunity to grow into full-time as the page scales

 

HOW TO APPLY

Send a message with the following:

 

• Your name and a short intro about yourself

• Your experience with video editing and social media

• Your available hours and time zone (only need SOME overlap in the US EVENING to do review)

• BONUS: Send a loom video or video recording of your application so I can hear your English and see who you are :)

• Start your message with the word TRENCHES so we know you read the full posting

 

Applications without the word TRENCHES will not be considered.

 

This is not just a job. This is a mission.

We are building something that matters. We want people who feel that.



My mission is to help men become aware of the evil in the world > to follow me > and then I will build a community to make an impact.

title: Short Term Rental Property Manager
description:
Overview:

We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant to support our property management operations. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in client and tenant management, maintenance coordination, and administrative tasks. Experience with short-term rentals is required, and mid-term and co-living rental experience is strongly preferred. Knowledge of property management software is required, especially in the short term rental space. 



This is a remote that requires 6 to 8 hours of work per day, with an opportunity for more pay, time and responsibilities depending on performance. We are aggressively looking to expand the business so there is opportunity for growth within the first year and beyond. This company is also heavily incentive-based, with multiple bonus programs based on project or task completion.



Key Responsibilities:

Guest Management:

- Handle tenant inquiries, lease agreements, and communication regarding property-related issues.

- Intimate knowledge of systems and processes relevant to short term rental management

- Track tenant payments, issues, and documentation.

- Assist with tenant screening, move-in/move-out processes, and lease renewals.

- Proactively anticipating needs of tenants and guests with a service and hospitality-driven mindset



Maintenance Management:

- Coordinate maintenance and repair requests, ensuring timely resolution of issues.

- Work with cleaners, vendors, and maintenance teams to ensure efficient service delivery.

- Maintain records of work orders and repairs.



Client Management:

- Maintain regular communication with property owners and potential clients.

- Provide updates on property performance, tenant issues, and upcoming lease renewals.

- Assist in the onboarding of new clients and tenants, ensuring smooth transitions and client satisfaction.

- Proactively anticipating needs of clients with a service and hospitality-driven mindset



Bookkeeping & Accounting (strongly preferred, but not required):

- Assist with rent collection, invoicing, and managing payments.

- Maintain financial records and assist in reconciling accounts as needed.

- Track expenses and provide regular updates to management regarding the financial status of properties.



General Administrative Tasks:

- Expert knowledge of AI tools strongly preferred

- Support and maintain systems and processes specific to short-term rental and mid-term rental management, including property management software, Airbnb, Furnished Finder and other platforms.

- Manage and organize documents, contracts, and property records.

- Schedule appointments and coordinate virtual property showings or inspections.

- Assist in drafting and responding to
s, phone calls, and other correspondence as needed.



Software Management:

- Utilize property management software tools to streamline operations and keep records up to date.



Digital Marketing (Preferred but Not Required):

- Support social media marketing efforts to build the brand, attract potential tenants and promote properties.

- Assist in crafting content and updating social media channels as needed.



Qualifications:

Experience:

- Proven experience in STR property management or real estate support roles required.

- Strong knowledge of property management software tools (e.g., GHL, 
, RentRedi, Hospitable, etc.) is strongly preferred.

- Experience in short-term, mid-term and co-living rentals is strongly preferred



Skills:

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills (strong English proficiency required).

- Technically savvy and comfortable learning and using new software tools.

- Strong organizational and time management skills with the ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously.

- Ability to proactively identify challenges and find effective solutions.



Soft Skills:

- Extremely organized and detail-oriented.

- Ability to work independently and manage tasks without direct supervision.

- Ability to ask questions for guidance when necessary.

- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to think critically.

- High level of professionalism and strong interpersonal skills.



Hours:



6 to 8 hours per day, with flexibility in scheduling based on needs. Opportunity to increase pay and time depending on performance.



Compensation:

- Competitive hourly rate based on experience

- Bonus commissions available for every successful client acquisition, tenant placement and other bonus incentives



How to Apply:

Please send your resume and a self-recorded video link answering the following questions. If you don't have experience for a particular answer, that's fine. Simply move on to the next question.



Describe one underperforming short-term rental you managed. What were the key metrics you reviewed, what changes did you make, and what were the results in the following weeks/months?



A guest messages at 9:45 PM saying the home isn’t clean. What is your immediate response, and what specific steps do you take in the next hour?



Share a time you sensed a guest was unhappy before they directly complained. What were the signs, and how did you handle it?



An owner says occupancy is down 12% in the last 2 months and blames management. How do you respond, and what data do you reference?



What is one system or process you built or significantly improved in an STR operation? What was the problem, what did you change, and what improved?



What PMS, channel managers, and pricing tools have you used? How do you set up a new property from start to fully operational inside a PMS?



What operational differences exist between short-term rentals and midterm or rent-by-the-room models? What changes in screening, policies, or systems?



If managing 20 properties, how do you structure your daily and weekly workflow to prevent dropped tasks?



If bookings are slow 21 days out, what steps do you take before lowering price?



Describe a situation where you escalated an issue to an owner. Why did you escalate instead of resolving it yourself?



What makes you stand out from other interested candidates?



Ask any questions you have about the role?

title: Credentialing Associate – Remote
description:

accuracy and compliance of our healthcare provider credentials across various states. If you 

thrive in a dynamic environment and are passionate about operational excellence, we invite you 

to apply and contribute to our growing organization.



Responsibilities:



Contracting and Credentialing Support:

• Assist in managing the credentialing processes for healthcare providers nationwide, ensuring adherence to accreditation and regulatory standards.

• Verify qualifications, education, and licensure of providers, maintaining an up-to-date credentials database.

title: Customer Service Team Lead | Full-Time
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company in the health and wellness space, managing multiple successful online brands. We are hiring a Customer Service Team Lead to work closely with the CEO in overseeing daily customer support operations, leading a small team, and ensuring consistently high-quality customer experience.

The ideal candidate has strong written communication skills, excellent problem-solving abilities, high empathy, and proven leadership experience. Experience in outreach or cold

-based sales support. Once you are fully settled and consistently performing well in this role, it will transition into a customer service team lead position.





Key Responsibilities:

Manage and execute
-based outreach and sales support activities

Oversee daily
 and chat support operations 

Help document, improve, and refine SOPs, workflows, and customer service processes

Handle complex or escalated customer concerns. Ensure timely and proper resolution of high-priority cases

Act as the bridge between customers and higher management when needed

Ensure consistency in customer service quality across the team

Support hiring, onboarding, and continuous upskilling of tea
mbers.

Conduct ongoing skill development sessions

Work closely with other departments (Ops, Sales, Tech) to resolve issues and improve customer experience

Assist the CEO with Cafely wholesale inquiries, including
-based sales support tasks



Requirements

3–5 years of customer service experience 

1–3 years of leadership or team lead experience in a customer support environment

Strong English communication skills (written & verbal) 

Hands-on experience with CRM and customer support tools (e.g., Zendesk, Gorgias, Freshdesk, or similar)

Strong problem-solving, decision-making, and leadership skills

Ability to work independently in a remote setup with minimal supervision

Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple priorities



Schedule (Strict)

9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST (12:00 AM – 8:00 AM PH Time)

Must be fully available for US hours 



Nice to Have

E-commerce experience 

Experience with AI tools or automation tools 

Experience in scaling support teams

Experience supporting both customer service and basic sales/wholesale inquiries

Exposure to AI tools or automation for customer support





What We Offer

Full-time remote role

Growth opportunity into higher leadership roles

 invitation for the next steps.

title: Full-Time Tiktok / UGC Editor
description:
TikTok Video Editor (Full-Time)

I’m looking for a full-time TikTok video editor to produce high-volume short-form content across multiple pages.

This role is focused on fast, efficient editing — simple edits, but strong pacing and attention to detail are key.

You will be making TikTok videos using Capcup or the video editing software of your choice. The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward. Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:

Cutting dead space in talking head videos

Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

Producing b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage

Workload

• 10–20 videos per day

• Consistent daily output

Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:

Basic talking head - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.





Talking head with overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video.





B-roll content - you will be provided a voice over and need to work through the footage to find fitting visuals. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.





You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Requirements:

Attention to detail

STRONG English

strong internet connection

Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Good working with a team

Availability to work 6-8h a day (with potential for increased salary)

Able to work 5-6 days per week

Can take payments through Wise

PH or similar time zone



$
/month + bonuses with (Long-term role with growth potential)

YOU WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED IF THIS ISN'T COMPLETED

title: Account Manager
description:
Benefits:



Work From Home

Guaranteed $500 USD per week

Additional available if you perform well

Unlimited potential through residual because you earn as long as your customers say with Fleetsmarts



What we do as a company:



We give a fuel card away for free to truckers in the US that have discounts on diesel fuel. We have add-on products that make the sale more attractive to the customer. Customers can get weekly credit lines for their fuel card if they use our factoring service, which is akin to a pay-day loan service for businesses, but we provide this service for free. We also have a service to help reduce the down payment on their insurance. We market to new trucking companies that are just starting out and all our products are designed to help them get going faster than they would be able to on their own.



What you do:



You call warm appointments for truckers who have already expressed interest

You explain how we can help them

95% of people say yes

The key is following up until they actually start using our services







We set up 4 interviews per day in between the hours of 4:00 and 6:00pm

We will choose one new Cat 3 Re-Engager per week.

After one week, if they don’t hit 60% patch rate, they are out.

For 5 weeks, if they hit high patch rate, we rotate them between Hannah and Cat 1s

We promote one each week to Cat 3 leads and replace our worst AM.











Key Responsibilities:

Proactively follow up on abandoned or inactive leads assigned to account managers.

Present and promote fuel card programs, factoring services, and insurance solutions to potential clients.

Assist customers with the activation of fuel cards and ensure a preferred payment method is added.

Offer factoring services and guide customers through the contract signing process to ensure completion and compliance

Qualifications:

Proven experience in sales, customer retention, or outbound calling (required)

Strong communication and negotiation skills

Confident handling high-volume outbound calls

Goal-oriented, persistent, and able to work independently

Organized and comfortable using CRM tools and office software

Positive attitude and ability to build rapport quickly.

title: Junior Accountant (AU Client) – Xero Preferred

Location: Remote (Work From Home)

Employment Type: Full Time

Work Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Manila Time



About the Role



Staff Connect Australia is recruiting on behalf of an established Australian business operating across multiple service divisions.



We are seeking a detail-oriented Junior Accountant to support the company’s financial operations, reporting, and compliance. This role will work closely with the Managing Director and senior tea
mbers, assisting in day-to-day accounting tasks while ensuring accuracy and timeliness in financial records.

Xero

GeoOp

Live Payments Portal

Airtable

Slack

Required Experience

- Company tax return support (liaising with external accountants as needed)

- Experience working with Australian clients or accounting firms



Key Responsibilities

Bookkeeping & Reconciliations

-Maintain accurate financial records in Xero for all entities

- Perform bank, credit card, and loan reconciliations

- Allocate GST codes and track job-related costs

- Review and code expense entries with proper documentation

-

Accounts Payable (Suppliers & Contractors)

- Verify invoice accuracy against purchase orders or job references

- Reconcile supplier statements and maintain positive relationships

- Process weekly contractor payments and maintain payout registers

-

Accounts Receivable (Customer Billing & Collections)

Payroll & Contractor Management

- Audit ove
 claims for accuracy and fairness

- Reconcile PAYG, superannuation, and leave balances

- Maintain employee and contractor payment records

- Post and reconcile all payroll journals



Balance Sheet, Assets & Financial Control

- Maintain reconciled balance sheets each month

- Manage the fixed asset register and depreciation schedules

- Record and monitor capital purchases (vehicles, IT, plant, and equipment)

- Administer dividend payments, director loans, and shareholder distributions

- Track intercompany transactions, retained earnings, and equity movements



BAS / IAS Preparation & Compliance

- Prepare monthly IAS and quarterly BAS for review

- Ensure GST and PAYG data is accurate

- Maintain full working papers and supporting documentation

- Monitor ATO correspondence and ensure timely compliance



Financial & Operational Reporting

- Conduct variance analysis and identify cost-saving opportunities

Audit & Year-End Support

Key Skills & Qualifications

- Advanced Xero proficiency, including payroll, fixed assets, and reporting

- Strong knowledge of Australian BAS, GST, PAYG, and Superannuation compliance

- Experience managing balance sheets, dividends, and inter-entity accounts

- Excellent accounts payable, receivable, and reconciliation skills

- Strong analytical and financial reporting capability

- High attention to detail and accuracy

- Able to work independently and proactively identify risks or opportunities



Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- Balance sheets reconciled monthly with full supporting schedules

- Zero unexplained variances in payroll, assets, or BAS accounts

- Timely issuance of invoices and active debtor management

- Accurate and punctual supplier and contractor payments

- Management reports delivered with insightful commentary on trends and efficiencies

- Workforce utilization, cancellations, and discount impacts reported monthly

- BAS/IAS submissions prepared ahead of deadlines

- EOFY and audit documentation complete and delivered on time

title: Executive Assistant & Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
Be the driving force behind Portugal’s next major commercial marketplace.

About 


 is a premium commercial and business marketplace built to transform how Portugal connects buyers, sellers, agents, and investors.

We are building a platform that blends:

Verified Agents

Quality Business Listings

Commercial Properties

International buyer access (Atlanta, Taipei, Manila, Europe)



A trusted, modern, data?driven ecosystem



Porameta is not another listing website — it is a new standard for transparency, professionalism, and global reach in Portugal’s commercial and business market.

We launch mid?June 2026, and we are assembling a Manila digital team that will become the engine behind our growth.

Role: Digital Marketing Specialist (Manila)



You will be the pivot, the strategist, and the execution powerhouse behind Porameta’s launch and expansion.

This is not a routine marketing job.

This is a mission-critical role where your work directly shapes the success of a national marketplace.

You will work closely with:

The Founder 

The Porto operations team

The Porameta development team

International partners and markets

What You Will Lead

1. Launch Strategy & Execution

Build and execute the full digital launch plan for mid?June.

Coordinate with Porto team for agent outreach and business listing campaigns.

Manage pre-launch and post-launch funnels.

2. WhatsApp Automation & Agent Acquisition

Operate the WhatsApp outreach system to onboard real estate agents across Portugal.

Manage campaigns, templates, segmentation, and performance tracking.

Optimize conversion from prospect ? Verified Agent ? Featured Agent.

Your job is to turn Porameta’s vision into traction, visibility, and measurable growth.

3.Business Listings Growth

Support the acquisition of quality “Business for Sale” listings.

Create marketing funnels targeting business owners and brokers.

Build content and campaigns that attract sellers to list on Porameta.

4. Data, Analytics & Reporting

Track KPIs across all campaigns.

Build dashboards for agent acquisition, listing growth, and traffic.

Provide weekly insights to leadership

What You Must Bring

1. Strong Digital Marketing Experience

3–6 years in digital marketing, growth, or performance marketing.

Experience launching or scaling platforms, marketplaces, or SaaS is a major advantage.

2. Technical & Analytical Skills

Comfortable with automation tools, CRM systems, and campaign dashboards.

Able to work with data, segmentation, and performance metrics.



Experience with WhatsApp Business API, SMS automation, or lead funnels is a plus.



3. Content Creation Ability

Strong writing skills (English required).



Ability to create clean, premium, modern marketing materials.



Experience with social media, landing pages, and ad creatives.



4. High Ownership & Execution Power

Can operate independently with clear goals.



Can manage multiple campaigns simultaneously.



Can coordinate with international teams and adapt quickly.



5. Professionalism & Communication

Clear, respectful, structured communication style.

Ability to work with leadership and cross-border teams.

Strong sense of responsibility and mission.

title: Senior IT Engineer / IT Architect
description:
Job Title Senior IT Engineer / IT Architect

Department Managed Services & Client Solutions

Employment Type Full-Time

Location Remote – Philippines (US Overnight Shift)

Hours 2:00 PM – 11:00 PM PST (flexibility available, Mon–Fri)

Experience Required 5+ years in a senior IT/MSP or architecture role



ABOUT CIRCLE TWICE CONSULTING



Circle Twice Consulting is a Pacific Northwest-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) delivering IT management, cybersecurity, cloud solutions, and AI automation to small and mid-sized businesses across Washington and Oregon. We are a tight-knit, high-trust team that values technical depth, ownership, and a genuine commitment to our clients' success.

As we grow our technical practice, we are looking for a seasoned IT professional who can operate at both the strategic architecture level and the hands-on execution level — someone who can design solutions, resolve complex escalations, and elevate the engineers around them.



ROLE OVERVIEW



The Senior IT Engineer / IT Architect is a senior individual contributor and technical leader responsible for advanced client engagements, architecture design, Level 3 escalations, and mentoring junior technicians. You will serve as a utility-level resource — equally comfortable defining a Microsoft 365 security baseline for a 100-seat client as you are troubleshooting a complex Azure hybrid environment or leading a network redesign project.  This role is well-suited for a highly capable IT professional looking to grow their career with a US-based MSP that values expertise, autonomy, and long-term partnership.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Technical Design & Architecture

• Design and document Microsoft 365, Azure, and hybrid infrastructure solutions for SMB clients

• Lead architecture-level projects including tenant migrations, cloud transformations, and security hardening engagements

• Produce solution design documents, network diagrams, and implementation playbooks

• Evaluate and recommend technology solutions aligned with client business needs and budget

Level 3 Support & Escalation Handling

• Own and resolve complex Level 3 escalations across Microsoft 365, Azure, networking, and security domains

• Serve as the final internal escalation point before vendor support engagement

• Document root cause analyses and contribute to the internal knowledge base

Microsoft 365 & Security Operations

• Configure and manage Microsoft 365 security features: Defender for Business/Endpoint, Conditional Access, Intune MDM/MAM, Entra ID (Azure AD), and Purview

• Conduct Microsoft Secure Score reviews and implement hardening recommendations

• Support security i
 response including investigation and containment in M365 Defender

• Implement and manage MFA, SSPR, PIM, and identity governance policies

Networking & Infrastructure

• Design and troubleshoot LAN/WAN environments, VLANs, SD-WAN, and VPN configurations

• Support client firewall platforms (SonicWall, Fortinet, or similar)

• Assess and optimize network performance and security posture for client environments

Mentorship & Team Development

• Provide technical mentoring and guidance to Level 1 and Level 2 technicians

• Review junior technician documentation, ticket notes, and solutions for quality and accuracy

• Contribute to internal training, standard operating procedures, and onboarding materials



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS



Experience

• 5+ years of hands-on experience in a senior MSP, IT consulting, or enterprise IT role

• Demonstrated experience designing and managing Microsoft 365 environments at scale

• Strong working knowledge of Azure infrastructure services (VMs, VNets, Azure AD, Entra, Azure Backup, etc.)

• Solid networking background: TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, routing, VLANs, firewalls, VPN

• Experience supporting Windows Server environments (AD DS, GPO, DNS, DHCP, file services)

Microsoft 365 & Security Skills (In-Depth Required)

• Microsoft Defender for Business / Defender for Endpoint – policy management, alert triage, i
 response

• Entra ID / Azure Active Directory – Conditional Access, identity governance, PIM, MFA enforcement

• Microsoft Intune – device enrollment, compliance policies, app management (MDM/MAM)

• Exchange Online – mail flow, anti-spam, mail hygiene, shared mailboxes, migration

• Microsoft Purview – data loss prevention, sensitivity labels, compliance basics

• Microsoft Secure Score – assessment and remediation planning

Certifications (Required or Preferred)

• Required: Microsoft 365 Certified: Administrator Expert (MS-102) or equivalent

• Strongly Preferred: Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator Associate (AZ-104)

• Preferred: Microsoft Certified: Security, Compliance & Identity Fundamentals (SC-900) or SC-200

• Preferred: CompTIA Network+ or Security+, or equivalent vendor networking certification



NICE TO HAVE



• Experience with RMM/PSA platforms (ConnectWise, Autotask/Datto, NinjaRMM, etc.)

• Familiarity with NIST CSF, CIS Controls, or other security frameworks

• Exposure to BCDR platforms (Veeam, Datto BCDR, Azure Backup)

• Experience with Microsoft Teams Rooms or Teams Phone deployments

• PowerShell scripting experience for M365 and Azure automation

• Familiarity with AI tools and Microsoft Copilot deployments

• Prior experience working US business hours remotely from the Philippines



WORK SCHEDULE & LOGISTICS



This role is designed for a Philippines-based professional working a US overnight / Pacific Time shift. Our core client base operates in the Pacific Northwest (PST/PDT), and this schedule ensures strong overlap with late-day US business hours and early evening escalation coverage.

Core Hours (PST) 2:00 PM – 11:00 PM PST (flexible start 1:00–3:00 PM by arrangement)

Philippines Local Time 6:00 AM – 3:00 AM PHT (approx.) | Overnight role

Schedule Monday – Friday, 40 hours/week



WHAT WE OFFER



• Competitive compensation 

• US-based client exposure with real project ownership and architectural responsibility

• Career growth in a growing MSP with an expanding AI and cybersecurity practice

• Collaborative, low-bureaucracy environment with direct access to leadership

• Paid time off and recognition for certifications and continued learning

• Opportunity to become a key long-term technical pillar of our team



HOW TO APPLY



To apply, please submit the following:

• Your current resume or CV with a 1-3 minute video of you explaining why you'd be a good fit for this position.  Job submissions without an introductory video will NOT be considered.  

• A brief cover message describing your relevant experience with Microsoft 365 security and any MSP background

• A list of current Microsoft certifications held



We review applications on a rolling basis. Qualified candidates will be contacted within 5–7 business days for an initial video interview.



Circle Twice Consulting is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, religion, nationality, or any other protected characteristic.

title: Dermatology Medical Virtual Assistant
description:
I’m a Virtual Assistant posting this position on behalf of our dermatology clinic. We have a strong team of VAs, several of whom have been with us for over a year, some even longer! We value growth, long-term collaboration, and making sure everyone has a positive work experience, including paid breaks and lunch.



We’re looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Medical Virtual Assistant to help with patient communication, scheduling, and scribing. This role is fully remote but requires availability during Pacific Time hours. 



Key Responsibilities

Schedule and confirm patient appointments, including consultations, follow-ups, and treatments

Conduct patient reminder calls/texts and provide appointment directions

Answer calls, greet patients virtually, and route inquiries to the appropriate staff

Provide information on dermatology procedures and treatments

Accurately document patient encounters in the EHR (scribing)

Maintain and update patient records, ensuring accuracy and confidentiality

Upload incoming faxes and organize them in Google Drive or the correct filing system

Assist with insurance eligibility checks and prior authorizations

Coordinate prescription refills with pharmacies

Respond to patient
s and chat messages promptly and professionally

Schedule representative lunches and manage related logistics

Handle ad hoc administrative tasks as needed



Required Qualifications

Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree in a related field

Minimum 1 year experience as a Medical Virtual Assistant, scribe, or similar role (dermatology preferred but not required)

Strong communication skills with a patient-focused approach

Knowledge of medical terminology and clinical workflows

Ability to work 40 hours/week during Pacific Time hours, including weekends, while maintaining a 5-day workweek

Comfortable using video, Hubstaff, and sharing screens during shifts

Proficiency in Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, etc.)

Understanding of HIPAA and patient data confidentiality

Strong organizational and multitasking skills

Adaptability to learn and navigate new software quickly



Preferred Qualifications

Experience in dermatology or a similar medical specialty

Familiarity with prior authorizations and/or medical billing

Proficiency with EHR/EMR systems

Tech-savvy, with the ability to troubleshoot basic technical issues



Technical Requirements

Mac desktop or laptop (8GB RAM, Core i5 or above)

USB noise-cancelling headset

Working webcam

Wired internet connection with minimum 75 Mbps

Ability to conduct video calls and screen shares during shifts



Trial Period

Candidates will undergo a one-week paid trial period to evaluate performance, workflow compatibility, and overall fit for the role

This trial also allows candidates to assess if the position aligns with their expectations and availability

Continued engagement or employment will be determined based on mutual fit and performance during the trial period



Application Instructions

To apply, please submit a single Google Drive folder (PDFs only, view access enabled) with:

1) Updated resume

2) Screenshot of typing speed test (minimum 60–80 WPM)

3) Screenshot of internet speed test (minimum 75 Mbps wired)

4) Screenshot or list of full work setup and specifications



Important: Include “SkinCare CS” in your subject line to confirm you’ve read the full job description.

title: Funding Specialist
description:
???? 1. Client Pre-Qualification (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



Before ANY application goes out:



Pull & review full credit report

Break down:

Score (real FICO, not Credit Karma BS)

Utilization %

Inquiries (last 6–12 months)

Negative accounts

Income verification (W2 / self-employed / stated)

Debt-to-income ratio



???? Then give a clear funding expectation:



“You qualify for $15K–$30K”

“You’re NOT ready yet — fix this first”



No guessing. No hype.

???? 2. Build Funding Strategy (This is where money is made)



They must create a custom plan per client:



Which lenders to hit first:

Navy Federal Credit Union (relationship-based)

PenFed Credit Union (strong approvals)

SoFi (personal loans)

Order of applications (VERY important)

Timing (same day vs spaced out)

Type of funding:

Credit cards (0% APR)

Personal loans

Business funding



???? If they don’t build strategy ? they’re useless. Period.



???? 3. Client Funding File Management



Every client should have a funding file:



Credit report saved

Income docs

Login info (securely)

Application tracking sheet:

Date applied

Result (approved/denied/pending)

Amount approved

Notes on lender behavior



???? This becomes YOUR database = long-term goldmine



???? 4. Application Execution (No sloppy work)



They must:



Submit applications accurately

Avoid red flags (wrong income, mismatched info)

Use correct employer formatting

Handle reconsideration calls if denied



???? A real specialist can turn a denial into an approval.



?? 5. Reconsideration & Follow-Ups



Most people are lazy here—this is where you win.



Call underwriting departments

Push manual reviews

Submit docs if needed

Follow up until final decision



???? This alone can add $10K–$50K extra approvals



???? 6. Credit Optimization (BEFORE funding)



They should guide clients like:



Pay down cards to under 10–30%

Remove small collections (if needed)

Don’t apply randomly

Add primary tradelines (if strategy calls for it)



???? This ties directly into your credit repair services ????



???? 7. Business Funding Setup (BIG MONEY PLAY)



If client wants business funding:



Make sure LLC is structured properly

EIN verified

Business address legit (no BS virtual address flagged)

Help client:

Set up business bank account

Build relationship with banks



???? This is where you hit $50K–$150K+ deals



???? 8. Client Communication (No ghosting)



They must:



Update client after every application

Explain approvals/denials clearly

Set realistic expectations



???? If your clients feel confused = you lose referrals



???? 9. Weekly Reporting to YOU



You’re the boss—track everything.



They should send weekly:



of clients processed

Total approvals $

Total denials

Pending deals

Problems / bottlenecks



???? Run it like a real business, not vibes.



???? 10. Upsell & Backend Revenue



This is where you scale HARD:



They should:



Identify clients ready for:

Higher limits

Business funding

Additional rounds

Push second funding rounds after 60–90 days



???? One client can turn into $100K+ lifetime funding

Part-time (20 hrs/week, with growth potential) | Remote | AEST-aligned



Are you the kind of person who reads a messy inbox and immediately sees the system that's missing?

Do you take ownership without being asked, flag problems before they become fires, and genuinely enjoy making a creative business run more smoothly than its founder ever could alone?

Then keep reading...



About I for Design Studio

We're a small-but-mighty brand and web design studio based on the Sunshine Coast, QLD Australia. Led by Indiah (Creative Director). We work with premium service-based businesses (think interior designers, lawyers, architects, creative studios, and wellness practices) who care deeply about how their brand shows up and want a digital presence that matches the quality of their work.



The work is great. The clients are great. And we need someone to make sure the business behind it all runs just as well as the creative.



What's in it for you:

• A creative director who will actually let you own your role, not micromanage it

• Inspiring, well-positioned clients across creative and wellness industries

• 20 hours per week to start, with real growth potential as the business scales

• Remote work with clear expectations and excellent communication

• A role where your initiative is actually noticed



What you'll own:

• Managing client communications: drafting responses, following up, keeping things moving

• Project management across multiple client deliverables using our systems and tools

• Keeping our internal operations tight: processes, workflows, task management

• Onboarding and offboarding clients smoothly

• Spotting gaps before I do and coming to me with solutions, not just problems

• Occasionally supporting with content scheduling, admin, and light marketing coordination



You're a fit if you:

• Have at least 2 years experience as an OBM, senior VA, or operations manager ideally in a creative service business

• Write in clear, professional English and can adapt your tone to suit a premium brand

• Are comfortable with project management tools (we use ClickUp)

• Can work autonomously and don't need hand-holding to get things done

• Are available and responsive between 10am and 2pm AEST, Monday to Friday

• Communicate proactively: you flag things early, you ask the right questions, you have incredible attention to detail and you follow through



Bonus points for:

• A background in creative service-based businesses, specifically brand and web design

• Understanding of brand voice and the ability to write client-facing copy that sounds human



How to apply:

 
 with the subject line: "I'm your next OBM"



Include:

• A short note about who you are and why this role makes sense for you

• A specific example of a time you took initiative and solved a problem without being asked

• Your CV and any relevant portfolio or client references

• Your availability

• Your ideal hourly rate in USD

title: SEO Content Writer
description:
ABOUT US

Engage Studio is a fast-growing custom jewelry company based in Toronto, Canada. We specialize in designing meaningful engagement rings and custom jewelry that mark some of the most important 
nts in our clients' lives.



Unlike traditional jewelry stores, our process is a guided journey. We collaborate closely with each client to design a ring that reflects their unique story.



Our team works with clients both in-person in our Toronto showroom and virtually with clients worldwide.

We are building a world-class support team in the Philippines and are looking for a talented SEO Content Writer who wants a long-term role with a growing international company.



This is a long-term role for the right person. We value reliability and consistent quality over speed.



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR

This role is perfect for someone who:

- Has experience writing SEO content for lifestyle, fashion, beauty, or luxury brands

- Knows how to structure a post for both readers and search without it feeling mechanical

- Writes in a voice that sounds human — warm, specific, and free of filler

- Is comfortable working from a detailed brief without needing heavy direction

- Is reliable — hits deadlines and communicates early when something comes up

- Jewelry or bridal industry experience is a plus





WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Every post you deliver is publish-ready with minimal revisions needed

- Your writing sounds like a real person wrote it — not a content machine

- Briefs are followed closely and deadlines are met consistently

- You flag questions early rather than delivering something off-brief

- Clients and readers find the content genuinely useful and engaging





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

1. SEO Blog Writing

You will write blog posts from detailed briefs provided by our team. Responsibilities include:



- Writing SEO blog posts from detailed briefs — topic, angle, audience, and structure are all provided

- Producing content that is warm, clear, and genuinely useful — not keyword-stuffed or generic

- Following SEO fundamentals: logical heading structure, natural keyword integration, scannable formatting

- Researching thoroughly and incorporating supporting elements like data, external sources, and internal links where they add real value



2. Publishing and Formatting

You will be responsible for taking posts from draft to published. Responsibilities include:

- Publishing approved posts directly in WordPress

- Formatting posts correctly — headings, images, links, and layout

- Ensuring each post meets our quality standards before submission



3. Communication and Reliability

You will work independently but stay connected with our team. Responsibilities include:

- Turning around drafts within the agreed window for each post

- Flagging questions or blockers early — before they become delays

- Incorporating feedback efficiently when revisions are requested





REQUIREMENTS

- Minimum 2 years of experience writing SEO content, ideally for lifestyle, fashion, or consumer brands

- Excellent written English — clear, warm, and natural

- Comfortable working from a brief independently

- Familiar with WordPress publishing and basic on-page SEO formatting

- Strong attention to detail with specifications and brand voice guidelines

- Reliable communicator — responsive and proactive



Schedule

This is a fully flexible role. You set your own hours — deadlines matter, not when you work.

Volume is approximately 5 posts per month, each roughly 1,200–1,400 words.



COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS

- Rate: 2,500–3,000 PHP per article (based on experience and quality)

- Approximately 5 articles per month — estimated monthly earnings of 12,500–15,000 PHP

- Flexible schedule — work on your own time

- Paid trial post before committing to an ongoing arrangement

- Long-term opportunity with a growing international company



HOW TO APPLY

- Share one writing sample you are proud of — ideally a blog post or article for a lifestyle, fashion, or consumer brand. In 2–3 sentences, tell us what the brief was and what you were trying to achieve with the piece.

- Record and share a short 1–2 minute video of yourself answering the following question: "Tell us about your writing process — how do you approach a brief from start to a finished draft?"



Applications without both a writing sample and a video will not be reviewed.

We respond quickly to strong applicants. If it's a good fit, we'll start with a paid trial post before committing to an ongoing arrangement.



WHY JOIN OUR TEAM

We are building a long-term international team and we invest in the people who join us.

Our tea
mbers value:



- A supportive and communicative team culture

- Clear briefs and systems — no guesswork

- Long-term career opportunities with a growing company

- Working on content that actually matters to real people at meaningful 
nts in their lives



As our company grows, we promote from within whenever possible.

title: Brand & UI Designer
description:
I for Design Studio (www.ifordesign.co) is on the lookout for our next mid-weight Brand & UI Designer to join our small, all-female team on a part-time basis, starting at 20 hours per week, with the opportunity for this to grow over time.



If you love thoughtful, strategic design, enjoy owning projects from start to finish, and want to work with genuinely lovely clients (the kind who value your expertise and trust the process), you’ll probably feel right at home here.



A little about us:

I for Design Studio is a boutique brand and website studio based on the Sunshine Coast, QLD in Australia, working primarily with female-led businesses in creative industries. Think photographers, copywriters, wedding professionals, coaches and service-based brands who care deeply about not only how their business looks, but how it works.



We’re a small team made up of myself (founder and lead designer), a developer, an operations assistant, and a brand & UI designer who is moving on to her next chapter. We’re collaborative, supportive, honest with each other, and very serious about doing great work… without ego, chaos, or agency burnout culture.



Design style matters here. A lot. We create work that’s refined, intentional, and personality-led, so you’ll need to genuinely like (and be able to execute) a similar aesthetic.



Why you’ll actually want this role:

This isn’t a churn-and-burn design gig or a “just execute what you’re told” kind of role.



You’ll be trusted to:

• Lead projects and make design decisions

• Take ownership of timelines and deliverables

• Work with clients who respect design and pay for quality

• Be part of a team that communicates openly and has each other’s backs

• You’ll get space to do focused, meaningful work, without being micromanaged… but with plenty of collaboration, feedback, and support when you need it.



If you’re someone who likes planning your work, thinking ahead, and taking initiative (rather than waiting to be told what to do), you’ll thrive here.



What you’ll be doing:

• Designing brand identities and visual systems

• Creating brand guidelines and client-ready documentation

• Designing website UI in Figma

• Supporting website builds (Squarespace experience is a bonus, not essential)

• Designing marketing collateral, social content, and digital assets

• Collaborating with the team to meet deadlines and deliver high-quality work

• Communicating with clients clearly and professionally



What we're looking for:

• A mid-weight designer with around 3+ years experience in a similar role (flexible if the work is strong)

• Strong skills in Adobe Creative Suite and Figma

• A confident designer who can run with projects and own their work

• Someone proactive, organised, and deadline-driven

• Clear, open communicator who speaks up if something’s off (you don’t need to have all the answers, just the confidence to raise things early)

• Someone who enjoys collaboration but doesn’t need daily hand-holding

• A genuine interest in branding, UI, and design for creative businesses



Important things to know:

• This is a part-time, long-term role starting at  20 hours per week, with the opportunity to increase hours and responsibility over time

• Hours will fall within AEST business hours, with flexibility discussed upfront

• This is a remote role

• We work hard, have fun, and take our work seriously… all at the same time



How to apply:

If you’ve read all of the above and can see yourself as part of this team, I’d love to hear from you!



Please
 
 with:

• Subject line: I’m your next Brand & UI Designer!

• A short introduction about you, your experience, and why this role feels like a good fit

• Your ideal hourly rate

• A copy of your CV

• A portfolio or website link (this is essential)



If your work and experience align, I’ll be in touch with next steps.



I can’t wait to hear from you!

— Indiah, I for Design Studio

 experience

title: Fractional Marketing Operations Manager (GHL Enforcer) – Executive Coaching Program
description:
The Role:

I am an executive coach focused on high-ticket B2B sales. I have invested in a major marketing program (
) and am using GoHighLevel (GHL). I need an Architect/Enforcer to act as my "Fractional COO/Marketing Ops Lead" to manage the implementation, police the vendors, and ensure lead quality.



You are my buffer. You will deal with the "Ads Guy," the GHL specialists, and the Account Managers so that I only have to focus on coaching and closing.



Key Responsibilities:

Vendor Accountability: Act as the primary contact for the program account managers. Attend meetings on my behalf, audit their claims, and push back assertively when lead quality is low or deadlines are missed.



Training Translation: Watch program training/strategy videos, extract the "must-do" action items, and either implement them or manage the GHL team to ensure they are done correctly.



System Audit: Review our GoHighLevel (GHL) setup. Ensure workflows, tracking (CAPI/Pixel), and automation are high-caliber and formatted for an Executive audience (not "get rich quick" style).



Lead Quality Control: Review incoming leads daily. If quality drops, diagnose the cause (messaging, targeting, or friction) and force the ads team to fix it.



Weekly Executive Reporting: Deliver a simple 1-page "Friday Report" featuring:

Ad Spend vs. Revenue Signal (Green/Yellow/Red)

Lead Quality (Qualified vs. Unqualified)

Booked Calls vs. Show Rates

Key bottlenecks for the following week.



Must-Haves:

GHL Mastery: You must know GoHighLevel well enough to spot errors in workflows and tracking within minutes.

Direct Response Experience: You understand high-ticket funnels ($5k - $15k offers).

Assertive Communication: You are comfortable holding people accountable and stating, "This isn't good enough for an executive audience," without being prompted.



Native/Fluent English: Since you are representing me to US-based vendors, your communication must be professional and sharp.

Budget & Hours:

Hours: 5–10 hours per week to start.

Rate: Competitive based on experience ($20–$35/hr depending on region and seniority).

title: Operations & Sales Growth Executive Assistant
description:
About Us

The Event Engineer helps entrepreneurs scale to 7-figures and beyond. Led by Lisa Barry, we build high-converting event systems and world-class client experiences. Our mission is helping visionary founders grow wealth that fuels meaningful change.



The Role

This is not a "task-taker" role; this is a high-level partnership. As the Executive Assistant, your primary mission is to protect Lisa’s time, energy, and focus. You are the gatekeeper of the brand and the architect of the founder's daily life. 



While you handle high-level EA duties, you will also manage the "backend" systems (GoHighLevel & ClickUp) and AI automations that keep the 7-figure engine running smoothly behind the scenes. You are the bridge between brand exposure and revenue.



---



1. Primary Responsibility: Executive Support & Gatekeeping



Zone of Genius Protection: You own Lisa’s calendar. You don’t just book meetings; you architect her week to ensure "Deep Work" for software development and high-level sales is never interrupted.

Inbox Zen & Triage: You are the first line of defense. You filter, label, and respond to 80% of incoming communication so Lisa only sees what truly requires her eyes.

High-EQ Representation: Whether in the DMs or via
, you represent a premium brand. You interact with high-level clients and partners with warmth, professionalism, and absolute precision.

The Digital Housekeeper: You ensure Lisa’s digital environment (Google Drive, Slack, Inbox) is organized, clutter-free, and optimized for speed.





2. Secondary Responsibility: Systems & AI (Behind the Scenes)



ClickUp Command Center (Non-Negotiable): You manage the team’s workflow. You ensure the Creative Architect, Tech Guy, and Developer are on track, using ClickUp Automations to move tasks through to the "Wednesday Drop."

GHL Pipeline Mastery (Non-Negotiable): You ensure the CRM is 100?curate. You manage lead tags and nurture sequences, ensuring no "Golden Opportunity" ever falls through the cracks.

AI Integration: You leverage AI to make the business faster. This includes using AI for meeting transcriptions, instantly turning "voice notes" into formatted SOPs, and overseeing AI-driven lead responses.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Who You Are



The Proactive Partner: You think three steps ahead. You solve problems before the founder knows they exist.

Systems-Minded: You get a dopamine hit from a clean CRM, a perfectly structured ClickUp board, and a zero-inbox.

Owner Mentality: You don't wait for a to-do list. You see a gap in the business and you build a bridge.

Flawless Communicator: Your written English is impeccable, persuasive, professional, and polished.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Qualifications & Skills



2–3+ Years as an EA or Ops Manager for a high-ticket coach, consultant, or agency.

GoHighLevel (GHL) Proficiency: Experience managing leads, pipelines, and workflows.

ClickUp Experience: Ability to build and manage complex project boards and automations.

AI Literacy: Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Otter, etc.) to automate repetitive admin tasks.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Application Requirements



Please provide the following to be considered for Phase 1:

1.  Resume: A brief history of your experience in operations and sales support.

2.  DISC Profile: Please include your results (D% I% S% C%).

3.  Rate your proficiency (1–10) with ClickUp, GoHighLevel, and AI tools.

4.  Tell us about one specific time you "saved the day" for a founder by fixing a system or managing a chaotic inbox.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Work Arrangement & Compensation



Remote: 9am – 5pm AEDT (Australian Eastern Time)

Hours: 40 Hours / Week

Compensation: $1,000 AUD / month (Full-Time)

title: Draftsperson (AutoCAD / SolidWorks / Inventor) – Full Time (Remote)
description:
About Us

We are a New Zealand-based company specialising in the design, engineering, and manufacture of ventilation systems for construction projects. We’re growing and looking for a reliable draftsperson to support our team with shop drawings and manufacturing drawings.



About the Role

We’re looking for a draftsperson to work closely with our team to produce accurate and clear 2D and 3D drawings for manufacturing and project delivery.



This is a full-time remote role working NZ hours (same shift as our current PH tea
mbers).



Key Responsibilities

 • Produce 2D shop drawings using AutoCAD

 • Create 3D models and drawings using Inventor or SolidWorks

 • Prepare manufacturing drawings for production

 • Work closely with our operations and design team

 • Review and revise drawings based on feedback



Requirements

 • Strong proficiency in AutoCAD (2D)

 • Proficiency in Inventor or SolidWorks (3D)

 • Experience with shop drawings / manufacturing drawings

 • Good written and spoken English

 • Competent in Microsoft Office

 • Reliable home office setup (stable internet and power)

 • We are open to:

 • Junior candidates with strong potential

 • Experienced candidates who can hit the ground running

 • If you already have your own software, we will factor this into your salary

 • If not, we can provide the required software



What We’re Looking For

 • Detail-oriented and accurate

 • Good communication skills

 • Willing to learn and improve

 • Able to work independently and manage tasks

Shortlisted candidates will be invited for an interview.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
Please apply through the below link: 
=



Compensation: $1,300 – $1,800 / month USD 



Contractual | California business hours | Compensation is based on experience, depth of B2B SEO/content expertise, and demonstrated results. There is strong potential for compensation growth based on performance and impact within the first 3–6 months. 



ABOUT CDMS 



CDMS is a B2B Environmental, Health & Safety (EHS) services company. We work directly with manufacturing and industrial clients, helping them stay compliant, safe, and operationally sound. 



We have strong technical expertise and a clear brand. This role is about turning that expertise into a consistent, credible, and results-driven digital presence. 



THE ROLE 



This is a senior contractual role, not a management position, but one that requires you to operate independently and with sound judgment. You will own our digital marketing output end-to-end: SEO strategy and implementation, content creation, LinkedIn presence, and brand collateral. You will deeply learn our voice, our clients, and our industry, and use that knowledge to build a presence that earns trust in a technical, compliance-driven space. 



You will work closely with our leadership team, who will brief you directly from client conversations and field intelligence. Your job is to transform that raw material into polished, on-brand content that sounds like us: credible, clear, and grounded in real EHS work. 



If you have ever built a B2B content engine from a standing start and you understand what it takes to earn authority in a niche technical industry, this role was written for you. 



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE (3–6 MONTHS) 



Grow LinkedIn presence by 50%–100%, with a focus on relevant, industry-aligned followers 

Increase qualified inbound leads by 30%–70%, supported by consistent content and targeted outreach 

Improve organic website traffic by 20%–40% through SEO optimization and new content 

Establish a consistent, high-quality content cadence across blog, LinkedIn, and newsletters 

Build an initial pipeline of case studies and thought leadership content based on real client work 

Deliver clear monthly reporting with actionable recommendations - not just data 



Note: These targets are supported by timely input from leadership, tool access (Ahrefs, etc.), and shared alignment on priorities. We treat this as a two-way commitment. 



WHAT YOU'LL DO 



SEO 



Conduct and maintain a full SEO audit using Ahrefs; implement and track on-page optimizations 



Perform ongoing keyword research and monitor rankings across target terms 



Identify content gaps and build a topic roadmap based on search demand and competitive analysis 



Own SEO reporting — surface insights to leadership in plain language with clear action items 



Content & Ghostwriting 



Write blog posts, LinkedIn articles, and newsletters in the voice of our leadership team 



Turn client conversations and project outcomes (fed to you by our team) into compelling case studies 



Curate RSS feeds from EHS, manufacturing, and safety industry sources; develop timely, opinionated content based on those topics 



Maintain a consistent editorial calendar across all channels 



Develop and refine our brand voice guide over time — so the standard is documented, not just in your head 



LinkedIn Management 



Manage our leadership team's LinkedIn presence — posting, commenting, and connecting on their behalf 



Engage daily with content from existing clients and prospects in the EHS and manufacturing space 



Grow our LinkedIn network through targeted, strategic outreach 



Track follower growth, engagement rate, and lead signals — report monthly with clear takeaways 



Collateral & Internal Branding 



Apply our existing brand guidelines to materials provided by our technical team — one pagers, site posters, and laminated sheets for client locations 



Coordinate with our onsite admin assistant for printing and lamination, and with the EHS team for client delivery 



Keep all materials current and on-brand 



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR 



4+ years of B2B content marketing or digital marketing experience 



Expert-level SEO with demonstrated ranking results — Ahrefs is your daily driver 



Proven ghostwriting for C-suite or senior executives in B2B industries 



Experience managing full editorial calendars independently, with minimal direction 



Strong track record growing LinkedIn presence for a company or executive 



Excellent written English — you catch errors others miss and you have range 



Canva or basic design skills to adapt brand templates 



Proficient in WordPress or equivalent CMS 



Comfortable with AI writing tools to accelerate output — without sacrificing voice or accuracy 



Self-directed: you manage your own priorities and deadlines without hand-holding 



NICE TO HAVE 



Familiarity with EHS, safety, manufacturing, or industrial compliance industries 



Experience with newsletter platforms (ActiveCampaign or similar) 



Background in managing or mentoring junior content contributors 



WORK SETUP 



Engagement Type: Independent Contractor 



Schedule: California business hours (PST/PDT) 



Location: Remote — Philippines-based candidates preferred 



Equipment: You provide your own setup; stable internet required 



Tools: Ahrefs, WordPress, Canva, LinkedIn — we provide access on hire 



Next Step: To move forward in the hiring process, please complete the assessment below. Once finished, you’ll receive a second assessment. Completion of both is required for consideration.
